body: PT Remala Abadi Tbk (DATA), an internet service provider (ISP) and IT consultancy company, will offer 275 million shares through Initial Public Offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Allocating IDR 1 trillion, KLBF to set buyback of 625 million shares
body: PT Kalbe Farma Tbk (KLBF) is allocating IDR 1 trillion to repurchase (buyback) of 625 million shares.

title: Issuing Bond and Sukuk Phase III 2024, ADMF eyes IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk (ADMF) is aiming to raise IDR 2 trillion via the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bond VI and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Mudharabah V Phase III Year 2024 from April 24 to 29, 2024.

title: Recently debuting, Asri Karya Lestari announces net profit surge of 5.55%
body: PT Asri Karya Lestari Tbk (ASLI), a building construction debuting on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) earlier this year, reported its net profit to reach IDR 19 billion the in the fiscal year 2023.

title: DOID SG bags extra capital of USD 10 million
body: Delta Dunia Makmur Pte Ltd (DOID SG), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Tbk (DOID), secures an extra capital worth USD 10 million from issuing 10 million shares.

title: Waskita Karya Realty channels loan facilities to subsidiaries
body: PT Waskita Karya Realty (WKR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), has distributed shareholder loan facilities to PT Waskita Modern Realty (WMR) in the amount of IDR 980 billion.

title: Unstable economy, SAPX to cancel raising IDR 399.9 billion via rights issue
body: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk (SAPX), a logistics and delivery service provider, announces the cancellation of its capital raise with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue, which had been planned a year ago.

title: Here are 10 top issuers controlling 75.42% of IDX market cap
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) records 10 issuers that are controlling 75.24% of total market capitalisation (market cap) worth IDR 11.69 quadrillion as of March 2024.

title: ASSA to secure investment financing of IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) has secured an investment financing (musyarakah mustanaqishah) worth IDR 1 trillion from PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS).

title: Avia Avian to channel final dividend of IDR 681 billion
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer under Tancorp Group, will distribute final dividend of IDR 681 billion that will be taken out of 2023 net profit.

title: Indomobil work with GAC Aion to distribute electric cars in Indonesia
body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS) has signed the partnership with GAC Aion New Energy Automobile Company Limited, regarding the joint partnership for GAC Aion motor vehicle distrbution in Indonesia.

title: Nearly 700 million Gojek Tokopedia shares purchased; net foreign volume closed at 217.02 million shares
body: Foreign investors purchased 689.56 million shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Wednesday, April 3, for a net volume of 250.79 million shares. This transaction contributed to the net foreign surplus of 217.02 million shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was 2.64 billion shares, while foreign sell volume was 2.43 billion shares.

title: Multitrend Indo to divest 4.04 million treasury shares to Blooming Years
body: PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY), a baby and children product retail company, has divested 4,037,620 shares in treasury stock to its controller, Blooming Years.

title: BJBR to allocate IDR 1 trillion for dividend
body: The shareholders of PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) agreed upon dividend of the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 1 trillion or IDR 95.05 per share.

title: KB Valbury Sekuritas increases portion in Widodo Makmur Perkasa (WMPP) and Widodo Makmur Unggas (WMUU)
body: On Tuesday, April 2, securities company PT KB Valbury Sekuritas increased its stake in two issuers at the same time. First, this investor purchased 368.50 million shares of the livestock holding company PT Widodo Makmur Perkasa Tbk (WMPP), increasing its ownership from 5.69% to 6.94%. Following that, the shares in WMPP's subsidiary, the premium chicken product producer PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk (WMUU), were acquired. The same investor purchased approximately 234.37 million WMUU shares, bringing its ownership from 6.77% to 8.58%.

title: Sari Kreasi Boga’s net profit soared 925%, take a look at its growth engine
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI), a supplier and owner of Baba Raffi kebab franchise, recorded net profit of IDR 127.47 billion in 2023, skyrocketing as high as 925% year-on-year (yoy).

title: J Resources discovers new gold prospects in Bolaang Mongondow
body: PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk (PSAB), a gold mining company with market capitalisation at IDR 4.63 trillion, announced the discovery of new gold prospects within the work area of its subsidiary, PT J Resources Boolang Mongondow (JBRM).

title: ITMG’s interim dividend went up 111.84%, cash dividend shrank 47.27%
body: The cash dividend of PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) for the fiscal year 2023 is 47.27% lower than the dividend of 2022.

title: BNGA to allocate dividend of IDR 3.08 trillion, up 6.52%
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) is allocating dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 3.08 trillion or IDR 22.67 per share.

title: Down from last year, ROTI sets up dividend of IDR 87.67 per share
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corporindo Tbk (ROTI) is allocating cash dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 87.67 per share, down 17.72% year-on-year (yoy) from the cash dividend for the fiscal year 2022 distributed last year of IDR 106.55 per share.

title: After purchasing 1.13 billion Surya Eka (ESSA) shares, Jonathan Chang now owns 6.6% stake
body: PT Surya Esa Perkasa Tbk (ESSA), which operates a private LPG refinery and ammonia factory, welcomed Jonathan Chang as a new investor on Monday, April 1. PT BNC Sekuritas Indonesia facilitated this purchase of 1.13 billion ESSA shares, giving Chang approximately 6.6% ownership. Aside from that, a new investor also entered PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA), a company that provides consulting services in the mining and energy sectors, namely PT Bersama Jaya Solusi. This investor purchased approximately 50.73 million ITMA shares through two securities companies, accounting for approximately 5.08% of the ownership.

title: Foreign buy volume rises, net foreign volume records surplus 938.64 million shares
body: The foreign buy volume on Tuesday, April 2, rose considerably from the previous day, reaching 3.63 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sell volume was just 2.69 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of approximately 938.64 million. The shares with the highest purchases belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with 1.52 billion shares purchased, and it recorded a net volume of 774.33 million shares.

title: Revenue down 1.7%, Trisula International boosted profit 6% to IDR 68.2 billion
body: PT Trisula International Tbk (TRIS) reported net profit growth of up to 6% year-on-year (yoy) amidst the slippage of revenue by 1.7% yoy at the end of 2023, driven by solid performances of its subsidiaries.

title: Revenue up, MMLP’s profit slowed down
body: The profit of PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk (MMLP) reportedly slowed down in 2023 despite its revenue growth from 2022.

title: WOMF records consistent growth in dividend in three years
body: PT WOM Finance Tbk (WOMF) will allocate dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 70.92 billion or IDR 20.37 per share.

title: SKI to initiate mandatory tender offer of 19.81% of KARW
body: PT Saranakelola Investa (SKI), the new controller of PT ICTSI Jasa Prima Tbk (KARW), initiates mandatory tender offer of 116.32 million shares for IDR 66 each starting from Wednesday (3/4) until May 2.

title: Petrosea signs mining services agreement with Singaraja Putra
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO), an integrated mining and EPC services company, reported the acquisition of the latest mining services contract with PT Singaraja Putra Tbk (SINI) worth US$511.45 million.

title: Vice President optimistic Menara Syariah will become sharia economy icon
body: Ma'ruf Amin, Vice President of the Republic of Indonesia, is optimistic that the presence of the Menara Syariah can create a global scale sharia economic ecosystem.

title: Cinema XXI allocates 97% net profit for 2023 dividends
body: Less than a year after being listed on the stock exchange, PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA) is currently preparing cash dividends worth IDR 666.76 billion, or the equivalent of 97% of the company's net profit recorded in 2023.

title: Credit slowed down, Citi's profit remains solid; up 82% in 2023
body: Solely focusing on institutional banking business now, Citibank N.A. Indonesia, or more popularly known as Citi Indonesia, was still able to record 82% year-on-year (yoy) surge in its net profit, arriving at IDR 2.5 trillion in 2023.

title: KB Valbury Sekuritas purchased 1.67 billion shares of Widodo Makmur Perkasa (WMPP)
body: On Thursday, March 28, PT KB Valbury Sekuritas made a new investment in the livestock holding company PT Widodo Makmur Perkasa Tbk (WMPP). This investor now owns 5.69% of the shares after purchasing 1.67 billion WMPP shares. However, Tumiyana, the controlling investor in WMPP, now owns only approximately 31.97% of the stock after selling 315 million shares. Furthermore, share buying and selling also occurred at real estate developer PT Metropolitan Land Tbk (MTLA), with PT. Yulie Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk acquiring 12.5 million MTLA shares from individual investor Magnus Jaya.

title: Foreign buying and selling volumes differ slightly; net foreign volume closed at 3.16 million shares
body: On Monday, April 1, there was only a slight difference between foreign share buying and selling activity, with both volumes at 2.15 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at around 3.16 million shares of surplus. The foreign investors purchased the most shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling around 646.20 million shares for a net volume of 240.38 million.

title: Loss worsening to IDR 7.12 trillion last year, Jokowi still greenlit IDR 6 trillion investment in WIKA
body: President Joko Widodo or Jokowi has given a nod to the state equity participation plan in PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) of an extra IDR 6 trillion.

title: ADHI bags IDR 4.1 trillion for LRT Jabodetabek Phase I
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) has received some of the payment for the LRT Jabodetabek Phase I project, this time amounting to IDR 4.1 trillion.

title: Profit up 66%, CLEO to expand factory outside Java
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a bottled drinking water manufacturer under Tanobel Group, recorded net profit surge 66% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 324.09 billion at the end of 2023.

title: Enhancing power plant business, ITMA to acquire 3 PLTU
body: PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA), a mining and energy company, previously known as Itama Ranoraya, has acquired 25% of PT Oksigen Natural Esa (ONE) from 1st Finansial Company Limited (FFCL).

title: Fin Centerindo Satu projects Menara Syariah to become global sharia economy centre
body: PT Fin Centerindo Satu (FCS) projects Menara Syariah, Pantai Indah Kapuk (PIK) 2, Tangerang, Banten, to be the national and global hub of economic activities and sharia-based education.

title: Weakening textile industry, Trisula Textile managed to score 157% profit growth
body: Amidst the slowing down of domestic textile industry, PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), a textile manufacturer and trading company, scored sales growth of up to 17% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 538.6 billion at the end of 2023.

title: Indo Tambangraya Megah to distribute final dividend of USD 125.94 million
body: PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG), a coal mine and renewable energy company, has gained approval from Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) to allocate final dividend of USD 125.94 million, which will be taken out of its net profit in 2023.

title: Revenue went over IDR 1 trillion, INPP's net profit skyrocketed 166%
body: PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) booked net profit of IDR 184.90 billion at the end of 2023, scoring 166% year-on-year (yoy) surge from IDR 69.5 billion in 2022.

title: CTRA saw slight slippage in profit in 2023
body: The profit of PT Ciputra Development Tbk (CTRA) saw 0.85% decline in 2023 compared to 2022.

title: Indonesia to become Global Halal Hub 2024, KDEKS Banten holds Halal Festival
body: Regional Committee of Sharia Economy and Finance (lit. Komite Daerah Ekonomi dan Keuangan Syariah/KDEKS) of Banten holds “Banten Halal Festival Ramadhan: From Banten to the World” to support the vision of Indonesia becoming Global Halal Hub 2024.

title: Shipping services slowed down, ASSA's net profit still soars 425%
body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA), a transportation solutions provider, recorded net profit growth of up to 425% year-on-year (yoy) despite the sluggish AnterAja delivery service business.

title: First week of April 2024, FWCT reaches top gainers
body: At the beginning of the week (1/4), PT Wijaya Cahaya Timber Tbk (FWCT) shares gained 22.06%, reaching the Top Gainers among the top 10 top gainers on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Net profit soars 38.6%, SUNI to expand plant and operate JV
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI), an OCTG pipeline producer focused on the oil and gas industry, recorded a 38.6% year-on-year (yoy) increase in net profit to reach IDR 100.9 billion at the end of 2023.

title: Sinar Mas Multiartha seeks fresh funds IDR 1.5 trillion via bond issuance
body: PT Sinarmas Multi Artha Tbk (SMMA), a financial services holding company owned by Sinar Mas Group, will issue Shelf Registration Bonds III SMMA Phase I Year 2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Interest expense reduced, ZINC's loss shrinks
body: PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk (ZINC) was able to reduce its losses in 2023, even though its revenue fell 34.29% from 2022. The company's loss was reduced from 2022 thanks to the efficiency of interest expenses and an increase in foreign exchange gain.

title: FREN to pay off loans to Niven Holdings of IDR 5.48 trillion
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) will allocate 64% of the proceeds of its rights issue of 171.45 billion shares to pay off loans and interest to Niven Holdings Limited (NHL), non-affiliated creditor.

title: Graha Layar Prima faced another loss of ID 13.65 billion
body: PT Graha Layar Prima Tbk (BLTZ), the managing company of CGV theatre network, booked a loss of IDR 13.65 billion throughout 2023, continuing the consecutive losses recorded since 2020.

title: March 2024’s inflation set at 3.05% by BPS
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) secured inflation rate at 3.05% in March 2024, lower than the inflation seen in March 2023 of 4.97%.

title: Boy Thohir acquired 1.5 billion shares of Provident Investment (PALM) through right issue
body: On Wednesday, March 27, businessman Garibaldi Thohir added approximately 1.53 billion shares of investment firm PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) into his portfolio. This investment issuer held a right issue offering to pay off debts owed to the investor, who is frequently referred to as Boy Thohir. Previously, Boy owned approximately 6.61% of the shares, but this addition of shares facilitated by PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk increased his ownership to 16.14%.

title: ACES bagged IDR 763.50 billion of profit, up 15%
body: PT Ace Hardware Indonesia Tbk (ACES) saw growth in its profit attributable to the parent entity to IDR 763.5 billion in 2023, up 14.92% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 664.34 billion in 2022.

title: MTDL’s revenue went over IDR 22 trillion, profit up 12%
body: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL), a digital information and communication technology (ICT) company, concluded 2023 triumphantly, securing net profit attributable to the parent entity growth of 12.1% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 650.8 billion.

title: Private placement concluded, MDKA secured IDR 785.10 billion
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) allocated capital worth IDR 785.10 billion to PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA) through the private placement phase I last week (26/3).

title: Profit down 22.7%, ARNA to insist on dividend payment of IDR 43 per share
body: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA), a renowned ceramic manufacturer in Indonesia, readies its dividend distribution for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 43 per share.

title: Financial expenses swelled, ALDO’s profit shrank 96.30%
body: Although PT Alkindo Naratama Tbk (ALDO) sported 17.91% year-on-year (yoy) revenue growth, its profit faced a sharp downturn of 96.30% yoy in 2023 compared to 2022, due to increased cost of revenue and financial expenses.

title: Turning the tides, KINO booked profit od IDR 70.46 billion
body: PT Kino Indonesia Tbk (KINO) booked net profit of IDR 70.46 billion in 2023, turning the table after the loss of IDR 957.03 billion it recorded in the previous year.

title: Bundamedik’s net profit took a 91% downturn in 2023
body: PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), the managing company of a network of hospitals and other healthcare service providers, only scored net profit of IDR 7.46 billion in 2023.

title: Cahaya Bumi Rezeki to offer 300 million shares in IPO
body: PT Cahaya Bumi Rezeki Tbk (CABR), an agriculture supporting service company, will conduct its initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 300 million shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Foreign investors buy Gojek Tokopedia shares; net foreign volume hits 618.84 million shares
body: On Thursday, March 28, foreign investors purchased 1.37 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 922.83 million shares. This share purchase transaction drove the increase in foreign purchase volume of 3.08 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only around 2.46 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of 618.84 million shares.

title: Merdeka Copper (MDKA) investors' shareholdings decreased as a result of Private Placement Phase I
body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), the parent issuer that operates in the metal ore mining industry, held Private Placement Phase I in March. On Tuesday, March 26, as a result of this corporate action, several major MDKA investors noticed a decrease in their share portion, though the number of shares owned did not change.

title: Murni Sadar acquired Eria Hospital in Pekanbaru for IDR 52.4 billion
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the issuer that owns the Murni Teguh Hospital, has poured IDR 52.4 billion into the acquisition of PT Riau Sarana Medika (Eria Hospital) located in Pekanbaru.

title: Medikaloka Hermina net profit reaches IDR 437.35 billion, grows 46.4% yoy
body: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), an issuer that operates Hermina hospitals, posted a net profit of IDR 437.35 billion in fiscal year 2023. This achievement was 46.4% higher year-on-year (yoy) or from the previous year, where the company only scored a net profit of IDR 298.59 billion.

title: Finishing roadshow, BNI to issue Senior Bond of USD 500 million
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) will be issuing Senior Bond of BNI 2024 worth USD 500 million after concluding roadshow and pricing yesterday (26-27/3).

title: ASRI recorded IDR 632.32 billion in profit, plunged 41.78%
body: PT Alam Sutera Realty Tbk (ASRI)'s net profit plunged 41.78% to IDR 632.32 billion in 2023 from 2022 profit of IDR 1.09 trillion.

title: Indomobil Multi Jasa net profit shot up 130%, highest in 5 years
body: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk (IMJS), a consumer finance company owned by the Salim Group, posted a net profit of IDR 333.69 billion in 2023, growing 130% year-on-year (yoy) or from the previous year which only reached IDR 145 billion.

title: Waskita Karya infrastructure business secures IDR 5 billion in fresh funds
body: PT Waskita Karya Infrastruktur (WKI), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) which runs the infrastructure business, has signed an Inter Company Transaction (ICT) agreement with PT Waskita Sangir Energi (WSE).

title: Autopedia's net profit multiplied eightfold; Here's the growth driver
body: PT Autopedia Sukses Lestari Tbk (ASLC), the company behing used car omnichannel sale platform Caroline.id and JBA auction business, recorded net profit of IDR 26.7 billion in 2023.

title: Net foreign volume drops to -263.46 million shares; Telkom Indonesia (TLKM) shows largest loss
body: On Wednesday, March 27, the foreign sell volume climbed, reaching 3.07 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was only 2.81 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume down to -263.46 million shares. After foreign investors sold its 351.14 million shares, shares of the state-owned telecoms operator PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) ranked first on the top-selling list with the lowest net volume of -252.05 million shares.

title: Steadily rising, Adira Finance to distribute dividend of IDR 972 per share
body: Shareholders of PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF), popularly known as Adira Finance, agreed upon the allocation of IDR 972 billion for its cash dividend of the fiscal year 2023, equal to 50% of net profit scored last year.

title: KIJA raked in profit of IDR 528.6 billion
body: PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) scored fantastic profit growth throughout 2023, supported by decreased loss on foreign exchange, reclassification of foreign currency translation, as well as its derivative instruments.

title: SMDR's profit down 66.36% in 2023
body: The performance of PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk (SMDR) was seen declining throughout 2023 compared to 2022, due to decreased revenue of shipping and agent services.

title: Fortune Mate Indonesia peaked at top gainers
body: PT Fortune Mate Indonesia Tbk (FMII) soared 35%, arriving at the top of the gainers' list at the end of yesterday's (27/3) closing bell.

title: Bids in SUN auction hit IDR 32.33 trillion
body: The total incoming bids in the auction of Government Securities (SUN) last Tuesday (26/3) arrived at IDR 32.33 trillion.

title: Rohartindo Nusantara Luas to channel IDR 2 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Rohartindo Nusantara Luas Tbk (TOOL), a retail specialised in technical tools under the brand Nankai, has channelled extra capital to one of its subsidiaries, PT Micha Teknologi Indonesia Bersatu (MTIB).

title: TMAS confidently aims for IDR 1 trillion of profit in 2024
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS) is targeting its profit to be able to reach IDR 1 trilion in 2024, increasing 23% year-on-year (yoy) from 2022 profit of IDR 814.76 billion.

title: Putra Buana acquired 5.71% of SLJ Global (SULI) via private placement
body: PT Putra Buana Indonesia Wood Industry purchased approximately 327.18 million shares of PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI) on Monday, March 25. After taking part in this forestry and timber issuer's private placement, the new investor currently holds about 5.71% stake.

title: Foreign share transactions increase: net foreign volume only 58.99 million shares surplus
body: Foreign purchases and sales of shares increased in volume on Tuesday, March 26, compared to the previous trading day. Foreign buy volume was around 3.44 billion shares, while foreign sell volume was 3.38 billion shares. The increased foreign buying volume resulted in a surplus in net foreign volume, although it was only around 58.99 million shares.

title: AMMN’s profit dropped 76.94%
body: The profit of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) was declining throughout 2023 due to non-optimum commodity production, including copper and gold.

title: EMTK’s subsidiary to acquire 41.15% of CASS
body: PT Roket Cipta Sentosa (RSC), a subsidiary of PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk (EMTK) will take over 41.15% of PT Cardig Aero Services Tbk (CASS) from PT Cardig Asset Management (CAM) and PT Dinamika Raya Swarna (DRS).

title: Soaring 34.51%, IDPR secured top gainers’ title
body: The stock of PT Indonesia Pondasi Raya Tbk (IDPR) was seen soaring 34.51% at the end of yesterday’s (26/3) trading session, bringing this company to the top of the gainers’ list.

title: Operational expenses swelled, Charoen Pokphand’s profit down 20.8%
body: PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk (CPIN), an animal feed and agriculture company, only recorded net profit of IDR 2.31 trillion in 2023, down 20.8% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Scoring billions from IPO, RSCH still struggled with loss
body: PT Charlie Hospital Semarang Tbk (RSCH), a health provider company, recorded a loss of IDR 1.11 billion in 2023.

title: Debuting last year, Hatten Bali’s net profit skyrocketed 99%
body: PT Hatten Bali Tbk (WINE), a wine manufacturer based in Bali, booked net profit of IDR 42.4 billion throughout 2023.

title: Energi Mega Persada to conclude acquisition 2 active blocks in Riau
body: PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an oil and gas company under Bakrie Group, has completed the acquisition of 2 active oil assets with ongoing production in Riau.

title: API (Hong Kong) Investment now holds 13% Bukalapak.com (BUKA) shares
body: On Friday, March 22, a foreign investor, API (Hong Kong) Investment Limited, purchased 13.44 billion shares of e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA). Following the transaction, which involved the use of two securities—Citibank, N.A., and BUT Deutsche Bank AG—API has taken ownership of approximately 13.04% of BUKA shares.

title: Bank Danamon to channel cash dividend of IDR 125.48 per share
body: PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN) has secured approval from its shareholders to distribute cash dividend from its 2023 net profit.

title: Triputra Agro Persada bagged dividend of IDR 150 billion
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG), a palm oil and rubber manufacturer established in 2005, announced its cash dividend income from one of its subsidiaries worth IDR 150 billion.

title: Up 36.86%, PWON scored IDR 2.10 trillion of profit
body: Net profit of PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) reportedly grew 36.86% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 compared to 2022.

title: PANI to spend IDR 40 trillion for PIK 2
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) will invest IDR 40 trillion for the development of Pantai Indak Kapuk Dua (PIK 2), which begins this year until 2060. PIK 2 is a property area of 17.55 hectares (Ha) that is declared a National Strategic Project (NSP) by the government.

title: Multitrend Indo to sell 4.03 million treasury shares
body: PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY) will divest a maximum of 4.03 million treasury shares to raise fresh funds next week (3/4).

title: Foreign buy and sell volumes are stable; net foreign volume closed at 251.70 million shares
body: On Monday, March 25, foreign investors carried out share buying and selling transactions with relatively stable volumes. The foreign buy volume was recorded at 2.59 billion shares, while the foreign sell volume was 2.34 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume stood at 251.70 million shares surplus. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) remained the best-selling shares, with foreign investors purchasing 1.06 billion shares for a net volume of 260.25 million.

title: A month old, two issuers already slipping off
body: Stock price of PT Mitra Dagang Indonesia Tbk (MPIX) and PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk (BAIK) continue to slip off after a month debuting on the board since February 2023.

title: Foreign investors buy up Gojek Tokopedia shares; net foreign volume recorded 666.53 million shares
body: On Friday, March 22, foreign investors purchased 1.03 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in the largest net volume of 656.79 million shares. This transaction also contributed to the foreign purchase volume of 2.66 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was roughly 2 billion shares, resulting in a surplus net foreign volume of 666.53 million shares.

title: ICBP’s profit hit the highest in 4 years, scoring IDR 6.99 trillion
body: PT Indofood CBP Sukses Makmur Tbk (ICBP), a processed food manufacturer under Salim Group, recorded net profit of IDR 9.26 trillion in 2023.

title: Economy improving, Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa’s profit up 6.95%
body: PT Kurniamitra Duta Sentosa Tbk (KMDS) booked net profit of IDR 51.23 billion throughout 2023, increasing 6.95% year-on-year (yoy) due to Indonesia’s recovering economy post-COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Another 16.5 million Bakrie Sumatra Plantation shares purchased by Paradiso Resources (UNSP)
body: On Thursday, March 21, Paradiso Resources Ltd. added approximately 16.5 million more shares of PT Bakrie Sumatra Plantations Tbk (UNSP) after purchasing nearly 17 million shares on the previous trading day. PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia was the facilitator behind the transaction, which increased Paradiso's ownership stake in UNSP from 6.07% to 6.73%. Additionally, PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk (SMCB), a company in the building materials industry, received 232,700 shares of new investment from foreign investor Taiheiyo Cement Corporation, and PT Maskapai Reinsurance Indonesia Tbk (MREI), a reinsurance company, had 20,000 shares purchased by Bank of Singapore Limited.

title: City Vision and Transjakarta to offer new bus shelter ads experience
body: City Vision, an Out-of-Home (OOH) media company under Saratoga Group, collaborates with PT Transjakarta to offer a new kind of advertisement by providing an immersive brand experience at bus shelters.

title: Sumitomo Mitsui Bank acquires 268 million shares of Bank BTPN
body: On Tuesday, March 19, as many as 268.48 million BTPN shares were purchased by Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation - Equity, the controlling shareholder of PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN). Sumitomo Mitsui's ownership stake has now slightly increased to 91.05%. PT Bank HSBC Indonesia facilitated the share purchase by this Japanese investor

title: Govt announces 14 new PSNs, 2 located in PIK 2 and BSD
body: The Indonesian government has approved 14 new National Strategic Projects (PSN), through an internal meeting chaired by President Joko Widodo and attended by his cabinet last week.

title: Bukalapak suffers IDR 1.36 trillion loss
body: PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA), an e-commerce platform, lost IDR 1.36 trillion, despite posting a 22.66% increase in revenue throughout 2023. In 2022, the company made a profit of IDR 1.98 trillion, recovering from its performance in 2021, which suffered a loss of IDR 1.67 trillion.

title: In need of additional capital, ENVY to carry out 2.51 billion shares rights issue
body: PT Envy Technologies Indonesia Tbk (ENVY), an information technology services and trading company, will carry out a Capital Increase by providing Pre-emptive Rights (PMHMETD) or a rights issue of 2.51 billion new shares.

title: Up 19.8% Sumber Alfaria Trijaya’s net profit hit IDR 3.48 trillion
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT), the managing company of Alfamart and Alfamidi convenience store network, revealed net profit worth IDR 3.48 trillion in 2023.

title: 2023, MBAP’s net profit shrank 87.91%
body: The profit of PT Mitra Bara Adiperkasa Tbk (MBAP) slipped down 87.91% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 from 2022, in which it scored 78.38% yoy surge from 2021.

title: Soechi Lines’ net profit grew 38% in 2023
body: PT Soechi Lines Tbk (SOCI), the company engaged in the tanker assembly and supporting logistics for oil and gas, recorded net profit of USD 8.92 million or approximately IDR 141.16 billion in 2023.

title: Bank BTPN to distribute IDR 471.66 billion of cash dividend
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) has secured approval from Annual General Meeting of Shareholders regarding the plan to distribute cash dividend of IDR 471.66 billion, which will be taken out of its net profit of 2023.

title: Net foreign volume remains in the green zone at 889.36 million shares in surplus
body: Like the previous three days, net foreign volume on Thursday, March 21, remained in the green zone, at 889.36 million shares in surplus. This was because the foreign buy volume was 2.88 billion shares, while the foreign sell volume was only 1.99 billion shares. The most purchased shares still belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which were purchased for 821.82 million shares with a net volume of 547.66 million shares.

title: Foreign investors buy up to 3.61 billion shares, with a net foreign volume surplus of 152.60 million
body: Foreign investors purchased more shares than they sold on Wednesday, March 20. This brought the foreign buying volume to 3.61 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was just about 3.46 billion shares. Thus, net foreign volume closed at 152.60 million shares. The shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the most purchased, with 1.68 billion shares and a net volume of 368.22 million shares, unchanged from the previous day.

title: Following their sale, MNC Asia repurchased 60 million Global Mediacom shares (BMTR)
body: On Monday, March 18, PT. MNC Asia Holding Tbk repurchased shares of media and broadcasting issuer PT Global Mediacom Tbk (BMTR), after the company had released 60 million shares of its shares on the previous trading day. PT MNC Sekuritas assisted this parent issuer to conduct the transaction, in which MNC Asia currently owns about 36.38% of BMTR. Also, around 2.15 million shares in PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk (SMMA), a financial services subsidiary, were acquired by PT Sinar Mas Cakrawala, another parent company.

title: Govt to hold IDR 24 trillion SUN auction next week
body: The Indonesian government will auction 7 series of Government Debt Securities (SUN) on Tuesday (26/3) next week, according to information from the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Atlantis Subsea Indonesia to issue 1.2 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Atlantis Subsea Indonesia Tbk (ATLA), a company engaged in the survey industry for energy sector, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Bank Raya Indonesia to buy back shares with IDR 60 billion
body: PT Bank Raya Indonesia Tbk (AGRO), a subsidiary of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), formerly known as BRI Agro, will conduct a share buyback with IDR 60 billion.

title: Lippo Cikarang net profit slumped 37.9%, lowest in 3 years
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK), a property management and development company controlled by the Lippo Group, posted a net profit of IDR 161.92 billion throughout 2023.

title: Maybank scored 65% profit growth to IDR 1.79 trillion
body: PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII) reported net profit surge to IDR 1.79 trillion in 2023, up 65% year-on-year (yoy) from 2022 net profit of IDR 1.08 trillion.

title: MFIN’s shareholders to divest portions for IDR 7.04 trillion
body: Two shareholders of PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk (MFIN) are said to have realised the divestment of 80.6% of their portions worth IDR 7.04 trillion to MUFG Bank Ltd and PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) last week (13/3).

title: Jasa Marga channels IDR 1.04 trillion in fresh funds for Patimban access toll road
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has channeled a shareholder loan facility to PT Jasamarga Akses Patimban (JAP), a toll road business entity (BUJT) managing the Patimban access toll road.

title: Bids received in SUN auction reach IDR 21.06 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the auction of Government Securities (SUN) on Tuesday (3/19) yesterday reached IDR 21.06 trillion, according to the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: MCI Pro, the latest from Generali Indonesia for organ-based critical illness coverage
body: Generali Indonesia launches Multi-stage Critical Illness Protection (MCI Pro), its newest insurance rider offering coverage for risks of critical illnesses with a unique approach: organ-based protection.

title: Garudafood prepares IDR 20 billion for share buyback
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD), a processed food producer operating since 1994, will allocate IDR 20 billion to conduct a share buyback.

title: BAUT's net profit slowed 20.46% due to high operating expenses
body: PT Mitra Angkasa Sejahtera Tbk (BAUT), a specialty retailer that provides various types of nuts and bolts for industry, recorded a net profit of IDR 5.14 billion in fiscal year 2023.

title: Chandra Asri to sign salt offtake agreement with BCI Minerals
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) and BCI Minerals Limited (BCI) have signed a salt binding offtake agreement from Madrie Salt project owned by BCI.

title: Mandala Finance has an “idAAA” rating after MUFG and Adira Finance’s acquisition
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has upgraded the rating of PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk (MFIN) or Mandala Finance to “idAAA” with “stable” prospect, as well as “idAAA” and “idAAA(sy)” ratings for currently existing bond and sukuk.

title: TDPM secures loan, allocating to working capital and obligation payment
body: PT Tridomain Performance Materials Tbk (TDPM) has secured a loan of USD 3.75 million or equal to IDR 58.27 billion from PT Prima Lintas Jaya Mandala (PLJM).

title: SONA held its top gainers’ title
body: PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk (SONA) was seen standing strong at the top of the gainers’ list until the end of yesterday’s (20/3) session.

title: AKRA saw revenue slowing down, yet net profit soared 15.68%
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) scored net profit of IDR 2.78 trillion in 2023, 15.68% higher than the 2022 net profit of IDR 2.40 trillion.

title: NCKL shareholders agree upon rights issue
body: The shareholders of PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) has agreed upon a rights issue of a maximum 18.92 million shares or 30% of its issued and paid-up capital.

title: Prajogo Pangestu liquidates 2 billion Barito Pacific (BRPT) shares
body: On Friday, March 15, 2 billion shares of the energy and industrial issuer PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT), which is owned by businessman Prajogo Pangestu, were liquidated. Two securities—PT Bahana Sekuritas and PT BNI Sekuritas—were used to register this share transaction. Prajogo used to own about 71.19% of the shares, making him the controlling shareholder; however, the most recent share sale reduced his ownership to 69.05%.

title: Mitra Adiperkasa presents Kaja Beauty from South Korea at Sephora stores
body: PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPI), a specialty retailer that houses a number of well-known brands, has presented Kaja Beauty from South Korea through Sephora stores in Indonesia.

title: Buana Finance obtains IDR 500 billion credit facility from Bank Central Asia
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a consumer finance company listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) since 1990, has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA).

title: Foreign buys and sells are stable, with a net foreign volume surplus of 92.60 million shares
body: Foreign investors were seen purchasing and selling shares on Tuesday, March 19, with stable volumes. The foreign buying volume was around 2.44 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 2.35 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume hit a surplus of around 92.60 million shares. The largest number of shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with 748.26 million shares and a net volume of 136.85 million shares. Meanwhile, the stock with the highest sales belonged to the e-commerce company PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA), which sold 212.12 million shares and whose net volume was -121.92 million shares.

title: PURI’s net profit up 69.7% after sharp downturn in 2022
body: PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk (PURI), a real estate management and developer in Batam, scored net profit of IDR 2.41 billion in 2023, increasing 69.7% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Solid sales figure, BOBA’s net profit up 39.3% yoy
body: PT Formosa Ingredient Factory Tbk (BOBA), the supplier of drinks’ ingredients and toppings for various infamous food & beverages (F&B) franchises in Indonesia, reported net profit of IDR 14.96 billion throughout 2023.

title: Distribusi Voucher Nusantara grants subsidiary extra IDR 10 billion
body: PT Distribusi Voucher Nusantara Tbk (DIVA), an application and internet service provider, has increased the capital of its subsidiary, PT Berkah Karunia Kreasi (BKK).

title: Setting up MCB, APEX to issue 103 million shares
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX) will issue 103,623,569 shares for IDR 1,846.63 each next week (27/3).

title: Preparing a buyback, SCNP to allocate IDR 50 billion
body: PT Selaras Citra Nusantara Perkasa Tbk (SCNP) is budgeting IDR 50 billion for a buyback of a maximum 250 million shares or 10% of its total issued and paid-up capital.

title: VKTR and Pertamina establish joint venture for electric vehicle business
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR) has signed a partnership with PT Pertamina Power Indonesia (PPI), a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero).

title: FREN suffers loss, despite increase in revenue
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) recorded a loss of IDR 599.63 billion in 2023, even though its revenue increased by 4.13%. In 2022, the company recorded a profit of IDR 1.64 trillion.

title: SONA reaches top gainers at closing bell
body: Shares of PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk (SONA) jumped 25% until the closing bell and reached Top Gainers on Tuesday (19/3).

title: In time of Ramadhan, AXA Mandiri launches Amanah Syariah Protection Insurance
body: AXA Mandiri introduces its latest protection insurance product in sharia line, Amanah Syariah Protection Insurance.

title: INKP to issue US$ 25 million bonds
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP) will issue Shelf Registration USD Bonds I Phase III 2024 amounting to US$ 25 million on April 1, 2024.

title: APEX bags US$13.7 million contract from Pertamina
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX), a coal and oil and gas support services company, has obtained a marine drilling contract from PT Pertamina Hulu Kalimantan Timur (PHKT).

title: SOE Insurance Holding, IFG, aims for market leader position
body: Indonesia Financial Group (IFG), a holding of state-owned enterprises (SOEs) in the fields of insurance, guarantee and investment, targets to become market leaders in the general insurance industry

title: Over 1 billion Gojek Tokopedia shares are traded; net foreign volume closed at minus 118.39 million shares
body: On Monday, March 18, foreign investors sold 1.36 billion shares and purchased 1.13 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), bringing the net volume to -228.09 million shares. The amount of this transaction contributed to a foreign buying volume of around 2.87 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 2.99 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -118.39 million shares.

title: UBS AG Hong Kong has invested 9.06 billion shares in Bukalapak.com (BUKA)
body: On Thursday, March 14, PT Bukalapak.com Tbk (BUKA), an online shopping platform, welcomed a new foreign investor. Through BUT Deutsche Bank AG, the foreign investor known as UBS AG Hong Kong Non-Treaty Omnibus Account - 2052034005 recently purchased 9.06 billion BUKA shares, or roughly 8.79% of the stakes.

title: Following its acquisition of Mandala Multifinance (MFIN), MUFG Bank Ltd. holds 70% control
body: On Wednesday, March 13, MUFG Bank Ltd., a Japanese bank, took over as PT Mandala Multifinance Tbk's (MFIN) new controlling shareholder. Having acquired more than 1.87 billion shares through PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk, this investor now holds 70.61% of the shares of the consumer finance company. Local investor PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk also acquired 265 million MFIN shares in total, granting it immediate control over 10% of the shares.

title: Mandom Indonesia’s profit soared 106% in 2023
body: PT Mandom Indonesia Tbk (TCID), a body care product manufacturer and distributor, booked net profit of IDR 38.12 billion in 2023, soaring 106% year-on-year (yoy) higher.

title: Merdeka Copper Gold to issue 362.13 million shares in private placement
body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), a metal and mineral mining company with the highest market capitalisation, will initiate its capital raise without pre-emptive rights, or also known as private placement.

title: UNTR’s subsidiary to acquire SERD for IDR 1.25 trillion
body: PT Energi Prima Nusantara (EPN), a subsidiary of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), has acquired 257,449 shares of PT Supreme Energy Rantau Dadap (SERD) for IDR 1.25 trillion.

title: Barito Renewables Energy’s revenue saw 4.4% climb in 2023
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN), one of Prajogo Pangestu’s companies under Barito Group, has managed to boost its revenue in 2023 by 4.4% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 594.94 million.

title: Increasing 38.89%, Habco’s dividend allocation is IDR 39.62 billion
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) recorded cash dividend growth of 38.99% in 2023 compared to 2022.

title: Mulia Boga Raya to set up buyback, setting up budget of IDR 7.5 billion
body: PT Mulia Boga Raya Tbk (KEJU), a cheese and processed food manufacturer with the brand Prochiz, will initiate a shares buyback with a budge set to IDR 7.5 billion.

title: BCA to set up final dividend of IDR 227.5 per share
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), the bank with the highest market capitalisation, has secured approval from its shareholders to distribute final dividend of IDR 227.50 per share, totalling IDR 28.04 trillion.

title: MPTIS revises the number of listed shares in tender offer
body: PT Metro Pacific Tollways Indonesia Services (MPTIS), the controlling party of PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META), has revised the tender offer period to March 19 – April 17 from the previous January 25 – February 23.

title: BSDE hesitates in issuing remaining Bond and Sukuk 2022’s coupon
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) postpones its plan to issue the coupon of bond and sukuk this year in order to gain extra fund from the remaining Shelf-Registration Bond III Phase I and Shelf-Registration Sukuk I Phase I 2022.

title: Plaza Indonesia Realty’s net profit grew 10% in 2023
body: PT Plaza Indonesia Realty Tbk (PLIN), the developer of Plaza Indonesia and fX Sudirman shopping centres, booked net profit of IDR 613.27 billion throughout 2023, increasing 10% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Indonesia import rose 15.84% to USD 18.44 billion
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) recorded import surge in February 2024 by 15.84% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 18.44 billion from USD 15.91 billion in February 2023.

title: Profit up by 23%, OCBC NISP to set up dividend IDR 1.65 trillion
body: Shareholders of PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) agreed upon the dividend payout ratio of 40.4% for the fiscal year 2023, or equal to IDR 1.65 trillion.

title: Minister of Finance to report Indonesia Eximbank’s debtors for fraud of IDR 2.5 trillion
body: The Minister of Finance, Sri Mulyani, has filed a report of alleged corruption in the form of export fund embezzlement in Indonesia Eximbank (LPEI), which involves 4 companies with outstanding loans of IDR 2.5 trillion.

title: TPIA to spin-off subsidiary in port business
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) will separate PT Chandra Pelabuhan Nusantara (CPAT), its business line in the port, harbour, and storage service, from itself.

title: Paying debts, Waskita Beton Precast to divest assets
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP), a construction company owned by the Indonesian government through PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), has auctioned off its assets to pay off debts to creditors.

title: CFR rating drops, APLN to negotiate on maturing senior notes
body: PT Agung Podomoro Land Tbk (APLN) is discussing with notes’ holders regarding the payment of senior notes worth USD 131.96 million, which will mature on June 2, 2024.

title: Foreign buying and selling volumes are astounding; net foreign volume closed at -351.20 million shares
body: On Friday, March 15, foreign buying and selling volumes reached a record-high level of 26 billion shares each. Because foreign selling volume (26.43 billion shares) exceeded foreign buying volume (26.08 billion shares), net foreign volume then closed at -351.20 million shares. The shares purchased in significant numbers belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which was purchased for 9.94 billion shares for a net volume of 767.52 million.

title: Foreign investors buy 1.5 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares; the net foreign volume is 1.19 billion shares
body: On Thursday, March 14, foreign investors purchased 1.53 billion shares of PT Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 710.79 million shares. This transaction managed to boost the volume of foreign purchases to 3.73 billion shares. With a foreign sales volume of only about 2.53 billion shares, net foreign volume managed to break into the green zone with 1.19 billion shares.

title: HMSP saw 28.44% surge in profit to IDR 8.09 trillion
body: PT HM Sampoerna Tbk (HMSP) booked revenue of IDR 115.9 trillion in 2023, up 4.29% year-on-year (yoy) from 2022 sales of IDR 111.21 trillion.

title: BCA Life aims premium income to grow 15% in 2024
body: PT Asuransi Jiwa BCA (BCA Life) is targeting premium income growth in 2024 to reach 15%. Last year, BCA Life managed to score income of IDR 1.62 trillion.

title: Chandra Asri to divest several businesses, from port to storage
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA), a petrochemical company under Barito Pacific Group, will divest several of its business lines in order to optimise assets.

title: Amman Mineral to set up capex of IDR 31.2 trillion for expansion
body: PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN), a copper and gold mining company, is preparing a capital expenditure (capex) budget of USD 2 billion or equal to approximately IDR 31.2 trillion this year.

title: BPS scored 9.45% export decrease
body: Indonesia’s export value in February 2024 was recorded at USD 19.30 billion, down 9.45% year-on-year (yoy) from the same period in 2024 worth USD 21.32 billion.

title: Gov’t eyes IDR 12 trillion in next week’s sukuk auction
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on March 19, setting an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion.

title: Relentless, Greylag 1410 to file judicial review post cassation rejection
body: Greylag Goose Leasing 1410 Designated Activity Company (Greylag 1410) is known to have filed an application for judicial review after the Supreme Court denied the cassation appeal requesting the annulment of homologated agreement with PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA).

title: Bangun Karya Perkasa to work on Djarum Group project in Bandung
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA), a construction company established in 2007, announced its latest new contract commissioned by PT Hartono Istana Teknologi, a subsidiary under Djarum Group.

title: ASRM plans a stock split, ratio set to 1:4
body: PT Asuransi Ramayana Tbk (ASRM) will initiate the stock split with ratio set to 1:4, meaning that one share will be split into 4 shares of new value.

title: Up 25%, NIKL secures the top gainers spot
body: The stock of PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk (NIKL) grew up to 25% until the end of yesterday’s (14/3) session.

title: BSML to set up rights issue of 400 million shares
body: PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk (BSML) will initiate a rights issue of 400 million shares, the proceeds of which will be used to pay off some of its obligations.

title: Seeing 130.96% downturn, PYFA lost IDR 85.22 billion
body: The performance of PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) declined throughout 2023 compared to 2022.

title: New record, DUTI’s net profit soared 42.66% in 2023
body: PT Duta Pertiwi Tbk (DUTI), a real estate and property company under Sinarmas Group, booked net profit of IDR 1.07 trillion throughout 2023, up 42.66% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking now owns 91% of Bank BTPN after acquiring 2.29 billion shares
body: On Friday, March 8, over 2.29 billion shares of PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) were annexed by Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation - Equity, the bank's majority shareholder. SMBC had previously owned about 88.52% of BTPN shares, but after this most recent transaction, its ownership has increased to 91.06%. PT Bank HSBC Indonesia was chosen to facilitate the purchase. In addition, Low Tuck Kwong, the controlling shareholder of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), acquired 173.02 million BYAN shares. The ownership of this individual investor increased as well, going from 61.61% to 62.12%.

title: IMR Asia receives a 361 million-share transfer of Fortune Indonesia (FORU) from Karya Citra
body: Up to 361.50 million shares of PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk (FORU) were transferred from PT Karya Citra Prima, the company's controlling shareholder, to IMR Asia Holding Pte Ltd, a foreign investor, on Thursday, March 7. Karya Cipta's ownership has drastically decreased from 89.25% to 11.55%, while this new investor based in Singapore now controls 77.7% of the issuer providing marketing communications services. The two investors conducted stock trading transactions using the same security, PT CGS International Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Over 1 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares are sold; net foreign volume concludes at -261.88 million shares
body: After being the most purchased stock in the previous trading days, shares of the digital business PT Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) became the most sold by foreign investors on Wednesday, March 13, with up to 1.04 billion shares sold and a net volume of -252.10 million shares. This share sale contributed to an increase in the foreign sales volume of approximately 3.39 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was 3.13 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -261.88 million shares.

title: Fitch lower Pan Brothers’ rating again, now to Restricted Default
body: Fitch Ratings has demoted long-term rating of PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) to ‘RD’ (Restricted Default) level from the previous ‘C.’

title: Cashlez Worldwide Indonesia to issue private placement of 143.11 million shares
body: PT Cashlez Worldwide Indonesia Tbk (CASH) will initiate its capital raise without pre-emptive rights, or private placement, by issuing 143,112,551 new shares.

title: Federal Finance to offer Bond of IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Federal International Finance/FIF Group eyes extra working capital through the issuance of Bond Phase III Year 2024 worth IDR 2 trillion to expand its vehicle financing distribution

title: DOID’s net profit soared 26% in 2023, went over USD 36 million
body: PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID) booked net profit of USD 36 million throughout 2023, increasing 26% year-on-year (yoy) from the net profit in 2022.

title: NCKL to offer 9.09% to potential investors
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) offers 9.09% of its shares to potential investors via private placement.

title: After suffering losses, Diagnos to acquire DNA data company Asa Ren
body: PT Diagnos Laboratorium Utama Tbk (DGNS) will acquire 97.97% of the shares of Asa Ren Pte. Ltd, an AI-based DNA data company registered in Singapore, with a transaction value estimated at IDR 357.89 billion.

title: Astra car sales up 9% in February to over 41.24 thousand units
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) booked wholesale of cars of 41,240 units in February 2024, up 9% from the previous month, recording 37,984 units.

title: Join INCO, MIND ID to own 34% stake after rights issue
body: PT Mineral Industri Indonesia (Persero) (MIND ID) will become a joint controller with Vale Japan Limited (VCL) in PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) via a rights issue of 603.44 million shares.

title: LTLS profit hit a slump, down 49.86%
body: The performance of PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS) recorded shrinkage throughout 2023 compared to 2022. It slipped 49.86% year-on-year (yoy).

title: BRIS collected revenue of IDR 5.70 trillion, up 33.88%
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) bagged profit of IDR 5.70 trillion in 2023, 33.88% year-on-year (yoy) higher from 2022 profit of IDR 4.26 trillion.

title: DSNG to raise portion in REA Kaltim
body: PT Agro Pratama (AP), a subsidiary of PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG), has increased its portion by 20% to 35% in PT REA Kaltim Plantations.

title: Financial expenses swelled, MAHA saw 46.58% decline in profit
body: The profit of PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk (MAHA) shrank 46.58% year-on-year (yoy) due to increased financial expenses and unrealised loss of stock investment, despite its revenue soaring 20.45% yoy in 2023.

title: SHIP’s subsidiary to secure facility of USD 32.85 million from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Golden Benua Maritim (GBM), one of many subsidiaries of PT Sillomaritime Perdana Tbk (SHIP), has signed a credit facility agreement with PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Trisula Textile Industries to set up buyback, budget of IDR 30 billion
body: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL), will repurchase its shares (buyback) with a budget set to IDR 30 billion.

title: Oversubscribed, TPIA concludes Shelf-Registration Bond IV issuance
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA) has successfully issued Shelf-Registration Bond IV 2024 worth IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Sunday Ins to conclude KSK Insurance acquisition
body: Sunday Ins Holding (Sunday) has officially become the new controlling shareholder of PT KSK Insurance Indonesia.

title: SMGR reported profit of IDR 2.17 trillion, down 8.20%
body: PT Semen Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (SMGR) reported revenue surge of 6.24% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023. However, its net profit shrank 8.20% yoy from 2022.

title: PGAS’s net profit slipped 14.7% yoy
body: Despite the revenue surge, PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) reported a decline in its net profit in 2023.

title: Massive expansion pays off, Cinema XXI gains 18.9% revenue surge
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA), the managing company of Cinema XXI theatre network, recorded revenue surge of 18.9% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023 to IDR 5.2 trillion.

title: PPRE to seek 20% growth in new contract
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE) aims to score new contracts’ growth of 20% until the end of this year.

title: Panca Budi Idaman’s net profit grew 6% amidst declining sales
body: PT Panca Budi Idaman Tbk (PBID), a plastic packaging manufacturer and distributor, booked net profit of IDR 374.15 billion in 2023, up 6% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Continue to slipping this year, ASII at the bottom of top 10 market cap
body: The market capitalisation of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) arrived at the bottom level of the top 10 market cap in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) as of February 2024.

title: Apexindo Pratama to convert bonds worth IDR 1.63 trillion to shares
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX), an oil-and-gas and coal mining supporting service provider, will issue a capital increase without pre-emptive rights.

title: Foreign buy volume is higher, with a net foreign surplus of 455.10 million shares
body: On Friday, March 8, foreign investors purchased shares, totaling 2.54 billion shares. With a foreign sales volume of around 2.09 billion shares, net foreign volume ended up with a surplus of 455.10 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares purchased, totaling 804.30 million with a net volume of 353.64 million.

title: Batavia Prosperindo Internasional to set up stock split with 1:20 ratio
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) will initiate the stock split with 1:20 ratio to increase its stock liquidity.

title: United Tractors acquires geothermal company for IDR 1.26 trillion
body: JAKARTA. PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) through its subsidiary, PT Energia Prima Nusantara (EPN), has acquired a geothermal power plant company called PT Supreme Energy Rantau Dedap (SERD).

title: UOB pairs up with Garuda Indonesia to introduce GIUC card
body: PT Bank UOB Indonesia joins hands with PT Garuda Indonesia Tbk (GIAA) and Mastercard to introduce Garuda Indonesia UOB Credit Card (GIUC), which combines the perks of credit card spending and rewards from mileage system.

title: Four new investors acquire shares of Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama (AKKU)
body: PT Anugerah Kagum Karya Utama Tbk (AKKU), a business engaged in general goods and services trading, welcomed four new investors on Wednesday, March 6.

title: ARKO’s net profit dropped 25.79%
body: Throughout 2023, the profit of PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (ARKO) declined 25.79% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 39.10 billion from IDR 52.66 billion in 2022, the year in which ARKO debuted in the board.

title: Foreign transaction rises: net foreign volume closed at -843.78 million shares
body: Foreign buying and selling volumes rose on Thursday, March 7, compared to the previous trading day. Foreign investors bought a total of 4.20 billion shares, while they sold 5.04 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -843.78 million shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) was ranked first on the top sell list, with shares sold totaling 2.80 billion and a net volume of -668.87 million.

title: ADHI’s profit soared 163%, scoring IDR 214 billion
body: Net profit of PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) reportedly increased 163% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 214 billion in 2023 from the net profit in 2022 of IDR 81.24 billion.

title: Losses worsened, Sepatu Bata divests assets for IDR 64 billion
body: PT Sepatu Bata Tbk (BATA) has divested its assets, in the form of land and building in South Jakarta titled Graha Bata, with transaction value of IDR 64 billion.

title: Indonesian gov't to seek IDR 24 trillion in next week's SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Securities (SUN) next Wednesday (13/3), with an indicative target of IDR 24 trillion.

title: VKTR's net profit dropped 89% due to high operational expenses
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR), Bakrie Group's electric vehicle (EV) trading and manufacturing company, reported net profit of IDR 5.43 billion throughout 2023.

title: Indodana Finance to work with BTPN to extend service range
body: PT Indodana Multi Finance (Indodana Finance), a fintech company formerly known as Triprima Multifinance, announced its latest partnership with PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) to expand the scope of its service.

title: Focusing on commercial and SMEs, PermataBank to aim credit growth of 7% to 9%
body: After scoring slight increase in credit in 2023, PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) sets up a moderate target for its credit growth in 2024 of 7% to 9%.

title: Lontar Papyrus offers IDR 1.17 trillion bonds with highest coupon of 11.25%
body: PT Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper Industry, a pulp and tissue producer owned by the Sinarmas Group, will issue Shelf Registration Bonds II Phase III/2024 with a principal amount of IDR 1.17 trillion.

title: Zurich Assets now owns 6.74% of Estee Gold Feet (EURO) after purchasing 171 million shares
body: By acquiring 171.78 million shares through PT Danatama Makmur Sekuritas on Tuesday, March 5, foreign investor Zurich Assets International Ltd. became a new investor in PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO). This investor currently owns 6.74% of the company that provides aerosol filling services.

title: BUMA secures facility to pay off loans
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), obtained an approval regarding the amendment and the transfer of loan facility from two of its creditors, PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) and PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Foreign buy volume almost hit 4 billion shares, with a net foreign surplus of 36.65 million shares
body: Foreign buying volume on Wednesday, March 6, nearly approached 4 billion shares, or 3.90 billion shares to be exact. With a foreign sales volume of 3.86 billion shares, net foreign ended up with a 36.65 million-share surplus. The purchase of 147.46 million shares of coal mining company PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), for a net volume of 120.58 million shares, began the list of share purchase transactions.

title: Sukuk auction slows down, incoming bids stuck on IDR 17.05 trillion
body: The incoming bids in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk last Monday (5/3) hit IDR 17.05 trillion, 14.2% year-on-year (yoy) lower than the incoming bids recorded on February 20, 2024, which reached IDR 19.88 trillion.

title: As foreign sales volume increases, net foreign volume falls to -331.52 million.
body: Foreign investors increased their share sale transactions on Tuesday, March 5, resulting in a foreign sell volume of 3.46 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume totaled only 3.13 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -331.52 million. The largest share transaction was made with the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 1.15 billion shares with a net volume of -193.72 million.

title: Permata Bank to boost its fee-based income this year
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI), widely known as PermataBank, aims to secure revenue increase through its fee-based income growth in 2023. As of 2023, PermataBank reported 16% contribution from fee-based income to its total revenue.

title: Revenue soared, Cisarua Mountain Dairy’s net profit hit 17% growth
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY) booked net profit of IDR 1.24 trillion throughout 2023, growing 17% year-on-year (yoy), driven by its quite solid performance in its revenue.

title: Bakrie Group’s oil and gas company discovers new natural gas source worth IDR 1.57 trillion
body: EMP Bentu Limited, a subsidiary of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), the operator and full owner of interest participation of Bentu Block, has reportedly discovered a new gas-in-place source of 126 billion cubic feet from its drilling activity in CEN-01 gas well.

title: WIKA to hold general meeting for Sukuk Mudharabah Phase I 2020
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) will hold its fourth General Meeting of Sukuk Holders (GMSU) related to Shelf Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I Phase I 2020 on April 4, 2024.

title: GPF sells over a billion shares of GoTo Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO)
body: While shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) are regularly sold by GOTO Peopleverse Fund, on Monday, March 4, this investor sold an incredible quantity of shares. Its ownership dropped from 5.28% to 5.19% as a result of releasing more than 1.05 billion GOTO shares.

title: FWD to raise portion in BRI Life
body: FWD Management Holding, an insurance company from Hong Kong, raises its ownership portion in PT Asuransi BRI Life (BRI Life) to 43.96%.

title: BEKS gained profit of IDR 26.59 billion
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Banten Tbk (BEKS) managed to turn the tide, scoring profit of IDR 26.59 billion in 2023, improving from 2022’s loss of IDR 239.28 billion.

title: TCPI secures IDR 15 billion for floating barge service
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) obtains a contract of floating barge service for temporary storage of oil fuel in LTT Bengalon Port, East Kalimanan, worth IDR 15 billion.

title: T. Permadi Rachmat now owns 5.12% of Adi Sarana (ASSA) after purchasing 188 million shares
body: An individual investor, T. Permadi Rachmat, began the month of March by purchasing 188.84 million shares of PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) on Friday, March 3. He completed this transaction through the securities of PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk and PT Bahana Sekuritas, which promptly transferred ownership of 5.12% of the issuer that provided transportation and logistics services to him.

title: PPRE’s profit slipped 20.38%
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE) recorded net profit of IDR 80.21 billion throughout 2023, down 20.38% from the profit in 2022 of IDR 100.75 billion.

title: Doubling income, BBYB still at loss of IDR 573 billion
body: Despite the report of 100% growth in revenue, PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) still failed to score net profit at the end of December 2023 and must be satisfied with a loss of IDR 573 billion.

title: Up 21.12%, Adira Finance bagged IDR 1.94 trillion of profit
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) reportedly secured net profit of IDR 1.94 trillion throughout 2023, increasing 21.12% from the net profit in 2022 of IDR 1.60 trillion.

title: Bank Mega to ready 70% of net profit as dividend, hitting IDR 2 T
body: Shareholders of PT Bank Mega Tbk (MEGA) agreed upon cash dividend distribution plan worth IDR 2.46 trillion for the fiscal year 2023, taken out of the net profit of IDR 3.51 trillion.

title: Save for gold, Antam to aim commodity production increase in 2024
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM), a mining company listed as member of MIND ID, reveals its commodity production and sales target in 2024.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama readies rights issue of 8.65 billion shares for IDR 3.62 trillion
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) will initiate the capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as a rights issue, by offering 8.56 billion new shares.

title: Credit grew 22.7%, Bank Nationalnobu’s profit hit IDR 141.5 billion
body: PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk (NOBU) reported fantastic growth in credit distribution, revenue, as well as net profit in 2023.

title: Commercial insurance industry’s assets reach IDR 903.07 trillion
body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK) reveals that the assets of commercial insurance industry had reached IDR 903.07 trillion in January 2024.

title: SGER’s hydrogen peroxide plant of USD 50 million to enter construction stage
body: The construction of hydrogen peroxide plant owned by PT Sumber Global Energy Tbk (SGER) has reportedly entered the construction stage.

title: Skyrocketing revenue boosted DRMA's net profit by 57.6% in 2023
body: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk (DRMA), an automotive spare part and component manufacturer, reported skyrocketing net profit in 2023, soaring 57.6% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 625.5 billion in December 2023.

title: BNI sets up dividend 42.68% higher to IDR 10.45 trillion
body: Shareholders of PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) agreed upon cash dividend allocation for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 10.45 trillion during the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) yesterday (4/3).

title: PTPP attributed net profit to parent entity of IDR 481.36 billion
body: The performance PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) has consistently grown within these past three years.

title: Diagnos Laboratorium reported its first loss since debut
body: PT Diagnos Laboratorium Utama Tbk (DGNS), a medical laboratory service provider under PT Bundamedik Tbk (BMHS), booked a loss of IDR 13.65 billion in 2023.

title: Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares accounted for 53% of foreign sell; net foreign volume is -355.29 million shares
body: On Monday, March 4, foreign investors were selling large amounts of shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). GOTO shares were sold for 1.79 billion shares, or approximately 53.71% of total foreign sales volume, for a net volume of -261.62 million shares. The foreign sell volume this time was 3.34 billion shares, while the foreign buy was 2.99 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -355.29 million shares.

title: Dunia Virtual Online to offer 510 million shares in IPO
body: PT Dunia Virtual Online Tbk (AREA), a data centre provider, will issue its initial public offering (IPO) of 510 million shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: BRI to distribute remaining dividend IDR 35.43 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) will channel out the remaining amount of final dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 35.43 trillion.

title: Down 51.42%, PTBA collected profit of IDR 6.10 trillion
body: The profit of PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) reportedly declined as far as 51.42% year-on-year (yoy) throughout 2023, resulting from revenue slippage of 9.75% and a higher cost of revenue.

title: Temas’s net profit slipped 42.62% yoy
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a logistic and transportation company with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, recorded net profit of IDR 782.6 billion in 2023, dropping 42.62% year-on-year (yoy).

title: BJBR to channel IDR 116.3 trillion of credits in 2023, profit down by 25%
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) reported significant shrinkage in its net profit by 25% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.7 trillion at the end of 2023.

title: NICE opened the week with 23.49% surge to top gainers
body: At the closing bell today (4/3), PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) was seen arriving at ID 920 per share, increasing 23.49% from the closing bell on last Friday (1/3) of IDR 745 per share.

title: Bagging IDR 6.79 trillion, JSMR reported 147.37% surge in profit
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) booked revenue of IDR 21.31 trillion in 2023, soaring 299.36% from IDR 16.58 trillion seen in the same period in 2022.

title: SCCO to stock split at 1:4 ratio
body: Shareholders of PT Supreme Cable Manufacturing & Commerce Tbk (SCCO) agree upon the stock split plan with a ratio of 1:4, meaning that 1 share will be split into 4 shares with the same value.

title: Promoting film industry, Jababeka to launch Movieland set catalogue
body: PT Jababeka Tbk (KIJA), the developer of Jababeka industrial zone, has introduced Movieland catalogue, featuring 30 movie shooting locations to accommodate the needs of film and television industry in Indonesia.

title: Telkom to transfer data centre business for USD 219 million to NeutraDC Singapore
body: Telekomunikasi Indonesia Pte. Ltd. (TelinSG), a subsidiary of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM), has reportedy sold its data centre business to NeutraDC Singapore Pte. Ltd. (NDSG).

title: Stock-based plan dominates unit-linked life insurance products
body: The stock-based unit-linked insurance plan, also known as stock-based unit-linked products become the most developed product within the industry.

title: Boy Thohir amd two new investors purchase billions of shares of Essa Industries (ESSA)
body: On Thursday, February 29, businessman Garibaldi Thohir, also known as Boy Thohir, acquired 1.47 billion shares in PT Essa Industries Indonesia Tbk (ESSA). Boy's ownership of the LPG and ammonia refinery companies increased from 5.55% to 14.14% as a result of this spending. Two new investors also purchased a significant amount of ESSA shares this time around. PT Akraya International purchased 1.29 billion shares, or the equivalent of 7.5% ownership. Subsequently, 1.20 billion ESSA shares were purchased by individual investor T. Permadi Rachmat, giving him a final ownership stake of 7.02%.

title: Life insurance’s mutual fund assets down to IDR 78.2 trillion
body: The mutual fund assets in Indonesian life insurance industry continued to decline. Within the past 3 years, they have shrunk by 52.71%.

title: Bank Tabungan Negara is projected to share dividend of IDR 700 billion
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara (Persero) Tbk (BBTN), a state-owned bank, is predicted to set up cash dividend distribution of IDR 700 billion, which will be taken out of its 2023 net profit.

title: Elnusa to set up capex of IDR 526 billion to drive business growth
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA), a subsidiary of PT Pertamina Hulu Energi (PHE) integrated in the sub-holding of upstreaming business of Pertamina, prepares capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 526 billion this year.

title: PANI booked 96.76% surge to IDR 273 billion of profit
body: The performance of PT Pantai Indak Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) has soared high, sporting revenue growth of 274% and profit growth of 96.76% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023.

title: Buana Finance to obtain another IDR 765 billion facility from Bank Danamon
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a consumer financing company listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) since 1990, has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 765 billion from PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN).

title: BWPT’s profit skyrocketed 912.84% in 2023
body: Despite the slowing down in the revenue throughout 2023, the net profit of PT Eagle High Plantations Tbk (BWPT) reported a 912.84% upturn from its performance in 2022.

title: Production thrives, PGEO saw 28% profit surge
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), an entity under Pertamina Group engaged in the geothermal energy industry, reported 28% year-on-year (yoy) profit surge at the end of 2023 to USD 163.57 million.

title: Share buying and selling transactions are slightly different; net foreign volume is almost 75 million pieces in surplus
body: On Friday, March 1, foreign share buying and selling transactions were not much different, at around 2 billion shares each. The foreign buying volume was 2.12 billion shares, whereas the foreign selling volume was 2.04 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume stood at 74.99 million shares. The most purchased shares this time were those of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with approximately 708.84 million shares and a net volume of 179.57 million shares.

title: Closing the weekend, ARII shares climbs top gainers
body: PT Atlas Resources Tbk (ARII) shares rose 24.76% until the close of transactions, which put this issuer at the top of the Top Gainers on Friday (1/3).

title: ROTI’s net profit down arrived at IDR 333.29 billion, down 22.88%
body: The performance of PT Nippon Indosari Corporindo Tbk (ROTI) declined in 2023, sporting revenue and profit decrease of 2.92% and 22.88% year-on-year (yoy) each.

title: HEAL to increase capex by 67%, mostly allocated to hospital expansion
body: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the managing company of Hermina hospital network, is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of approximately IDR 2 trillion for 2024.

title: Ifishdeco to keep supporting a struggling subsidiary with IDR 6.4 billion capital
body: PT Ifishdeco Tbk (IFSH), a nickel mining company with total land concession of over 3 thousand hectares, has channelled extra capital of IDR 6.4 billion to its subsidiary, PT Patrindo Jaya Makmur (PJM).

title: Japfa saw 34.5% decline in net profit, the lowest since 2021
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA) booked net profit of IDR 929.72 billion throughout 2023, down 34.5% year-on-year (yoy) or from 2022, due to increased operational expenses.

title: Two issuers welcome Trukindo Persada as a new investor
body: PT Trukindo Persada Sejahtera acquired 208.98 million shares of cosmetics and home equipment manufacturer PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) and 108.91 million shares of sector consulting services issuer mining and energy PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA) on Wednesday, February 28. This made PT Trukindo Persada Sejahtera a new investor in these two issuers. It currently holds 8.2% of EURO through purchases conducted by PT Lotus Andalan Sekuritas and PT KB Valbury Sekuritas. In addition, this investor bought shares through five different securities firms, giving him control over 10.9% of ITMA.

title: Over 7.5 billion shares were purchased; the net foreign volume was 629 million shares in surplus
body: At the end of February, the total number of shares purchased by foreign investors reached amazing heights.
