International buyers acquired 7.57 billion shares and sold roughly 6.94 billion on Thursday, February 29. This time, the net foreign volume remained in surplus at 629.46 million shares, even though the sales volume was also quite substantial. Around 2.72 billion shares of technology issuer PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the shares with the highest purchase volume, and its net volume was almost 600 million shares. Additionally, a sizeable amount of PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) shares were bought, totaling 1.60 billion shares with a net volume of 103.95 million.

title: EXCL bagged profit of IDR 1.28 trillion
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) collected current year’s net profit of IDR 1.28 trillion in 2023, up approximately 1.45% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 1.21 trillion in 2022.

title: February inflation reached 2.75%, BPS: triggered by rice price surge
body: Inflation in February 2024 soared 2.75% year-on-year (yoy) and 0.37% month-on-month (MoM), as stated in Indonesia Statistics (BPS) issued today (1/3).

title: ADRO to allocate capex of USD 700 million this year
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) is allocating capital expenditure (capex) of USD 600 to 700 million in 2024.

title: Multitrend Indo to transfer out 23.3 million treasury shares
body: PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY), a retailer of several child and infant products’ brands, will issue a sale of shares gained from a buyback or treasury stock sale of 23.3 million shares.

title: Up 34.62%, KICI becomes top gainers
body: Shares of PT Kedaung Indah Can Tbk (KICI) rose 34.62% until the closing bell in the afternoon on Thursday (29/2). This achievement pushed this can packaging producer issuer to reach the top of top gainers.

title: SIMP net profit slips 39%
body: PT Salim Ivomas Pratama Tbk (SIMP) recorded a 39% decline in net profit throughout 2023 due to the decline in the average price of palm oil products. CPO production volume fell 4% to 708 thousand tons and Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) fell 1% to 2.78 million tons.

title: Insurance to await BI’s decision before rebalancing investment fund
body: Insurance industry opts to direct investment funds to government securities (SBN) following the expectation of global interest rate decline in the next couple of months.

title: Declining 87.91%, ANJT bagged USD 2.62 million of net profit
body: he net profit of PT Astindo Nusantara Jaya Tbk (ANJT) significantly shrank 87.91% to USD 2.62 million throughout 2023 from the 2022 net profit of USD 21.72 million.

title: Divesting portion in GLVA, EPK to rake in IDR 11.33 billion
body: PT Elsiscom Prima Karya (EPK) collects fresh funds of IDR 11.33 billion after divesting 27.5 million of its shares in PT Galva Technologies Tbk (GLVA) in a series of transaction last week.

title: Two issuers gain fresh investment from Majukarya Mandiri
body: On Tuesday, February 27, PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia decided to purchase new shares from two different issuers. At first, this investor purchased 161.37 million shares of the cosmetics and home appliances manufacturer PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO). It gained control of 6.33% of the company through purchases conducted by three securities firms. Additionally, this investor purchased 62.18 million shares, or 6.22% control, in PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA), a consulting services provider for the mining and energy industries. This transaction was carried out via four distinct securities firms.

title: PNM to issue IDR 1.67 trillion bond for working capital boost
body: PT Permodalan Nasional Madani (PNM), a financing service company owned by PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), will issue Shelf-Registration Bond V Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 1.67 trillion.

title: More than 5 billion shares were bought and sold by foreigners, leaving a 40.85 million share net volume surplus
body: On Wednesday, February 28, there were more than 5 billion shares purchased and sold by foreigners. Specifically, 5.71 billion shares were purchased by foreign investors, and 5.67 billion shares were sold, leaving a small surplus of 40.85 million shares in the net foreign volume.

title: Foreign selling volume surges: net foreign volume falls drastically to -1.12 billion shares
body: On Tuesday, February 27, foreign investors were actively selling shares, making the foreign sales volume surge to around 4.15 billion shares. With foreign buying volume at only 3.02 billion shares, net foreign volume dropped dramatically to -1.12 billion shares. As on the previous day, the most sold shares were those of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with 2.09 billion shares sold and a net volume of -1.04 billion shares.

title: BRI reigns supreme in profitability among jumbo banks in 2023
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), one of the big four banks with market capitalisations of over IDR 100 trillion, reported the highest net profit among others in 2023.

title: Maybank Indonesia saw 18.5% profit growth to IDR 1.74 trillion in 2023
body: PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII), a private bank with total assets of IDR 171.8 trillion, booked net profit of IDR 1.74 trillion in 2023.

title: IKN projects prompt growth in general insurance premium
body: General Insurance Association of Indonesia (AAUI) reported that Nusantara Capital City (IKN) projects have triggered surge in industry premium in 2023.

title: FIRE arrived at top gainers
body: The stock price of PT Alfa Energi Investama Tbk (FIRE) shifted IDR 28 higher at yesterday’s (28/2) closing bell.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama to issue jumbo bond, eyeing IDR 1.25 trillion
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM), an investment holding company of Saratoga Group, will issue the Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase II Year 2024 worth IDR 1.25 trillion.

title: Panca Mitra Multiperdana to issue 258.83 million shares in private placement
body: PT Panca Mitra Multi Perdana Tbk (PMMP), a company engaged in shrimp processing and wholesale trading industry, will issue a capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as a private placement.

title: Wood segment faced downturn, DSNG's profit down 30% in 2023
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG), a palm plantation and wood manufacturing company, reported net profit of IDR 841.7 billion in 2023, which was 30% lower than IDR 1,2 trillion set in 2022.

title: Foreign investors, including GOTO Peopleverse Fund, are actively selling shares
body: Monday, February 26, which marked the beginning of the final week of February, was signalled by foreign investors who were busy selling shares on the stock market. Starting with the sale of 28.42 million shares of technology issuer PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) by GOTO Peopleverse Fund, it was followed by DB Spore SES CLT A/C For NTAsian Discovery Master Fund which sold 13.37 million shares of financing issuer PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN). Furthermore, 3.50 million shares of PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL), a provider of telecommunication infrastructure, were sold by Citibank Singapore S/A on behalf of the Government of Singapore.

title: 1.18 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares are sold up, and net foreign volume falls to -495.94 million
body: On Monday, February 26, foreign investors sold the most shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). A total of 1.18 billion GOTO shares were sold, for a net volume of -580.47 million. This share sale contributed to the foreign sale volume, which totaled 3.13 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buy volume was only 2.64 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -495.94 million shares.

title: INDY gains strength on the board after subsidiaries completed divestment
body: The stock price of PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) was seen increasing two days after this company concluded the sale of subsidiaries’ shares yesterday (26/2).

title: GGRM’s subsidiary to manage Kediri-Tulungagung Toll Road
body: PT Surya Sapta Agung Tol (SSAT), a subsidiary of PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), officially becomes the Business Operational Unit for Kediri-Tulungagung Toll Road for the next 50 years.

title: Gov’t to schedule state sukuk auction of IDR 12 trillion next week
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion next Tuesday (5/3).

title: AKRA to put in another IDR 130 billion investment on domestic shipping business
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has allocated extra capital worth IDR 130 billion to PT AKR Sea Transport (AST), a subsidiary engaged in the domestic shipping business.

title: AVIA reported 17.35% profit growth in 2023
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) booked net profit attributable to the parent entity of IDR 1.64 trillion in 2023, increasing 17.35% from the 2022 net profit of IDR 1.4 trillion.

title: Tiktok acquiring 75% Tokopedia: GOTO’s gain or loss?
body: After becoming the public’s hot topic since late 2023, PT GOTO Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) finally sent official words regarding the acquisition of Tokopedia by the giant video platform from China, Tiktok.

title: Hitting a slump, ESSA’s net profit down 75.06%
body: The performance of PT ESSA Industries Indonesia Tbk (ESSA) tumbled down throughout 2023, compared to impressive record it set in 2022.

title: Jaya Ancol to share dividend of IDR 51.19 billion, up 10.34%
body: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 51.19 billion for the fiscal year 2023, growing 10.34% from 2022 dividend of IDR 46.39 billion.

title: Pertamina Geothermal Energy to carry out MESOP worth IDR 163.3 billion
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), a subsidiary of PT Pertamina (Persero) engages in the geothermal power plant business, will initiate its Management and Employee Stock Option Program (MESOP) Phase I worth IDR 163.3 billion.

title: Price went up 13.60%, Indosat to issue 20,900 treasury shares
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT), a telecommunication service company controlled by Ooredoo Hutchison Asia Pte. Ltd., will sell the shares repurchased in a buyback.

title: Revenue slowing down, Golden Eagle Energy’s profit slipped 32.5%
body: PT Golden Eagle Energy Tbk (SMMT), a coal mining company under Geo Energy Resources from Singapore, recorded net profit of IDR 244.44 billion throughout 2023.

title: SUN auction today reaches IDR61.04 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the auction of Government Securities (SUN) on Tuesday (27/2) today reached IDR 61.04 trillion, according to the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Insurance companies prefer to invest in SBN
body: The life insurance industry recorded total investment assets placed in government securities (SBN) reaching IDR 182.23 trillion. This amount is equivalent to 33.67% of the assets of the insurance industry incorporated in the Indonesian Life Insurance Association (AAJI).

title: Astra net profit jumps 17%, ready to distribute dividend IDR 421 per share
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) recorded a consolidated net profit of IDR 33.84 trillion by the end of 2023. The growth in profit performance was dominated by the infrastructure and logistics, financial services, and automotive business lines.

title: BBN becomes KETR's new controller
body: PT Bahtera Bintang Nusantara (BBN) will become the new indirect controller of PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk (KETR) after the mandatory tender of 300,979,000 shares.

title: Bank Sumut to set up dividend of IDR 592.06 billion
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Sumatera Utara (BSMT) plans a distribution of cash dividend of IDR 592.06 billion or 80% of total net profit in 2023 of IDR 740.07 billion.

title: UNTR’s profit down 3.75% to IDR 22.13 trillion
body: The revenue of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) grew 4.02% year-on-year (yoy), but the profit slowed down 3.75% yoy throughout 2023.

title: Fibre optic idle, IBST and MORA enter affiliate transaction
body: PT Inti Bangun Sejahtera Tbk (IBST) is initiating an affiliate transaction with PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA) or Moratelindo regarding sale and purchase of fibre optic worth IDR 15.7 billion.

title: Life insurance premium hit IDR 177.66 trillion in 2023, down 7.1%
body: Indonesian Life Insurance Association (AAJI) recorded insurance premium of all industry players reaching IDR 177.66 trillion throughout 2023. This premium income was 7.1% lower than the same period in 2022.

title: Operating expenses soar, Matahari's net profit slumps 51.2%
body: The net profit of PT Matahari Department Store Tbk (LPPF), a retail company owned by the Lippo Group, fell by 51.2% throughout 2023 due to high operating expenses.

title: Bakrie Kalila Investment released 721 million shares of Energi Mega (ENRG), reducing its stake to 32%
body: PT Bakrie Kalila Investment released its ownership of 721.15 million shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), an issuer involved in the exploration and trading of oil and gas, on Friday, February 23. PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk and PT RHB Sekuritas Indonesia were the two securities companies used in the share sale, which resulted in an instant decrease in Bakrie Kalila's ownership percentage from 35.67% to 32.76%.

title: Citra Borneo Utama secured credit facility of IDR 1 trillion from BRI
body: PT Citra Borneo Utama Tbk (CBUT), the issuer engaged in the downstream process of palm refinery sector, has obtained a credit facility from PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) or BRI worth IDR 1 trillion.

title: Stock dropped 12.21% in a year, Japfa decides on shares buyback of IDR 350 billion
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA), an animal feed and processed food manufacturer, will issue a shares buyback with a budget set to IDR 350 billion.

title: PCC rules Judicial Release in favour of GIHF
body: Paris Commercial Court (PCC) has ruled on the Judicial Release in favour of Garuda Indonesia Holiday France S.AS (GIHF) for the appeal submitted by Greylag Goose Leasing 1410 and 1446 Designated Activity Company (Greylag Entities).

title: Gov’t claims spot as Vale’s controller, 5 to enter management
body: The Indonesian government, through state-owned holding of mining, MIND ID, has signed a sales and purchase agreement (SPA) regarding the 14% divestment of PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) last Monday (26/2).

title: Foreign selling volume increases: net foreign volume closed at minus 856.25 million shares
body: Foreign investors increased their share-selling activities on Friday, February 23, with a foreign selling volume of 3.26 billion shares sold. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume was only 2.41 billion shares, with net foreign closing at -856.25 million shares. The greatest share sale was done to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), where foreign investors sold up to 1.32 billion shares for a net volume of -773.89 million shares.

title: BRI to issue Green Bonds of IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) will issue Shelf-Registration Green Bond I Phase III Year 2024 worth IDR 2.5 trillion on March 7-8, 2024.

title: CAKK earns IDR 36.22 billion from land sale in Karawang
body: PT Cahayaputra Asa Keramik Tbk (CAKK) received IDR 36.22 billion from the sale of 97,905 m2 of vacant land in Ciampel, Karawang, West Java.

title: Revenue skyrocketed 126.73%, ACST managed to press losses
body: PT Acset Indonusa Tbk (ACST) suppressed losses throughout 2023 due to a 126.73% jump in revenue from 2022.

title: Mandiri (BMRI) now a minority shareholder in Inhealth Insurance
body: PT Bahana Pembinaan Usaha Indonesia (Persero) or known as Indonesia Financial Group (IFG) ensures that PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk remains a minority shareholder in PT Asuransi Jiwa Inhealth Indonesia (Mandiri Inhealth).

title: Woori Bank Korea ready to pour IDR 3.6 trillion fresh funds in SDRA rights issue
body: Woori Bank Korea has expressed its willingness to take part in the rights issue held by PT Bank Woori Saudara 1906 Tbk (SDRA).

title: Samindo Resources took an 83% stake in Transkon Jaya (TRJA) after purchasing 148 million shares
body: PT Samindo Resources Tbk, the company that owns the majority of PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA), increased its hold on this car rental issuer by acquiring an additional 148.09 million shares. As a result of this deal, which was carried out by PT Mirae Asset Sekuritas Indonesia, Samindo's ownership percentage rose from 74% to 83.81%. Additionally, PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa Tbk (RALS), the issuer that runs supermarkets and department stores, commenced another share buyback, this time for 3.70 million shares.

title: Jhon Veter now owns 5.11% of Pulau Subur (PTPS) after purchasing 110 million shares
body: On Wednesday, February 21, individual investor Jhon Veter Firdaus Reagan acquired 110.82 million PT Pulau Subur Tbk (PTPS) shares. With this purchase, he immediately controls 5.11% of the issuer in the palm oil industry. The securities company facilitating this transaction was PT Ciptadana Sekuritas Asia.

title: ASGR pocketed IDR 141 billion in profit
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk's (ASGR) profit soared 45% to IDR 141 billion throughout 2023 from its profit in 2022 of IDR 97.07 billion. The increase in profit was driven by revenue growth and financial income.

title: Foreign buying volume hits 2.86 billion shares; net foreign volume is 418.49 million shares surplus
body: On Thursday, February 22, share purchases by foreign investors resulted in a foreign purchase volume of 2.86 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sales volume was only 2.44 billion shares, which then generated a net foreign volume of 418.49 million shares. On the top buy list, shares of the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) ranked first after 248.42 million shares were purchased, for a net volume of 230.35 million.

title: Hexindo Adiperkasa booked 25.3% growth, profit rose to USD 43.8 million
body: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk (HEXA), a heavy equipment trading and rental company, scored net profit of USD 43.8 million in 2023, increasing 25.3% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Setting up an LNG station, CGAS invests IDR 161.5 billion
body: PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS) will put in investment worth IDR 161.5 billion to build an LNG station with a capacity of 1.5 million standard cubic feet per day (MMSCFD).

title: IFG to acquire 70% of Mandiri Inhealth from Bank Mandiri and Kimia Farma
body: PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) and PT Kimia Farma Tbk (KAEF) officially divested their portions in PT Asuransi Jiwa Inhealth Indonesia (Mandiri Inhealth), equal to 70%, to PT Asuransi Jiwa IFG (IFG Life).

title: GIAA to be consolidated to InJourney
body: The Ministry of State-Owned Enterprises (SOEs) is known to review the plan of incorporating PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA), as a subsidiary, to PT Aviasi Pariwisata Indonesia (InJourney), a state-owned holding in the aviation and tourism sector.

title: AKRA to prepare several strategies to boost 2024 performance
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), an oil and gas distributor company with the highest market capitalisation, has set up several strategies to further bolster its business performance this year.

title: Revenue strengthened, BFIN’s net profit slipped 9% in 2023
body: Although its revenue grew by a double digit, PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) failed to record the same win for its net profit at the end of 2023, booking net profit of only IDR 1.6 trillion or 9% year-on-year (yoy) decrease.

title: Autopedia Sukses Lestari to form a pawnbroker company, investing IDR 2.5 billion
body: PT Autopedia Sukses Lestari Tbk (ASLC), an auction and used car inspection, has allocated IDR 2.5 billion of fresh funds to introduce the latest subsidiary called PT Autopedia Gadai Jabar (AGJ).

title: Nippon Indosari Corpindo to offer 38.9 million treasury shares
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI) will carry out the transfer of treasury stock consisting of 38,908,000 shares gained from the buyback that has taken place for the past two years.

title: BPII to receive dividend income of IDR 49.24 billion
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) bagged dividend income of IDR 49.24 billion for the fiscal year 2023 from its subsidiary, PT Batavia Prosperindo Aset Manajemen (BPAM).

title: Indorama booked loss of USD 40.8 million
body: The performance of PT Indorama Synthetics Tbk (INDR) saw a downturn compared to last year of profit.

title: Japan in recession, Indonesia to rethink on Samurai Bond release
body: The Indonesian government is currently re-reviewing the plan of issuance of Yen-denominated bond, or Samurai Bonds, amidst the recession in Japan.

title: Govt to hold another SUN auction next week, aiming for IDR 24 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold a Government Securities (SUN) auction on Thursday (29/2) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 24 trillion.

title: TUGU optimistic on underwriting income increase
body: Comprehensive profit of PT Asuransi Tugu Pratama Indonesia Tbk (TUGU) has soared over 200% year-on-year (yoy) in December 2023 (unaudited) to IDR 1.29 trillion.

title: Good news for Astra following electric car incentive from gov't
body: The Indonesian government will give incentives for electric cars, as stated in Regulation of the Ministry of Finance (PMK) No. 8/2024 regarding the Government-Borne Value Added Tax (PPN DTP) of Electric Cars.

title: Telkomsat investing IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2, Jasindo gives full coverage
body: PT Asuransi Jasa Indonesia (Jasindo) confirmed that the investment value of total IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2 will be fully covered by the company.

title: Bukaka Teknik to establish new subsidiary in Oman, investing IDR 122 billion
body: PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), through one of its subsidiaries, PT Bukaka Mega Investama, has formed a new subsidiary called Bukaka International LLC in Oman.

title: Domestic car sales decline, AUTO’s net profit still grew 38.9% in 2023
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO) booked net profit of IDR 1.84 trillion in 2023, up 38.9% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Telkom spent IDR 3.5 trillion for Satelit Merah Putih 2
body: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) has invested IDR 3.5 trillion through one of its subsidiaries, PT Telkom Satelit Indonesia (Telkomsat), to develop Satelit Merah Putih 2 launched last Wednesday (21/2).

title: AALI’s profit dropped 38.84%
body: The performance of PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) weakened in 2023 compared to 2022.

title: Down 22.72%, ARNA’s net profit arrived at IDR 445.29 billion
body: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA) booked net profit of IDR 445.29 billion throughout 2023, down 22.72% from 2022 net profit of IDR 581.55 billion.

title: Net foreign volume stays in the green zone at 276.16 million shares
body: On Wednesday, February 21, foreign net volume appeared to stay in the green zone, at approximately 276.16 million shares. This number represents the difference between foreign buying volume (3.11 billion shares) and foreign selling volume (2.83 billion shares).

title: Fitch estimates 70% sharia units of insurance to spin off
body: Fitch Ratings estimates only 70% of sharia business units of insurance currently existing will remain standing following the new policy of capital requirement and spin-off to become a full fledge unit.

title: IMR Asia Holding to acquire 83% Fortune Indonesia's shares
body: IMR Asia Holding Pte. Ltd, a holding company registered in Singapore, plans to acquire 83% of the shares of PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk (FORU).

title: BTPN eyes IDR 6.73 trillion in rights issue, SMBC and BCA to take part
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) will carry out a capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue, of 2.58 billion shares.

title: Holding a private placement, SLJ Global (SULI) welcomes new investors
body: PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI), the issuer in the forestry and wood industry sector, conducted a private placement of 1,326,481,737 new shares. On Monday, February 20, market hints showed the moves of three new SULI investors who decided to participate in this corporate action. Mataram Limited was the first, having recently acquired 554.04 million shares via PT Binaartha Sekuritas, giving it a 10.25% ownership stake. Additionally, after purchasing 296.52 million SULI shares, PT Pelayaran Sentra Arung Makmur now owns 5.49% of the shares. PT Borneo Karya Persada is the next significant shareholder, having purchased 286.66 million shares, or 5.31% of the total.

title: Net foreign volume reaches 1.06 billion shares as foreign buy volume significantly surpasses foreign sell
body: Foreign investors' share-buy transactions kept increasing until Tuesday, February 20, when the volume of foreign purchases reached around 3.15 billion shares. This figure was significantly higher than the foreign sales volume, which was just about 2.09 billion shares. As a result, the net foreign volume reached a surplus of 1.06 billion shares. One of the factors contributing to the increase in foreign buying volume was the purchase of 1.03 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a net volume of 597.32 million shares.

title: Transcoal Pacific’s subsidiary to secure credit facility of IDR 1.34 trillion
body: PT Sentra Makmur Lines (SML), a subsidiary of PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) engaged in the shipping industry, has signed a credit facility agreement with one of state-owned banks.

title: Satu Visi Putra sets IPO price to IDR 120, aiming for IDR 73.8 billion
body: PT Satu Visi Putra Tbk (VISI), a wholesale trading company for advertising and printing industry, has set the price of its initial public offering (IPO) of IDR 120 per share.

title: Indomobil and VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas to accelerate EC adoption
body: PT IMG Sejahtera Langgeng (IMGSL), a subsidiary of PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), has signed a strategic partnership agreement with PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR).

title: ITMG’s profit shrank 58.33% in 2023
body: The net profit of PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) decreased 58.33% throughout 2023 compared to the same period in 2022. The decline of profit was driven by lower revenue.

title: Comparing assets of BRI, BNI, BCA, and Mandiri’s insurance subsidiaries
body: Banks with Core Capital over IDR 70 trillion or KBMI IV have insurance subsidiaries. Then, how huge is the contribution of insurance business in consolidated assets of jumbo banks?

title: Up 28.5% yoy, CIMB Niaga scored IDR 6.55 trillion of profit in 2023
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA), the private bank with the third highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, booked net profit of IDR 6.55 trillion in 2023, increasing 28.5% year-on-year (yoy).

title: GEMS’s subsidiary to secure facility of USD 7.5 million from Eximbank
body: PT Borneo Indobara (BIB) and PT Barasentosa Lestari (BSL), 2 subsidiaries owned by PT Golden Energy Mines Tbk (GEMS), has obtained a financing facility from Indonesia Eximbank of total USD 7.5 million.

title: After purchasing 405 million shares, Satya Mulia Gema currently owns 10.42% of Polychem (ADMG)
body: On Monday, February 19, PT Satya Mulia Gema Gemilang acquired 405.35 million shares of PT Polychem Indonesia Tbk (ADMG), a company that manufactures chemicals and polyester. This new investor received immediate control over 10.42% of the shares through this transaction, which was handled by PT Equity Sekuritas Indonesia. In addition, the department store issuer PT Ramayana Lestari Sentosa (RALS) initiated a further buyback action of 5.42 million shares, while PT Arthakencana Rayatama acquired 4.86 million shares of PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), which distributes fuel.

title: Jasindo Insurance covers risk for Merah Putih 2 Satellite
body: PT Asuransi Jasa Indonesia (Jasindo Insurance) became the risk management partner of Telkomsat's Merah Putih 2 Satellite, a subsidiary of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM).

title: One month after debut, these stocks successfully scale up
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) and PT Multi Spunindo Jaya Tbk (MSJA) were seen rising after making its debut in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Jokowi reshuffles cabinet again, installing 2 former armed forces
body: President of Republic of Indonesia, Joko Widodo (Jokowi), once again reshuffles its ministers by appointing 2 former personnels of Indonesian National Armed Forces (TNI) as Coordinating Minister of Political, Legal, and Security Affairs and Minister of Agrarian Affairs and Spatial Planning.

title: State sukuk auction recorded total bids of IDR 19.88 trillion
body: The total incoming bids submitted in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk yesterday (20/2) were recorded at IDR 19.88 trillion.

title: AHAP rose to top gainers
body: PT Asuransi Harta Aman Pratama Tbk (AHAP) recorded increase of 34.12% at the end of yesterday’s (20/2) trading session.

title: Buana Finance to secure credit facility of IDR 200 billion from Bank KEB Hana
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a consumer financing company, has obtained a term credit loan from PT Bank KEB Hana Indonesia.

title: IMPC to channel USD 1 million loan
body: PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC) disbursed USD 1 million loan to its subsidiary, Impack Vietnam Company Ltd (IVC), yesterday (19/2).

title: Insurance industry recorded IDR 320.88 trillion of premium in 2023
body: Financial Services Authority (OJK) recorded accumulated premium of IDR 320.88 trillion from the insurance sector in 2023.

title: Launching 3 new motorcycle models, Volta eyes 18 thousand units of sales and expansion in 2024
body: PT Volta Indonesia Semesta, a subsidiary of PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) engaged in the clean energy field, is eyeing an approximate of 64% growth in electric motorcycle sales to 18 thousand units at the end of 2024.

title: ARNA to allocate IDR 100 billion for buyback
body: PT Arwana Citra Mulia Tbk (ARNA) is allocating IDR 100 billion to repurchase shares (buyback) circulating in the market.

title: Only a month old, 5 stocks saw decline
body: Entering the board in January 2024, these five stocks were seen declining at the end of yesterday’s (19/2) closing bell. Their value varies from IDR 10 to IDR 100 per share.

title: Panin Sekuritas saw 47.5% slippage in net profit in 2023
body: PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk (PANS), a security company under Panin Bank group, booked net profit of IDR 130.42 billion in 2023.

title: Bank Mayapada and Skorcard to launch credit card for youth
body: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) has formed a partnership with PT Skorcard Teknologi Indonesia (Skorcard), a fintech company that offers a new experience for credit card users.

title: Kreasi Jasa acquires 34% of Petrosea shares by purchasing 342 million PTRO shares
body: On Friday, February 16, PT Kreasi Jasa Persada acquired 342,925,700 shares of PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) through PT Henan Putihrai Sekuritas, resulting in 34% stakes in the mining and oil and gas infrastructure. However, PT Caraka Reksa Optima, PTRO's previous controlling shareholder, actually sold the same number of shares, reducing its ownership from 68.9% to 34.9%.

title: The thin difference in foreign buying and selling volume results in a net foreign of 51.70 million shares
body: Foreign purchasing and selling volumes had a thin difference on Monday, February 19, as they had the day before. Foreign purchases of shares resulted in a foreign buying volume of approximately 3.48 billion shares. Foreign selling volume then totaled 3.43 billion shares, with net foreign closing at 51.70 million. The shares with the highest purchases belonged to the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), which was purchased for 167.93 million shares with a net volume of 155.73 million shares.

title: Trimegah Sekuritas purchases 1.22 billion Energi Mega Persada (ENRG) shares
body: The securities company PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk acquired up to 1,225,000,000 shares of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG) on Thursday, February 15. Trimegah Sekuritas saw an increase in share percentage from 7.86% to 12.8% as a result of this outstanding number of shares, which equates to 4.94% ownership. However, PT Bakrie Kalila Investment sold the same amount of shares, resulting in a decrease in its ownership from 40.61% to 35.67% of this issuer of oil and gas exploration and trading.

title: Opening the week, BBSS gain spot at top gainers
body: The stock of PT Bumi Benowo Sukses Sejahtera Tbk (BBSS) sat at the top of the gainers’ list at the end of yesterday’s (19/2) session.

title: Asep Sabanda to resign, now from ZATA and IPPE
body: Asep Sulaeman Sabanda (ASS) has resigned from his position as President Commissioner in two separate companies, PT Indo Pureco Pratama Tbk (IPPE) dan PT Bersama Zatta Jaya Tbk (ZATA).

title: Catering to youth, Ace Hardware to open Ataru outlet in Surabaya
body: PT Ace Hardware Indonesia Tbk (ACES) has reportedly opened one new outlet in Surabaya under the brand Ataru, designed to cater to the needs and lifestyle of young generation.

title: Uni-Charm Indonesia saw 38.6% profit surge amidst weakening revenue
body: PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk (UCID) managed to boost its net profit by up to 38.6% year-on-year (yoy) at the end of 2023 to IDR 434.57 billion although its revenue was corrected 0.7% yoy.

title: Herbal medicine sales saw a downturn, Sido Muncul’s profit down 13.95%
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), a pharmaceutical and herbal product manufacturer, booked net profit of IDR 950.64 billion in 2023, down 13.95% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Bank CIMB Niaga to buyback 202 thousand shares
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) will conduct a share buyback, with a budget of IDR 500 million.

title: BDMN scores IDR 3.5 trillion in profit
body: PT Bank Danamon Tbk (BDMN) printed a net profit of IDR 3.50 trillion throughout 2023, up 6.08% from the same period in 2022 of IDR 3.30 trillion.

title: Sompo Insurance Indonesia’s ownership shifts to Singapore
body: Sompo Holdings (Asia) Pte. Ltd will become the new controlling shareholder of PT Sompo Insurance Indonesia.

title: Boosting pipe production, SUNI to add IDR 152.81 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI) has invested IDR 152.81 billion in its subsidiary, PT Rainbow Tubulars Manufacture (RTM), in order to enhance its steel and iron pipe production capacity.

title: Divesting portions in NSSS, Resources Fortune rakes in IDR 84.12 billion
body: Resources Fortune Ltd (RF) secured IDR 84.12 billion after divesting 467.36 million of its shares in PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS) last week (15/2).

title: WSKT Realty restructures IDR 19 billion debt
body: PT Waskita Karya Realty (WSKT Realty), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), restructured its debt as much as IDR 19 billion. The restructuring agreement took place last week (12/2).

title: Vale Indonesia share divestment agreed at IDR3,750 per share
body: The Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM) said that the divestment plan of PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) shares owned by Vale Canada Limited (VCL) and Sumitomo Metal Mining Co. (SMM) to MIND ID, has reached a price agreement.

title: Empowering its agents, Manulife Indonesia holds Manulife Pro 2024
body: Manulife Indonesia, one of most renowned insurance companies in Indonesia, kicks off Manulife Pro 2024, an annual recognition program held for high-performing Life Planners of Manulife across Indonesia.

title: Polytama Propindo to hold series A sukuk buyback worth IDR 104 billion
body: PT Polytama Propindo (PLTM) will carry out the buyback of Sukuk Ijarah II Year 2021 Series A with a total principal of IDR 104 billion.

title: Newton Capital to take over BNGA loan in NETV
body: Newton Capital Ltd is taking over the syndicated loan from PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) and PT Bank Artha Graha Internasional Tbk (INPC) in PT Net Mediatama Televisi, a subsidiary of PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV).

title: Cemindo Gemilang to inject capital to cement company in Madagascar
body: PT Cemindo Gemilang Tbk (CMNT), through one of its subsidiaries, Cemindo Investments Pte. Ltd. (CIPL), has indirectly placed an investment in Alpha Ciment SA, a cement manufacturer from Madagascar.

title: CSRA to sign credit facility of IDR 390 billion from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Cisadane Sawit Raya Tbk (CSRA), an issuer engaged in the agriculture sector, has signed the credit facility worth IDR 390 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: CUAN to secure loan facility of IDR 1.35 trillion
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) has secured loan facility of IDR 1.35 trillion from PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI).

title: Share buying and selling transactions differ slightly; net foreign volume is at 26.47 million shares in surplus
body: On Friday, February 16, share buying and selling transactions done by foreign investors almost reached 3 billion shares each, with a foreign buy volume of 2.94 billion shares and a foreign sell volume of 2.92 million shares sold. As a result, net foreign volume stood at 26.47 million shares in surplus. The shares with the highest net volume belonged to the domestic and foreign shipping business PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), which had around 149.29 million shares after 156.87 million shares were purchased. Meanwhile, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) remain the most heavily traded, with 1.04 billion shares sold and a net volume of -408.37 million shares.

title: JCI remains in green zone throughout the day
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) strengthened in the green zone throughout trading Friday (16/2). The index opened at 7,343.53 at 09.00 West Indonesia Time (WIB) and at 15.35 WIB at 7,328.05.

title: Planning a new hospital, Mitra Keluarga sets up capex of IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk (MIKA), a healthcare provider, has set up a capital expenditure (capex) budget of approximately IDR 800 billion to IDR 1 trillion this year to support its strategy to expand its hospital network.

title: Post-IPO, Ayam Goreng Nelongso to aim 70% profit growth and cross-border expansion
body: PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk (BAIK), the owning company of Ayam Goreng Nelongso business, aims to score net profit growth of up to 70% year-on-year (yoy) in 2024 after conducting its initial public offering (IPO).

title: Up 25.51%, IIF scored IDR 104.15 billion of profit
body: PT Indonesia Infrastructure Finance (IIF) recorded 25.51% net profit surge to IDR 104.15 billion in 2023 from IDR 82.98 billion in 2022.

title: HUMI soared to top gainers
body: After the Election 2024, PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI) reportedly stopped PT Multikarya Asia Pasifik Karya Tbk (MKAP) from its consecutive reign as top gainers in the past two days.

title: Asep Sabanda sued for insolvency
body: Asep Sulaeman Sabanda (ASS), also known as the Sultan of Subang, faced a lawsuit of Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) in the Commercial Court of Central Jakarta District Court.

title: Arkora Hydro to put in investment of IDR 2.5 billion to new subsidiary
body: PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (ARKO), a renewable energy company established circa 2020, has invested IDR 2.5 billion to form a new subsidiary called PT Arkora Energi Mandiri (AEM).

title: GOTO on its merger issue with Grab Holdings
body: The management of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) finally responds to the issue of merger with Grab Holdings, which has been circulated for the past month.

title: Bakrie Media Group faced temporary PKPU lawsuit
body: PT Laras Nugraha Cipta (LNC) has filed a suspension of debt payment obligation (PKPU) against several television broadcasting companies under Bakrie Group.

title: Singaporean investor First Fortuna Holdings bought 452 million Wijaya Cahaya Timber (FWCT) shares
body: On Tuesday, February 13, foreign investor First Fortuna Holdings Pte. became a new shareholder in PT Wijaya Cahaya Timber Tbk (FWCT). This Singaporean investor acquired approximately 452.25 million shares, granting it 24.12% of the shares in this plywood company. PT BCA Sekuritas handled this share purchase transaction on behalf of First Fortuna.

title: Foreign buys reach 4 billion shares; net foreign volume closes at a 995 million surplus
body: On Thursday, February 15, foreign investors purchased shares from Indonesian issuers, with a total foreign buy volume reaching 4.40 billion shares. This figure brought the net foreign volume to a surplus of 995.69 million shares. Moreover, the foreign selling volume this time was roughly 3.40 billion shares.

title: Lippo Karawaci to divest land for IDR 279.88 billion to Siloam Hospitals
body: PT Lippo Karawci Tbk (LPKR), a property developer under Lippo Group, has conducted a Conditional Sales and Purchase Agreement (CSPA) with PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO) for a landbank of 6,096 square metres (m2).

title: Gov’t to hold anther state sukuk auction, eyeing IDR 12 trillion
body: Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on February 20, 2024, with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion.

title: Bank Woori Saudara’s net profit down 18.90%
body: The net profit of PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA) declined up to 18.90% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023. In contrast, its revenue actually increased in 2023.

title: WIFI to convert subsidiary’s debt to equity worth IDR 132.4 billion
body: PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI), an application and internet service provider, has converted debts of its subsidiary, PT Integrasi Jaringan Ekosistem (IJE), worth IDR 132.4 billion, to equity.

title: TOBA to supply renewable energy to PLN Nusantara Power
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) and PT PLN Nusantara Power (PLN NP) sign a power sale and purchase with PLN Batam regarding the Tembesi Floating Solar Power Plant of 46 MWp.

title: Sujaka Lays now owns 48% of Black Diamond Resources (COAL) after acquiring 1.4 billion shares.
body: On Monday, February 12, Sujaka Lays, a young entrepreneur and the proprietor of PT Black Diamond Resources Tbk (COAL), acquired 1.4 billion shares of the coal issuer. After this most recent transaction, Sujaka's ownership of the shares increased to 48.01% from his previous 25.61%.

title: Saw 21.12% growth, Adira Finance scored IDR 1.94 trillion of profit
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) scored current year’s profit growth of 21.12% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.94 trillion throughout 2023 from IDR 1.60 trillion recorded throughout 2022.

title: Working on Kediri-Tulungagung Toll, Gudang Garam invests IDR 2 trillion
body: PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM), one of the biggest cigarette manufacturers in Indonesia, has established a new subsidiary called PT Surya Sapta Agung Tol (SSAT) as a Toll Road Business Unit for Kediri-Tulungagung Toll Road.

title: Erafone to extend credit facility secured from Bank CTBC
body: PT Erafone Artha Retailindo (EAR), as known as Erafone, a subsidiary of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), has signed a credit facility extension with PT Bank CTBC Indonesia.

title: Bank Permata’s profit up 28.41% to IDR 2.5 trillion
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) managed to book net profit of IDR 2.5 trillion in 2023, 28.41% higher than 2022’s net profit of IDR 2.01 trillion.

title: MKAP remained as top gainers
body: The stock of PT Multikarya Asia Pasifik Raya Tbk (MKAP) was seen unwavering at the top of gainers’ list at its second day in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on February 13.

title: Eyeing more working capital, CCSI to set up rights issue of 163.63 million shares
body: PT Communication Cable Systems Indonesia Tbk (CCSI), a fibre optic cable manufacturer, will issue a capital raise with pre-emptive rights or rights issue.

title: Net foreign hits another surplus at 1.03 billion shares
body: Foreign net volume on Tuesday, February 13, hit another surplus of approximately 1.03 billion shares, as it had done in prior days. The foreign buying volume was 2.76 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 1.73 billion shares. Shares of the digital enterprise PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were still the most popular among foreign investors, with 696.32 million shares and a net volume of 231.71 million shares.

title: Share purchase transactions reach around 4 billion shares; net foreign volume hit another surplus at 1.35 billion shares
body: On Monday, February 12, foreign investors recorded a foreign purchase volume of around 4.34 billion shares. Meanwhile, the foreign sales volume was just 2.99 billion shares, bringing the net foreign back to surplus at 1.35 billion shares. Foreign investors purchased the most shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 2.12 billion shares with a net volume of 473.23 million.

title: China's Taobao releases 16.2 billion GOTO shares
body: On Wednesday, February 7, several foreign investors released PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares in exceptional quantities. Around 16.2 billion GOTO shares were sold by Chinese e-commerce platform Taobao China Holding Limited, which retained a 7.37% ownership stake. After that, SVF GT Subco (Singapore) Pte Ltd. sold 2.91 million shares, and GOTO Peopleverse Fund released 34.22 million GOTO shares.

title: Asia Intrainvesta acquired 520 million shares of Hassan Boga (NAYZ)
body: A share purchase transaction was carried out on Tuesday, February 6, transferring 520 million shares of PT Hassana Boga Sejahtera Tbk (NAYZ), the company that makes baby food, to PT Asia Intrainvesta. With this deal, Asia Intrainvesta's holdings of NAYZ shares, which it had previously held in excess of 720 million, increased by approximately 20% to 48.63%. A different shareholder, PT Hassana Investa Utama, relinquished control of these shares, and as a result, its ownership percentage dropped to 7.84%. The two investors went through PT Indo Capital Sekuritas, a securities company, for these transactions.

title: Loans surpass IDR 9 trillion, Bank IBK Indonesia profit soars 80%
body: PT Bank IBK Indonesia Tbk (AGRS), the bank resulting from the merger between PT Bank Agris Tbk and PT Bank Mitraniaga Tbk, recorded a net profit of IDR 187 billion by the end of 2023.

title: KAI obtains US$ 448.07 million loan from China Development Bank
body: PT Kereta Api Indonesia (Persero) has obtained a total loan facility of US$ 448.07 million from China Development Bank to finance the cost overrun of the Jakarta-Bandung high-speed train project.

title: Joining INA, Thomas Oentoro resigns from Garuda
body: Thomas Oentoro resigned as Independent Commissioner of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA) effective Thursday (15/2).

title: Sido Muncul to sign stillage waste sale and purchase contract of IDR 12.78 billion per year
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), one of the oldest pharmaceutical companies in Indonesia, has carried out an affiliate transaction in the form of sale and purchase of stillage waste, involving two subsidiaries, PT Semarang Herbal Indo Plant (SHIP) and PT Sido Muncul Pupuk Nusantara (SMPN).

title: Share price declines 34.58%, Blooming Years increased its investment in BABY
body: Blooming Years Pte Ltd added a 1.45% stake in PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY) in a gradual transaction starting in early February 2024.

title: SGMC VCC to divest 78.73 million of AWAN’s shares
body: SGMC VCC, a venture capital based in Singapore, has divested 78.73 million shares of PT Era Digital Media Tbk (AWAN).

title: BTN saw 14.95% increase in profit, reaching IDR 3.5 trillion
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara (Persero) Tbk (BBTN) booked current year’s net profit of IDR 3.5 trillion in 2023, 14.95% higher than IDR 3.04 trillion in 2022.

title: SUN auction recorded incoming bids of IDR 52.63 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids submitted for the Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (12/2) reached IDR 52.63 trillion.

title: KIJA to aim for IDR 2,5 trillion of marketing sales in 2024
body: PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) sets the marketing sales target to IDR 2.5 trillion in 2024.

title: Debuting, MKAP soared to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Multikarya Asia Pasifik Raya Tbk (MKAP) soared high in its debut day on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) yesterday (12/2).

title: In need of working capital, Chandra Asri Pacific will issue IDR 1.5 trillion bonds
body: PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA), a petrochemical company owned by Prajogo Pangestu, is said to issue its Shelf-Registration Bonds IV Phase IV Year 2024 with a total principal of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: SLJ Global to issue private placement of 1.32 billion for IDR 150
body: PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI), a wood manufacturer established in 1980, will issue a capital raise without pre-emptive rights or private placement of 1.32 billion shares.

title: XL Axiata’s profit rose 14.60% to IDR 1.27 trillion
body: PT XL Axiata Tbk (EXCL) booked net profit of IDR 1.27 trillion in 2023, 14.60% higher than IDR 1.10 trillion recorded in 2022.

title: Opening the week, JCI climbed strong
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) strengthened during today’s (12/2) trading session. At the closing bell at 4 PM WIB, JCI arrived at 7,297.67.

title: Aiming sales growth, Homeco readies market expansion
body: Officially making its mark in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) today (12/2), PT Homeco Victoria Makmur Tbk (LIVE), a household equipment distributor and provider, is getting ready for expanding its products and market scope.

title: Foreign investors buy up Astrindo Nusantara shares, resulting in a net foreign surplus of 211 million shares
body: On Wednesday, February 7, foreign investors purchased 196.29 million shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) for a net volume of 184.63 million shares. This transaction contributed to the foreign buying volume, which was 2.06 billion shares. Moreover, foreign sales volume was 1.85 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at 211.01 million shares.

title: BTPS saw 39.2% decrease in 2023 profit
body: PT Bank BTPN Syariah Tbk (BTPS), one of banks under Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation in Indonesia, reported net profit of IDR 1.08 trillion throughout 2023.

title: UNVR declines in the past 4 years
body: The performance of PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk (UNVR) has been slowed down since the COVID-19 pandemic in 2020.

title: Deli Pratama Batubara to raise portion in PKPK
body: PT Deli Pratama Batubara (DPB) has put in extra investment worth IDR 3.58 billion in PT Perdana Karya Persada Tbk (PKPK) in a transaction taking place yesterday (7/2).

title: Sido Muncul to set up IDR 102 billion for this year’s capex
body: PT Industri Jamu Herbal dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), one of the biggest herbal medicine producers in Indonesia, is allocating its capital expenditure (capex) budget of IDR 102 billion this year.

title: NCKL to hold a private placement and rights issue for nickel smelter acquisition
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL), a company engaged in the nickel mining industry, will hold two corporate actions in order to gain extra capital and acquire a nickel smelting facility.

title: Smooth IPO, MEJA is eyeing B2C market
body: PT Harta Djaya Karya Tbk (MEJA) is ready to branch out to a new business model, business-to-consumer (B2C) after securing its spot at the board through its initial public offering (IPO) today (12/2).

title: Estetika Tata Tiara to acquire 3 affiliates for IDR 108.2 billion
body: PT Estetika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF), a company engaged in the processed food manufacture, will acquire 3 affiliated companies with a total acquisition value of IDR 108.2 billion.

title: GOTO-Grab merger talks are on again
body: Grab Holdings, the biggest ride-hailing company in Southeast Asia, once again initiates the talk of merging business with PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO).

title: INCO’s profit rose 36.89% to USD 274.33 million
body: The profit of PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO) was recorded increasing 36.89% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 274.33 million from USD 200.40 million in 2022. This growth resulted from increases in revenue and financial income.

title: BJTM to set up dividend of IDR 816.61 billion
body: PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) will issue dividend distribution of IDR 816.69 billion from its 2023 net profit.

title: IDX to welcome 3 new companies today
body: Nearing 2024 National Election Day, companies are making their moves to hold initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Two investors are involved in the share ownership transfer at Hassana Boga Sejahtera (NAYZ)
body: On Monday, February 5, shares of PT Hassana Boga Sejahtera Tbk (NAYZ), a baby food company, changed hands. PT Hassana Investa Utama transferred 320 million NAYZ shares to PT Asia Intrainvesta, resulting in a final ownership of 28.24%. Interestingly, Hassana Investa retained approximately 28.24% of its stake.

title: Foreign selling volume soars; net foreign volume drops to negative 1 billion shares.
body: On Tuesday, February 6, foreign sell volume exceeded 3.70 billion shares, while foreign buying volume was only 2.50 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume dropped to -1.19 billion shares. One of the factors contributing to the surge in foreign sales volume was the sale of 2.41 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of -1.66 billion shares.

title: Resources Fortune becomes a new investor in Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera (NSSS) after purchasing 1.48 billion shares
body: PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS), which operates in the agriculture and palm oil plantation sectors, welcomed Resources Fortune Ltd. as a new investor on Friday, February 2. Resources Fortune purchased 1.48 billion NSSS shares as part of its new share investment, giving it 6.24% share ownership. However, at the same time, PT Mitra Agro Dharma Unggul sold 500 million NSSS shares instead, leaving a share ownership of around 44.84%.

title: JCI strengthens throughout the day
body: Throughout the day, Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was seen crawling up until today’s (7/2) closing bell.

title: TBMS to schedule stock split, setting ratio to 1:2
body: PT Tembaga Mulia Semanan Tbk (TBMS) will issue a stock split with a ratio of 1:2, meaning that IDR 50 each will be split into two of IDR 25.

title: TOSK vs MPIX, two online solution platform providers for MSME debuting today
body: PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk (TOSK) and PT Mitra Pedagang Indonesia Tbk (MPIX) officially entered the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) board today (7/2).

title: Indosat’s profit reached IDR 4.5 trillion
body: Net profit of PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT) was seen declining 4.6% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 4.50 trillion despite its 9.6% increase in revenue in 2023.

title: BELL’s stock soared, up 34.33%
body: The stock price of PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL) increased 34.33% throughout yesterday’s (6/2) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Pegadaian’s profit hit IDR 4.37 trillion
body: PT Pegadaian booked net profit of IDR 4.37 trillion throughout 2023, 32.64% higher than IDR 3.29 trillion seen in 2022.

title: Foreign invetors sell over 1 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares; net foreign volume drops to minus 873.82 million
body: Foreign investors sold a significant amount of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk's (GOTO) shares on Monday, February 5, with a foreign sell volume of 1.44 billion shares and a net volume of -1.11 billion shares. This figure significantly boosted the foreign sales volume to around 2.74 billion shares. Meanwhile, the foreign buy volume was only 1.87 billion shares, bringing the net foreign volume to -873.82 million.

title: BRI’s net profit up 17.64% to IDR 61.05 trillion
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) scored profit growth of 17.54% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 61.05 trillion in 2023 from IDR 51.17 trillion seen in 2022.

title: Fresh debutants, IDX welcomes 4 new companies today
body: Today, February 7, 2024, Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) is listing 4 new stocks at once, consisting of PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk (TOSK), PT Terang Dunia Internusa Tbk (UNTD), PT Mitra Pedagang Indonesia Tbk (MPIX), and PT Ancara Logistics Indonesia Tbk (ALII).

title: Indonesia’s economy’s strength still focused in Java and Sumatra
body: The economic structure of Indonesia is still heavily concentrated in Java and Sumatra throughout 2023.

title: Foreign buying volume is higher, with a net foreign surplus of 420 million shares
body: Share transactions by foreign investors recorded 2.33 billion shares of foreign buys, which was higher than the foreign sell volume of 1.91 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume on Friday, February 2, had a surplus of 420.77 million shares. Foreign investors bought the most shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with 628.58 million shares bought and a net volume of 230.80 million shares.

title: Saranakelola Investa becomes the new controller of ICTSI Jasa Prima (KARW)
body: On Thursday, February 1, PT Saranakelola Investa made a new investment of 470.83 million shares in PT ICTSI Jasa Prima Tbk (KARW), which provides loading and unloading services as well as marine infrastructure facilities. Saranakelola Investa became the new dominant stakeholder, with an 80.19% stake in this transaction.

title: Bumi Resources Minerals will increase gold production up to 40% this year
body: PT Bumi Resources Minerals Tbk (BRMS) aims to produce up to 35 thousand troy ounces of gold this year, around 40% higher than the company's estimated gold production in 2023.

title: Bids received in Sukuk auction reached IDR 23.65 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the auction of State Sharia Securities (SBSN) on February 5, 2024 yesterday reached IDR 23.64 trillion, according to the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Indonesia’s economy grew 5.05% in 2023
body: Economy of Indonesia throughout 2023 had grown 5.05%, slowing down from the rate seen in 2022 of 5.31%.

title: AMMN realised IDR 10.47 trillion from IPO
body: PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) has realised 98.53% of the IPO proceeds, equal to IDR 10.32 trillion from total IDR 10.47 trillion.

title: Low utilisation rate, Ratu Prabu divest subsidiary’s rig for USD 2.5 million
body: PT Ratu Prabu Energi Tbk (ARTI) has divested an asset in the form of rig unit type 460K Snubbing Unit owned by its subsidiary, PT Lekom Maras, for USD 2,5 million last Monday (5/2).

title: JCI rose at Tuesday’s morning session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) gained strength and arrived at 7,229.24 at the opening bell this morning (6/2) at 9 AM WIB.

title: Puradelta Lestari to aim for marketing sales of IDR 1.81 trillion this year
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), the developer of integrated city Kota Deltamas, is eyeing marketing sales of IDR 1.81 trillion in 2024.

title: WIKA to allocate IDR 75 billion extra capital to Wika Serang Panimbang
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) has channelled extra capital of IDR 75 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Wijaya Karya Serang Panimbang (WSP).

title: Foreign buying volume hits 3 billion shares; net foreign volume closes at 349 million shares
body: Share purchase transactions done by foreign investors on Wednesday, January 31, resulted in a foreign purchase volume of 3.04 billion shares. With a foreign sales volume of only 2.69 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at a 349.91 million surplus. The most shares purchased belonged to the banking company PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), whose 156.95 million shares were bought, and it recorded a net volume of 61.67 million shares.

title: 2023, NISP’s net profit rose 23%
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) scored a total net profit of IDR 4.09 trillion in 2023, 23% increase from the same period in 2022 of IDR 3.32 trillion.

title: Divesting portions in Mega Manunggal, Provident Warehouse cashes in IDR 60 billion
body: Provident Warehouse Pte Ltd (PW) has divested 200 million of its shares for IDR 60 billion in PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk (MMLP), last week (23/1).

title: PTPP scored IDR 3.5 trillion of new contracts in January 2024
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), a state-owned enterprise engaged in the infrastructure construction, had secured new contracts worth approximately IDR 3.5 trillion in January 2024.

title: Agreed on resolution, PLI and HLL to commercially negotiate on FSRU Lampung
body: PT PGN LNG Indonesia (PLI), a subsdiary of PT Pertamina Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS), and PT Hoegh LNG Lampung (HLL) have agreed upon commercial negotiation regarding the utilisation of Floating Storage Regasification Unit (FSRU) Lampung.

title: BNGA rakes in IDR 4.34 billion from selling buyback shares
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) raises fresh funds of IDR 4.34 billion from divesting 2.4 million shares gained from a buyback.

title: Mitra Agro Dharma releases 687 million shares of Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera (NSSS)
body: On Wednesday, January 31, PT Mitra Agro Dharma Unggul started the share sale list by selling 687 million shares of PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS), a company in the palm oil processing sector. Mitra Agro's ownership portion now stands at 46.94%, down from 49.83% before this transaction. Foreign investor UOB Kay Hian Private Limited carried out the subsequent share sale, selling 21.40 million shares of the integrated shrimp cultivation enterprise PT Central Proteina Prima Tbk. GOTO Peopleverse Fund also sold 19.36 million shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO).

title: Slipping, BREN is now the third highest market cap
body: Market capitalisation of PT Barito Renewable Energy Tbk (BREN) is slipping to the third position out of the top 10 market cap in January 2024 from the runner-up title it secured in December 2023.

title: Ecocare Indo Pacifik sets IPO price at IDR 145 per share
body: PT Ecocare Indo Pasifik Tbk (HYGN), a company operating in the management and rental of cleaning equipment, has set its Initial Public Offering (IPO) share price at IDR 145 per share.

title: Hengtong Optic to set up tender offer of VOKS’s shares
body: Hengtong Optic Electric International Co Ltd (HOEI), controlling shareholder of PT Voksel Electric Tbk (VOKS), will initiate the tender offer of a maximum 1.11 billion shares for IDR 226 each.

title: Meeting free float requirement, Kalbe Farma to sell 6 million Enseval’s shares
body: PT Kalbe Farma Tbk (KLBF), a pharmaceutical company, will sell 5 to 6 million shares of PT Enseval Putera Megatrading Tbk (EPMT).

title: Take a look at 4 stocks with impressive increases in January 2024
body: Earlier this year, several issuers with market capitalisation under IDR 100 trillion recorded fantastic surge in its stock price percentage amongst hundreds of issuers listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: TINS to channel IDR 36.5 billion of loan to subsidiary
body: PT Timah Tbk (TINS), a state-owned tin mining company, has reportedly allocated a short-term loan facility for one of its subsidiaries, PT DOK & Perkapalan Air Kantung (DAK).

title: Merdeka Copper Gold to issue bonds of IDR 1.5 trillion
body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), a gold and other mineral mining company, will issue the Public Offering of Shelf-Registration Bonds IV Phase V Year 2024 with a principal of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Expanding to Labuan Bajo, BUVA to acquire 50% of VIP’s portion in BSP
body: PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk (BUVA) is acquiring 50% of the portion of PT Vasanta Indo Properti in PT Bukit Savana Raya (BSR) for IDR 112.27 billion.

title: Amman Mineral reports smelter progress hitting 76% in December 2023
body: A subsidiary of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN), PT Amman Mineral Industri (AMI), mentioned that the progress of construction of copper smelting facility and precious metal refinery had reached 76.1% and 72.7% at the end of December 2023.

title: Ayam Goreng Nelongso set IPO price to IDR 278 per share
body: PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk (BAIK), a company that manages Ayam Goreng Nelongso, has set the initial public offering (IPO) price to IDR 278 per share.

title: Foreign investors sell a large portion of Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares; net foreign volume is minus 511 million shares
body: After being the best-selling stock the day before, shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) are now the most sold by foreign investors, with a buying volume of 1.14 billion shares and a net volume of -656.49 million. As a result, foreign selling volume surged to 2.76 billion shares, while foreign buying volume was only about 2.25 billion shares. Net foreign fell back into the red zone, totaling roughly -511.87 million shares on Thursday, February 1.

title: Purchasing 15 billion new shares of Amman Mineral (AMMN), Medco Energi Internasional controls 20.92% of the stakes
body: On Tuesday, January 30, PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) made a fresh investment in PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN). MEDC then purchased 15.16 billion shares of AMMN, gaining 20.92% ownership of the gold and copper mining corporation. Aside from that, Six Sis Ltd. invested 434.51 million new shares in PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), a coal mining contractor services company with a final ownership percentage of 5.04%.

title: Recreation park regains popularity, PJAA’s net profit up 52.48%
body: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA), a tourism and recreation owned by DKI Jakarta government, booked net profit surge of up to 52.48% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023.

title: SMF to issue bonds and sukuk of IDR 2.03 trillion
body: PT Sarana Multigriya Finansial (Persero) or SMF, a state-owned secondary housing financing company, will issue bonds and sukuk with total principal of IDR 2.03 trillion.

title: Adira Finance obtained syndicated loan of IDR 4.7 trillion from parent company
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk (ADMF) has signed a syndicated loan agreement worth USD 300 million or equivalent to IDR 4.73 trillion, using the currency exchange rate of IDR 15,775 per USD.

title: BMRI saw 16.3% credit growth, assets went over 2 quadrillion
body: Yesterday (1/2), PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) reported double-digit growth in its credit distribution, reaching 16.3% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 1.39 trillion.

title: Financing soared 15.7% in 2023, BRIS reported net profit IDR 5.7 trillion
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), sharia bank with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, recorded financing distribution of IDR 240.32 trillion throughout 2023, increasing 15.7% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 207.7 trillion.

title: MORA to boost revenue through new product launch
body: PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA), a telecommunication service company, has launched its latest product called Moratelindo Network Interconnect and Content Autonomous (MoNICA).

title: Indo Oils Perkasa tp set up JV with Sena MillsRefineries
body: PT Indo Oils Perkasa Tbk (OILS), an issuer engaged in the agricultural products sector, has established a joint venture (JV) with Sena Mills Refineries Export (Private).

title: Bids in SUN auction reaches IDR 73.24 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the Government Debt Securities (SUN) auction on Tuesday (30/1) was recorded at IDR 73.24 trillion, according to the Directorate General of Financing and Risk Management (DJPPR) of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Transcoal Pacific purchases one ship for US$14.8 million
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI), a transportation company for transporting coal, has purchased 1 Mother Vessel Bulk Carrier vessel asset.

title: Indomobil Sukses Internasional to distribute Foton truck in Indonesia
body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), has signed a cooperation agreement regarding the distribution of Foton vehicles.

title: Trans Jabar Tol signed on syndicated loan agreement worth IDR 3.4 trillion
body: PT Trans Jabar Tol (TJT), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) owned through PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), has obtained a syndicated loan facility of IDR 3.4 trillion.

title: Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) receives new investments from KB Valbury Sekuritas
body: PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), which provides local and international shipping services, welcomed new investors again on Monday, January 29. PT KB Valbury Sekuritas has purchased 810 million new BULL shares, acquiring 5.74% of the company's stock. PT Artalindo Semesta Nusantara followed with the purchase of 16.99 million shares of PT Yelooo Integra Datanet (YELO), a communications equipment trade and leasing company.

title: OASA to form a new subsidiary, putting in IDR 2.7 billion of investment
body: PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk (OASA) has reportedly established a new subsidiary in late January (29/1).

title: 2023, ANTM scored 67% growth in nickel sales volume
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) booked nickel ore sales volume of 11.71 million wet metric ton (wmt) in 2023, shifting 67% from the same period in 2022 of 7.01 million wmt.

title: Foreign investors buy a large sum of Gojek Tokopedia's (GOTO) shares, and net foreign shares reach 1.17 billion
body: On Tuesday, January 30, foreign investors purchased 1.65 billion shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 1.01 billion. This transaction had a substantial impact on the volume of foreign purchases, which was 3.33 billion shares, and the net foreign surplus, which was 1.17 billion shares. The foreign sales volume itself then totaled 2.16 billion shares.

title: Solusi Karya Sukses acquired 5.03% of Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) shares through a new investment
body: PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL) just welcomed PT Solusi Karya Sukses as a new investor on Friday, January 26, after the investor purchased 710.43 million BULL shares of the local and international shipping sector company. Solusi Karya now owns 5.03% of the shares of BULL as a result of this transaction. Furthermore, foreign investors Blooming Years Pte Ltd continued to buy shares, adding 1.50 million shares of baby clothes retailer PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY) to their portfolio.

title: Share purchase transactions increase, bringing the net foreign volume surplus to 263 million
body: On Monday, January 29, foreign buying volume surged to 2.89 billion shares. This puts the net foreign surplus at 263.12 million shares, with the foreign sales volume only around 2.62 billion shares. The largest contributor to the increase in foreign buying volume was the purchase of 211.95 million shares of coal business PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), resulting in a net volume of 124.69 million shares.

title: HEXA saw 25.43% surge in profit to USD 43.85 million in 2023
body: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk (HEXA) recorded profit growth of 25.34% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 43.85 million in 2023 from USD 34.98 million in 2022.

title: PPRE secured IDR 6.7 trillion of new contracts in 2023
body: PT PP Presisi Tbk (PPRE) recorded 28.7% increase in its new contracts to IDR 6.7 trillion in 2023 from IDR 5.2 trillion in 2022.

title: Hesitant about IKN, Paradise Indonesia to focus on Java’s projects this year
body: As a property developer, PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP) has yet to show its interest in participating in the hype of Nusantara Capital City (IKN).

title: JCI strengthened in the morning session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) climbed up to 7,221.82 at today’s (31/1) opening bell. Yesterday (30/1), the Index was closed at 7,192.21 at 4 PM WIB.

title: Woori Bank Korea to raise SDRA’s capital in rights issue
body: Woori Bank Korea, the controller of 84.2% of PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA), will exercise its entire rights in the upcoming rights issue in March 2024.

title: Fulfilling market needs, AGII expands filling stations in Pekanbaru
body: PT Samator Indo Gas Tbk (AGII), a gas company for industrial needs, has inaugurated its newest filling station building in Pekanbaru, Riau.

title: Arsy Buana Travelindo (HAJJ) welcomes Abraha Jaya Investama as a new investor
body: PT Arsy Buana Travelindo Tbk (HAJJ), which provides Umrah and Hajj services, welcomed PT Abraha Jaya Investama as a new investor on Thursday, January 25. This investor purchased 159.77 million HAJJ shares, resulting in a final ownership percentage of 6.98%. Then, two investors were seen purchasing shares in palm oil producer PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk (SSMS): PT Putra Borneo Agro Lestari (1.33 million shares) and foreign investor Maybank Singapore Limited (3.59 million shares).

title: DSNG saw increase in CPO sales volume in 2023
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) booked an increase in its sales volume of crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel oil (PKO) of 4% and 1.2% each throughout 2023.

title: Indonesian govt aims for IDR 12 trillion in state sukuk auction next week
body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on Monday (5/2) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion.

title: Exceeding target, BSD recorded marketing sales of IDR 9.5 trillion
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE) recorded pre-sales (marketing sales) in 2023 of IDR 9.50 trillion, with the main contributor from the residential segment.

title: Tender offer completed, BDIA stake in TBIG now 79.75%
body: The share portion of Bersama Digital Infrastructure Asia Pte Ltd (BDIA) rose to 79.75% from 75.33% in PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG) after completing the tender offer last week (24/1).

title: AMOR to distribute interim dividend of IDR 18.5 per share
body: PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk (AMOR), an investment company with total assets under management of IDR 33.3 trillion, will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 18.5 per share.

title: After hitting red zone, JCI moves up towards end of first session
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) strengthened at the close of the first trading session, Tuesday (30/1).

title: Maybank facilitates digital gold investment, collaborates with Pegadaian to open gold savings
body: PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII), known as Maybank, is now collaborating with Pegadaian to introduce the results of its newest collaboration, namely Pegadaian Gold Savings on the M2U ID App.

title: IPAC to acquire 7 EFG members to boost agency business growth
body: PT Era Graharealty Tbk (IPAC) has acquired seven companies listed under Era Fiesta Group (EFG) worth IDR 11.22 billion last week (26/1). The

title: East Ventures to lead USD 3.5 million funding for Mesh Bio
body: East Ventures, a capital venture that has been quite generous to Indonesian start-ups, is reportedly leading series A funding worth USD 3.5 million for Mesh Bio.

title: Waskita Karya to sell 25% of Trans Jabar Tol to SMI
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), a state-owned construction company, has divested 25% of its shares in PT Trans Jabar Tol (TJT) and transferred it to PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (SMI).

title: Harum Energy spent USD 215.22 million for nickel smelter acquisition
body: PT Harum Energy Tbk (HRUM), a coal mining company owned by the magnate, Kiki Barki, has acquired shares of a nickel processing and refinery company, PT Westrong Metal Industry (WMI).

title: Swarmed by young investors, capital market’s assets still in the hand of veterans
body: The number of investors in the capital market of Indonesia has reportedly increased 18.01% in 2023, thanks to retail investors’ growing interest, according to the data from Indonesia Central Security Depository (KSEI).

title: Paradise Indonesia eyes 20%-30% growth in 2024
body: After scoring significant increase in its performance in 2023, PT Indonesian Paradise Property Tbk (INPP), a property developer and manager, now aims to score performance growth of 20%-30% this year.

title: Century Textile’s loss nearly doubled in 2023
body: PT Century Textile Industry Tbk (CNTX), a textile manufacturer established in 1970, booked another loss of USD 4.04 million in 2023.

title: Supreme Court denied Greylag Goose Leasing’s cassation appeal
body: Supreme Court has denied the cassation appealed by Greylag Goose Leasing 1410 and 1446 Designated Activity regarding the cancellation of homologated peace agreement with PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA).

title: Foreign buying volume drops: net foreign volume closes at minus 442 million shares
body: On Friday, January 26, foreign buying volume fell to 1.67 billion shares, down from the previous day. Meanwhile, foreign selling volume hit 2.11 billion shares, sending net foreign returns into the red zone at around -442.48 million shares. Foreign investors sold the most shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 441.55 million shares with a net volume of -242.56 million.

title: Bersama Digital buys 1 billion shares of Tower Bersama Infrastructure (TBIG)
body: The controlling shareholder of Bersama Digital Infrastructure Asia Pte Ltd. (BDIA) purchased 1 billion shares of PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG) on Wednesday, January 24. This share acquisition transaction brings BDIA's holding percentage in the telecommunications infrastructure provider company to 79.75%.

title: Foreign investors acquire many Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) shares, with a net foreign surplus of 90 million shares
body: Foreign investors purchased 153.82 million shares of PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), which operates in the local and international shipping sectors, on Thursday, January 25, for a net volume of 81.73 million shares. This share transaction also contributed to the net foreign volume surplus of 90.43 million shares. The recorded foreign buying volume was 2.14 billion shares, while the foreign selling volume was 2.05 billion shares.

title: Hendarmin pockets IDR 14.70 billion after divesting HAJJ
body: Hendarmin Agungsetya Purwanto divested all his shares in PT Arsy Buana Travelindo Tbk (HAJJ) worth IDR 14.7 billion in a transaction last week (25/1).

title: CP Prima paid off US$ 51.51 million Tranche A debt
body: PT Central Proteina Prima Tbk (CPRO) is accelerating the repayment of Tranche A debt from the Senior Facility Agreement (SFA) resulting from the 2021 Bond restructuring amounting to US$ 51.51 million.

title: TBS Energi Utama announces acquisition of waste processing company
body: PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA), a coal producer which is now focusing on renewable energy infrastructure, has acquired waste management company ARAH Environmental (AE).

title: Satu Visi Putra offers 615 million shares via IPO
body: PT Satu Visi Putra Tbk (VISI), a large trading company for advertising and printing materials, will carry out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) by releasing 615 million shares.

title: In 2023, BNI books IDR 810.73 trillion in third party funds
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) recorded third party funds (DPK) of IDR 810.73 trillion throughout 2023, up 5.4% from the same period in 2022 of IDR 769.26 billion.

title: Gaining 23% market share, AVIA to aim for double-digit growth this year
