body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer owned by the magnate, Hermanto Tanoko, is targeting to reach double-digit growth in its sales.

title: Welcoming a new week, JCI climbs up
body: Jakarta Composite Index today (29/1) crawls up from the position it recorded last Friday (26/1).

title: MMIX secures credit facility of IDR 59 billion from Bank Aladin
body: PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk (MMIX), a health device supplier, has been granted a loan facility from PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk (BANK) worth IDR 59 billion.

title: Official, SDRA to set up rights issue
body: Shareholders of PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA) approved the management’s plan of rights issue, by issuing 6.4 billion shares.

title: JCI stays sluggish throughout the day
body: This weekend (26/1), the Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) weakened into the red zone until the closing of transactions at 16.00 West Indonesia Time (WIB).

title: BCA’s profit growth in 2023 slowed down compared to 2022
body: Profit growth of PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) was seemingly slowing down from 2022 to 2023, despite its net income consistently growing from year to year.

title: Arsjad Rasjid bags IDR 37.80 billion from divestment in Red Planet
body: Moh Arsjad Rasjid Prabu Mangkuningrat has sold 7.3% of his shares in PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk (PSKT) for IDR 37.80 billion last week (18/1).

title: Closer look at PANI’s target of 125% revenue growth in 2024
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI), a property developer owned by Agung Sedayu Group’s Sugianto Kusuma, is eyeing quite aggressive marketing sales target this year of 125% increase to IDR 5.4 trillion.

title: Gov’t eyes IDR 24 trillion in next week’s SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) with an indicative target of IDR 24 trillion next Tuesday (30/1).

title: FORU remained as top gainers
body: PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk (FORU) still held onto its top gainers’ title with 34.67% surge in its price until yesterday’s (25/1) closing bell.

title: Mohammad Arsjad transferred 756 million Red Planet (PSKT) shares to Trajective Mitra
body: On Tuesday, January 23, the transfer of 756 million shares of PT Red Planet Indonesia Tbk (PSKT) from individual investor Mohammad Arsjad Rasjid Prabu Mangkuningrat to PT Trajective Mitra Indonesia was the most notable market hint. This number of shares represents 7.3% stakes of the hotel company, leaving Mohammad Arsjad with only 22.46% of the shares. Trajective Mitra purchased these shares from PT Sucor Sekuritas.

title: SWAT’s revenue dropped 18.54% in 2023
body: The revenue of PT Sriwahana Adityakarta Tbk (SWAT) slipped 18.54% year-on-year (yoy) in 2023.

title: Solid credit disbursement brought BCA’s net profit to grow 48.6% in 2023
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), the bank with the highest market capitalisation in Indonesia, recorded net profit of IDR 48.6 trillion in 2023.

title: Pyridam Farma eyes IDR 400 billion through bonds’ issuance
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), a pharmaceutical company under Rejuve Global Investment, will issue its Shelf-Registration Bonds I of PYFA Phase III Year 2024, with a total principal of IDR 400 billion.

title: HITS’s subsidiary to sell vessel for IDR 160 billion
body: PT Humpuss Transportasi Kimia (HTK), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS), has reportedly divested one mooring boat for IDR 160 billion.

title: Foreign selling volume is stable; net foreign volume closed at negative 101 million shares
body: On Wednesday, January 24, foreign sell volume remained stable at around 2.42 billion shares, while foreign buy volume was 2.31 billion shares. The slight discrepancy between the two resulted in a net foreign volume of -101.07 million shares. In this net foreign summary, the highest share sales belonged to the banking company PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA), which sold for 101.10 million shares with a net volume of -95.63 million shares. Meanwhile, the best-selling shares were those of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), with a purchase volume of 550.80 million shares and a net volume of 62.69 million.

title: Head-to-head of 2024 Election campaign funds
body: General Election Commission of Indonesia has released initial campaign budget allocated by 3 presidential candidates that will face each other in the upcoming election on February 14, 2024.

title: Soaring in the morning, JCI ended in the red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) entered the red zone in the afternoon session today (25/1). At 4 PM WIB today, JCI arrived at 7,178.04.

title: Participating in rights issue, 5 shareholders place IDR 52 billion in PANR
body: PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk (PANR) recorded additional capital worth IDR 52 billion via a rights issue that took place last week (18/1).

title: MPXL and SRMI to work on bulk cement supply
body: PT MPX Logistic International Tbk (MPXL) has secured a bulk cement sales and purchase contract with PT SCG Ready Mix Indonesia (SRMI) worth a total of IDR 47.15 billion for the next three years.

title: Investment Minister denies claim of Tesla leaving nickel for EV battery
body: The Minister of Investment, Luhut Binsar Pandjaitan, expressed his opinion on the claim of Tesla, Elon Musk’s electric vehicle (EV) manufacturer, quitting nickel for EV battery materials.

title: Buys shares in Samcro Hyosung Adilestari (ACRO), Tae Sung Chung takes control of 78.41% stakes
body: PT Samcro Hyosung Adiwisata Tbk (ACRO), which manufactures and trades hook and loop adhesive products, has recently received a new investment from private investor Tae Sung Chung, who purchased 2.72 billion shares on Monday, January 22. Tae Sung Chung now owns approximately 78.41% of the company as a result of the transaction. Aside from that, PT Sandi Usaha Jaya became a new investor in the property company PT Surya Permata Andalan Tbk (NATO), purchasing 405.67 million shares for a final ownership percentage of 5.07%.

title: Popular among domestic investors, FORU secured top gainers
body: PT Fortune Indonesia Tbk (FORU) is crowned the top gainers, after scoring 34.53% increase at yesterday’s (24/1) closing bell.

title: Coal price declining, BYAN still pushes coal production to increase 18.7% this year
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), a coal mining company owned by Dato’ Low Tuck Kwong, sets the target for coal production to hit over 57 million tons this year.

title: Restructuring debt, WIKA to obtain additional L/C facility
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) will receive extra Letter of Credit (L/C) facility from a syndicate of creditors in order to support its operation.

title: Estee Gold Feet to set up interim dividend of IDR 12.23 billion
body: PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO), a cosmetic manufacturer established in 1978, is scheduling an interim dividend distribution of IDR 12.23 billion.

title: Smartfren to hold rights issue of 171.45 million shares, eyeing IDR 8.57 billion
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), a telecommunication company under Sinarmas Group, will issue the capital increase with preemptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Bank OCBC NISP targets Bank Commonwealth acquisition to be completed in May 2024
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) has obtained approval from the Financial Services Authority (OJK) regarding the plan to acquire shares in PT Bank Commonwealth.

title: Foreign selling volume is getting higher; net foreign volume closes at minus 300 million shares
body: On Tuesday, January 23, foreign sales volume surged again, reaching around 2.25 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign investors' share purchases resulted in a foreign purchase volume of just 1.95 billion shares, resulting in net foreign shares of -300.89 million. PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares remained the most sold by foreign investors, with around 403.42 million shares sold and a net volume of -111.75 million shares.

title: Commissioners and directors buy shares of Panorama Sentrawisata (PANR)
body: On Friday, January 19, the board of commissioners and directors of the tourism consulting services company PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk (PANR) participated in buying PANR shares. Commissioner Dharmayanto Tirtawisata bought 69.24 million shares of PANR, followed by the main commissioner, Satrijanto Tirtawisata, who purchased 14.65 million shares of the same company. Not only that, both the main director and deputy main director, Budijanto Tirtawisata and Ramajanto Tirtawisata, continued to purchase 11.71 million and 11.32 million PANR shares, respectively. In contrast, PT Panorama Tirta Anugerah's share ownership percentage changed as a result of their absence in the PANR's rights issue, as it now dropped from 47.38% to 44.68%.

title: Foreign sales of 377 million Gojek Tokopedia shares resulted in a net foreign of -296.46 million shares
body: Foreign investors sold 377.28 million shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Monday, January 22, for a net volume of -168.40 million shares. This sale had a substantial impact on foreign sales volume, which totalled 2.08 billion shares. With a foreign purchase volume of only about 1.78 billion shares, net foreign fell to -296.46 million shares.

title: Two foreign investors lost some ownership by abstaining from the Bank Mayapada (MAYA) rights issue
body: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) holds a right offering from January 15 to January 19, 2024, with a projected fundraise of 4 trillion Rupiah. Two MAYA foreign investors decided not to participate in this corporate action, so their ownership decreased on Thursday, January 18. The stakes of JPMCB NA RE-Cathay Life Insurance Co., Ltd., based in Taiwan, dropped from 18.85% to 12.46%. This was followed by Galasco Investment Limited, whose shares fell from 12.44% to 8.22%.

title: A decline in foreign buys resulted in a net foreign volume of -126 million shares
body: Foreign buy volume decreased on Friday, January 19, with approximately 1.73 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign investors generated foreign sales of 1.86 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -126.15 million.

title: Energy Battery Indonesia becomes the new controlling shareholder of Adhi Kartiko Pratama (NICE)
body: On Tuesday, January 16, PT Energy Battery Indonesia (EBI) officially became the new majority stakeholder of the nickel mining business PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE). EBI became the new controller of NICE after being appointed by LX International Corp. to carry out a share takeover, and it now holds 3.64 billion shares of NICE, which equals to 60% ownership.

title: Garibaldi Thohir vocal in supporting presidential candidate, ADRO got corrected
body: Shares of PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) were corrected for the past two days since Garibaldi Thohir, its president director, declared his support to Presidential Candidates 02, Prabowo Subianto-Gibran Rakabuming Raka, earlier this week (21/1).

title: Bank OCBC NISP to set up buyback
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) will initiate a buyback with an allocated budget of IDR 800 million.

title: Bank CIMB Niaga eyes IDR 16.69 billion in private placement
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) plans to raise fresh funds of up to IDR 16.69 billion through its capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as private placement.

title: Boy Thohir sold 2.3 billion Merdeka Battery (MBMA) shares
body: On Wednesday, January 17, Boy Thohir, CEO of Adaro Group, sold 2.3 billion shares of PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), reducing his stake from 8.46% to 6.33%. Boy sold the shares of the nickel mining company for electric vehicle batteries via PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: TIS Inc to channel IDR 420 billion for ATIC development
body: TIS Inc grants IDR 420 billion of loan to PT Anabatic Technologies Tbk (ATIC) for its business expansion.

title: Collaborating with banks, OY! Indonesia to push financial inclusion forward
body: OY! Indonesia, an integrated payment solution provider, is committed to boost financial inclusion in Indonesia through its collaboration with PT Bank Danamon Tbk (BDMN) and PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), whilst still abiding by regulations and guideline of Indonesian Fintech Association (AFTECH).

title: KKGI to distribute 168.07 million buyback shares

title: JCI seen moved up and entered red zone

title: BABY reach top gainers, but price has not yet rebounded

title: SMGA sets IPO price at IDR 105 per share

title: BYAN subsidiary awarded IDR 187.36 billion contract to affiliated company

title: ICTSI to divest 80.19% stake in KARW
body: ICTSI Far East Limited Pte Ltd is reported to be selling 80.19% of its stake in PT ICTSI Jasa Prima Tbk (KARW).

body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk today (23/1) reach IDR 23.76 trillion.

body: Yenny Hamidah Koen is increasing her portions in PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk (MAHA) by IDR 1.08 billion in worth in a transaction taking place yesterday (22/1).

body: PT Homeco Victoria Makmur Tbk (LIVE), a stationery and drawing tool distributor, eyes fresh funds in capital market to pay off obligations to banks.

title: SICC acknowledges peace agreement between Garuda and Greylag in Singapore

title: Growing rapidly since debut, GRIA sat as top gainer

title: Istaka Karya to transfer shares in JKC to Jasa Marga

body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds V Phase II Year 2024 with total principal worth IDR 1.5 trillion.

body: PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA) was seen shifting 24.93% throughout yesterday’s (18/1) trading session.

body: PT Hutama Trans Kencana (Matrans), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), has purchased a unit of oil tanker for USD 7.55 million.

body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) remains in the green zone from the morning to afternoon session today (18/1).

body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) and PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC) recorded highest market capitalisations among their competitors in the oil and gas industry in 2023.

body: PT BRI Finance Indonesia (BRI Finance), one of subsidiaries of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), has targeted new financing in 2024 to grow over 20%.

body: PT Esta Utama Corpora (EUC) has increased its stock portion by investing IDR 2.58 billion in PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk (ESTA).

body: Meepok Holdings Pte Ltd divested 14.5% of its shares in PT Aesler Grup Interanasional Tbk (RONY) for IDR 18.18 billion yesterday (17/1).

body: Asep Sulaeman Sabanda (ASS) has resigned from his position as President Commissioner of PT Berkah Beton Sadaya Tbk (BEBS) last week.

body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on next Tuesday (23/1), with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion.

body: PT Ancara Logistics Indonesia Tbk (ALII), a sea transportation service company, will conduct its initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 3.16 billion shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

body: The investment value originating from the Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM) sector throughout 2023 reached US$30.3 billion, according to data from the Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources.

body: PT Mitra Pedagang Indonesia Tbk (MPIX), the company that owns and manages the MPStore e-commerce platform will carry out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) of 312.5 million shares.

body: PT Trimitra Ciptaselaras (TC) divested 1.36% of its shares in PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS) last week (9/1). Total share transactions worth IDR 9.42 billion.

body: On Friday, January 12, the controlling shareholder of PT Esta Utama Corpora strengthened its stakes in the property business PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk (ESTA).

body: PT BPD Jawa Timur Tbk (BJTM) channelled credits of IDR 53.39 trillion throughout 2023, increasing from IDR 46.19 trillion in 2022.

body: Total incoming bids submitted during the auction of Government Securities (SUN) yesterday (16/1) were reported at IDR 67.56 trillion.

body: PT Aneka sold 1.86% of its shares in PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA) gradually, from December 27, 2023, to last week (12/1).

body: On Monday, January 15, foreign investors purchased 379.97 million shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for a net volume of 147.38 million.

body: The stock PT MNC Sky Vision Tbk (MSKY) soared 35% at yesterday’s (16/1) closing bell. Investors were seen divesting their portions, making use of the stock price increase.

body: On Thursday, January 11, three investors in the tourism services company PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk (PANR) who did not exercise their rights in the rights issue had their ownership percentage decrease.

body: PT Megalestari Epack Sentosaraya Tbk (EPAC), a packaging manufacturer, shows improvement of performance despite not being able to score any profit in 2023.

body: Foreign investors purchased around 2.16 billion shares on Friday, January 12, resulting in a net foreign surplus of 223.38 million.

body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), a car manufacturer and distributor under Salim Group, has ended the joint venture (JV) agreement with Autobacs Seven Co., Ltd.

body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) gains strength to the green zone in the session II of today’s (16/1) trading session on the stock exchange.

title: HSBC Indonesia to offer global mutual fund MAGET A2 for public this January 18

title: LX International Corp officially takes over Adhi Kartiko Pratama
body: LX International Corp, a South Korean mining and commodity trading company, has officially acquired 7.27 billion shares of PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE).

body: PT Bentoel Internasional Investama Tbk (RMBA), one of the biggest cigarette manufacturers in Indonesia, has officially left (delisting) Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) starting today (16/1).

title: Soechi Lines to convert subsidiary’s jumbo loans to equity

title: Humpuss Maritim Internasional sets up capex of IDR 802.50 billion
body: PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), an integrated maritime transportation and service provider, has allocated its capital expenditure (capex) for 2024 of IDR 802.5 billion.

body: PT Damai Sejahtera Abadi Tbk (UFOE), a retail company for electronic appliances, has formed a new subsidiary in Tangerang, West Java.

title: Panorama Tirta now owns 47.51% of Panorama Sentrawisata (PANR) after taking part in the rights issue
body: On Wednesday, January 10, the tourism services company PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk (PANR) issued another 187.50 million shares on the stock market as part of a rights issue.

title: An increase in foreign purchases brings net foreign volume back to the green zone
body: Foreign buying volume increased to 2.25 billion shares on Thursday, January 11, which brought back the net foreign to the green zone at 238.97 million shares.

title: Bank Mayapada aims for IDR 4 trillion in rights issue
body: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) seeks fresh funds of IDR 4 trillion through the capital increase with preemptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: MYOH to arrange tender offer of TRIA’s shares at IDR 281 each

title: Indicative target for Tuesday's SUN auction set between IDR 24 trillion to IDR 36 trillion
body: The government sets an indicative target in the auction of Government Debt Securities (SUN) in rupiah currency on Tuesday (16/1/2024) of IDR 24 trillion to IDR 36 trillion. The auction is an effort to meet part of the 2024 APBN financing target.

title: November 2023, foreign debt increased to US$ 400.9 billion

title: 2023 export value recorded at US$ 258.82 billion, down by 11.33%

This issuer has not been able to pay the principal of the Bond due to the decline in performance in the third quarter of 2023.

title: Share buyback, Bank Amar realized IDR 62.15 billion

title: MNC Kapital offers double digit bond coupons, highest at 11.69%

title: Buana Finance bags IDR 100 billion credit facility from Bank QNB Indonesia

title: Supreme Cable will carry out stock split with 1:4 ratio

title: Govt to hold another SUN auction next week, aiming for IDR 24 trillion

title: Topindo Solusi Komunika offers 875 million shares via IPO
body: PT Topindo Solusi Komunika Tbk (TOSK), the technology company that developed the Topindoku digital platform, will release 875 million shares through an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI).

title: RICY completes downsize of distribution business lines
body: PT Ricky Putra Globalindo Tbk (RICY) closed its subsidiary, PT RT Mahkota Globalindo (RTM), which operates in the distribution sector. Previously, this issuer had 12 subsidiaries in the garment product distribution line.

title: Griptha sets IPO price at IDR 103 per share, aiming for IDR 20.6 billion
body: PT Griptha Putra Persada Tbk (GRPH) has set the initial offering price for 200 million shares at IDR 103 per share. In the corporate action which will take place from Friday (12/1) to next week (16/1), this hotel issuer is targeting fresh funds of IDR 20.6 billion.

title: Siwa Bali becomes a new investor in Fuji Finance (FUJI), while two other investors reduce their stakes
body: PT Siwa Bali Property recently became a new investor in the multi-finance business PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk (FUJI) after purchasing 260 million shares on Tuesday, January 9.

title: Indonesia issues 3 series of global bonds worth US$2.05 billion
body: The Indonesian government has issued Government Debt Securities (SUN) in foreign currency denominated in United States (US) dollars amounting to US$ 2.05 billion in SEC-Registered format.

title: Pefindo lowered Wijaya Karya's rating to "idSD" due to failure to pay
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has lowered the rating of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) Phase I/2020 Series A of Shelf Registration Sukuk Mudharabah I to 'idD(sy)" from previously "idCCC(sy)".

title: JCI climbs to green zone in first session
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) was in the green zone in the morning trading session, Friday (12/1). The index performance this morning was better than the close of stock trading, Thursday (11/1).

title: CIMB Niaga announces private placement of 10.59 million shares
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) will carry out additional capital without pre-emptive rights (PMTHMETD) or private placement, by issuing 10.59 million shares.

title: Nusantara Sawit realized 53.42% IPO funds
body: PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS) realized 53.42% of the net proceeds from its initial public offering of IDR 430.51 billion. The largest realization was for capital expenditure of its subsidiary, PT Borneo Sawit Perdana (BSP).

title: Deposit growth slows down in 2023
body: The growth in the value of savings (deposits) in November 2023 increased by around 3% compared to the same period in 2022. When referring to deposits in December 2022, the value of deposits in November 2023 only increased 0.86%.

title: APG and ADIA team up with INA in funding 2 sections of Trans Jawa Toll Road
body: APG Asset Management NV (APG) and the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA) have followed up on the memorandum of understanding signed in 2021, to invest in the Trans Jawa Toll Road together with the Indonesia Investment Authority (INA).

title: Sunindo Pratama secures credit facility of US$ 3 million from Bank ICBC Indonesia
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI), a distributor of machinery and metal goods for construction, has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank ICBC Indonesia (ICBC) with a total value of US$3 million.

title: Foreign sell reaches 2 billion shares; net foreign volume drops to -390 million shares
body: On Wednesday, January 10, the foreign sell volume reached 2.15 billion shares, while the foreign buy volume was approximately 1.76 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -390.36 million shares.

title: Two investors sell Radiant Utama (RUIS) shares at once
body: Two investors sold shares of PT Radiant Utama Interinsco Tbk (RUIS), an oil and gas company, at the same time on Monday, January 8.

title: Ikapharmindo realises 25% of working capital allocation from IPO
body: PT Ikapharmindo Putramas Tbk (IKPM) has realised 25% of its working capital allocation taken out of the proceeds of its initial public offering (IPO) in November 2023.

title: Incoming bids in sukuk auction reach IDR 28.3 trillion
body: The total incoming bids in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on Wednesday (9/1) were recorded at IDR 28.3 trillion.

title: United Bike’s manufacturer to debut, issuing 1.66 billion shares next month
body: PT Terang Dunia Internusa Tbk (UNTD), the United Bike manufacturer, will hold its initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 1.66 billion shares.

title: HOKI obtains IDR 130 billion loan
body: PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk (HOKI) receives a loan of IDR 130 billion from PT Buyung Putra Pangan (BPP) for acquisition of raw materials and operational activities.

title: Nany Indrawaty to divest all shares in LAPD
body: Nany Indrawaty Sutanto divested all of her shares in PT Leyand International Tbk (LAPD) in a transaction held earlier this week.

title: Joining hands with KNOC, Pertamina to develop Rig-to-CCS
body: PT Pertamina (Persero) pairs up with Korea National Oil Corporation (KNOC) to develop rig-to-carbon-capture-storage (CCS), a technology of utilising idle offshore oil and gas platform as CCS.

title: GSMF to allocate IDR 25 billion for investment management spin-off
body: PT Equity Development Investment Tbk (GSMF) has channelled extra capital to PT Equity Sekuritas Indonesia (ESI) of IDR 25 billion.

title: Inflation to skyrocket in April 2024
body: Inflation in April 2024 will soar compared to February and May 2024.

title: AKRA to channel extra IDR 278 billion of capital to 2 subsidiaries
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), an oil fuel trading company, has channelled additional capital to two of its subsidiaries, PT Anugerah Krida Retailindo (Akrida) and PT Andahanesa Abadi (AA).

title: Previously seen in red zone, JCI crawled up to green zone
body: Throughout Wednesday (10/1), the Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) rose to the green zone after trading on Tuesday (9/1) being in the red zone.

title: Foreign buying volume nearly hit 2 billion shares, with a surplus net foreign of 223 million shares
body: Foreign buying volume on Tuesday, January 9, nearly hit 2 billion shares, while foreign selling volume was 1.72 billion shares.

title: Kreasi Gemilang Sejati becomes a new investor, and now controls 5.58% of Agro Bahari (UDNG) shares
body: On Friday, January 5, several investors made new investments in three different issuers, with a share ownership of approximately 5%.

title: MLPT’s subsidiary obtains IDR 162.61 billion loan from Bank Permata
body: PT Visionet Data Internasional (VDI), a subsidiary of PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT) providing IT managed services, has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI).

title: Hermina Hospital will hold MESOP phase I
body: PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the manager of the Hermina Hospital network, will hold a Management and Employee Stock Option Program (MESOP) starting next week (17-23/1).

title: Pefindo lowers ZINC rating after default on bond debt
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has lowered the rating of Bond I Series E 2018 issued by PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk (ZINC), following the failure to pay the bond principal amounting to IDR 23 billion

title: Stock price went up 14.2%, AVIA to resume buyback
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) will continue its share buyback program after its share price rose 14.2% to IDR 500 per share, just 2 weeks after the share buyback program started.

title: MPTIS to hold tender offer of META’s shares
body: PT Metro Pacific Tollways Indonesia Services (MPTIS) will hold a voluntary tender offer of 4.49 billion shares of PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META) for a month, starting in two weeks (25/1 – 25/2).

title: ADHI scored target-surpassing contracts in 2023
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) secured new contract throughout 2023 worth IDR 37.4 trillion, soaring 58% from IDR 23.7 trillion seen in 2022.

title: HBAT realises 78.95% of IPO proceeds
body: PT Minahasa Membangun Hebat Tbk (HBAT) has realised 78.95% of the proceeds of Initial Public Offering (IPO) on August 7, 2023.

title: Debuting in Q4 2023, 9 issuers decline
body: The performance of 9 issuers is reported declining after holding its initial public offering (IPO) in Q4 2023.

title: PURI to transfer The Monde City construction to an affiliate
body: PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk (PURI) has transferred the mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) work contract of The Monde City Apartment, Batam, to one of its affiliates.

title: Mora Telematika eyes IDR 750 billion through sukuk issuance
body: PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA), a telecommunication and internet service provider, will issue Shelf-Registration Sukuk Ijarah II of Moratelindo Phase II Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 750 billion.

title: Although total foreign transactions decrease, net foreign remains in the green
body: Foreign share purchasing and selling activities on Monday, January 8, continued a declining trend from previous trading days, with a foreign buy volume of 1.85 billion shares and a foreign sell volume of only 1.64 billion.

title: Two new investors acquire billions of new shares in Bank MNC Internasional (BABP)
body: PT Bank MNC Internasional Tbk (BABP), an MNC Group banking company, received two new investors at the same time on Thursday, January 4, with share acquisitions totaling billions of shares.

title: Despite a fall in foreign transactions, net foreign hits a 203 million share surplus
body: Foreign investors' purchases and sales of shares fell slightly on Friday, January 5, compared to the previous trading day.

title: JCI slipped at today’s session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) continues to decline since today’s (9/1) morning session until nearing the closing bell.

title: Siwa Bali now controls 20% of FUJI
body: PT Siwa Bali Property (SBP) takes over 20% of PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk (FUJI) following a transaction last week (5/1).

title: Awal Bros Hospital spares IDR 59.18 billion of IPO proceeds
body: PT Famon Awal Bros Sedaya Tbk (PRAY), the managing company of Awal Bros Hospital network, reported unrealised IPO proceeds of IDR 59.18 billion saved up in the bank with an interest of 6.8% per annum.

title: IDIC: credit expansion will affect non-third-party funding
body: Credit channelling expansion will increase the portion of fundings of non-Third-Party Funds (lit. Dana Pihak Ketiga/DPK).

title: Officially debuting, NICE recorded 15.72 times oversubscription
body: The stock of PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE) has been officially listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Tuesday (9/1) after holding its initial public offering (IPO) of 1.21 billion shares.

title: December 2023, IDX reported 22.97% surge in market cap
body: Market capitalisation (market cap) of all issuers in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in December 2023 was recorded at IDR 11.67 quadrillion, shifting 22.97% from December 2022 worth IDR 9.49 quadrillion.

title: PYFA granted approval from shareholders to offer 16 billion shares in rights issue
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), a pharmaceutical company operating since 1997, has managed to obtained approval during the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders regarding the rights issue.

title: Lawson Indonesia to receive more capital, this time IDR 100 billion
body: PT Lancar Wiguna Sejahtera (LWS), the managing company of Lawson outlets in Indonesia, has been granted extra capital worth IDR 100 billion from its shareholders.

title: MSIE to acquire shareholder’s entity for IDR 2.17 billion
body: PT Multisarana Intan Eduka Tbk (MSIE) has acquired PT Surya Kebenaran Nusantara (SKN), a business entity owned by the shareholder of the company.

title: Two investors divested 20% at FUJI
body: Indovalue Capital Asset Management Ltd (ICAM) and PT Charnic Capital Tbk (NICK) have divested their portions of 9.4% and 10.6% in PT Fuji Finance Indonesia Tbk (FUJI) in transactions last week (5/1).

title: Armada Berjaya Trans to add 7 CDD box trucks to its fleet
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA), a company engaged in the transportation for general goods, has reportedly acquired 7 units of CDD box trucks.

title: Commissioner stocks up UFO Elektronika’s shares
body: Approximately 2 million shares of PT UFO Elektronika Tbk (UFOE) have been once again acquired by its President Commissioner, Pudji Harianto, through two transactions on January 2 and 4, 2024.

title: Indonesia’s forex reserves went up in December 2023
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) recorded foreign exchange (forex) reserves of USD 146.4 billion as of December 2023, shifting 5.7% from USD 138.1 billion in November 2023.

title: RGAS realises 85.56% of IPO proceeds
body: PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk (RGAS) has realised 85.56% of the proceeds of initial public offering (IPO), or IDR 30.11 billion of total IDR 35.19 billion.

title: Dewata Freightinternational (DEAL) gains another two new individual investors
body: On Wednesday, January 3, PT Dewata Freightinternational Tbk (DEAL), a logistics and shipping company, welcomed two new investors.

title: Two airlines of Rusdi Kirana to operate in Dhoho Kediri Airport
body: Super Air Jet (SAJ) and Batik Air airlines have been confirmed to initiate its first operation in Dhoho Kediri Airport owned by PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM).

title: Foreign transactions show stable figures at around 2 billion shares with a net surplus volume of 207 million
body: On Thursday, January 4, foreign buying volume was stable at roughly 2.06 billion shares, while foreign selling volume was 1.85 billion shares.

title: Making its debut, Samcro Hyosung aims for IDR 74.93 billion in IPO
body: PT Samcro Hyosung Adilestari Tbk (ACRO) is currently holding its initial public offering (IPO) of 693.82 million of shares worth IDR 20 each.

title: PTPP wraps up 2023 with new contracts of IDR 31.67 trillion
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), one of state-owned construction enterprises, reported new contracts throughout 2023 of IDR 31.67 trillion as of December 2023.

title: Sumber Mineral Global Abadi issues 1.75 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Sumber Mineral Global Abadi Tbk (SMGA), a nickel ore and coal trading company, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 1.75 billion shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Debuting, MANG to seek IDR 76.25 billion in IPO
body: PT Manggung Polahraya Tbk (MANG) aims to bag IDR 76.25 billion through its initial public offering (IPO) of 762.5 million shares for IDR 100 each.

title: Setting IPO price to IDR 300, MSJA potentially bags IDR 264.7 billion
body: PT Multi Spunindo Jaya Tbk (MSJA) has set the stock price in its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 300 per share.

title: DMMX to pair up with hotels and retails in AI-based smart retail
body: PT Digital Mediatama Maxima Tbk (DMMX) has implemented an Artificial Intelligence (AI) based smart retail solution in several locations, including the Middle East, South America, and Southeast Asia.

title: HDIT bid farewell to two directors
body: PT Hensel Davest Indonesia Tbk (HDIT) is left by its director and commissioner, taking effect starting today (5/1).

title: It’s official, Chandra Asri changes its last name
body: The Ministry of Law and Human Rights have approved the name change of PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA) to PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA), yesterday (3/1).

title: Foreign sales volume reaches 2 billion shares; net foreign volume closes at minus 515 million shares
body: Transactions by foreign investors on Wednesday, January 3, recorded a foreign-sell volume of 2.35 billion shares.

title: Dewata Freightinternational (DEAL) welcomes two new individual investors at once
body: On Friday, December 29, PT Dewata Freightinternational Tbk (DEAL), a logistics and shipping company, welcomed two new individual investors at the same time.

title: Foreign investors buy up Astrindo Nusantara (BIPI) shares; net foreign reaches 401 million shares
body: On Tuesday, January 2, foreign investors were seen purchasing 140.81 million shares of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), resulting in a net volume of 128.19 million shares.

title: Bank IBK to carry out rights issue after EGMS
body: PT Bank IBK Indonesia TBK (AGRS) will hold a rights issue by issuing a maximum of 11.70 billion shares with a nominal value of IDR 100 per share. This plan will be decided at the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders (EGMS) on (13/2).

title: Several EURO directors sell their stake in EURO
body: PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) shareholders are busy selling their shares in transactions that took place last week of December 2023.

title: Leadership shifts around the globe, 40 countries to hold elections this year
body: At least 40 countries will hold presidential/general election throughout 2024. Fiscal policy of each candidate, such as tax exemption during Donald Trump’s term in the US, may determine the global market reaction.

title: CSAP to invest IDR 79.92 billion for consumer goods’ distribution
body: PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana Tbk (CSAP) has raised capital investment for PT Catur Sentosa Anugerah (CSAN) worth IDR 79.2 billion.

title: Debuting on IDX, Asri Karya Lestari is the first listed issuer this year
body: PT Asri Karya Lestari Tbk (ASLI) becomes the first company that makes its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in 2024, after holding its initial public offering (IPO) from December 29, 2023, until January 3, 2024.

title: Lautan Luas to consolidate water treatment business to Lautan Air Indonesia
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS) has consolidated all of its water treatment activities to PT Lautan Air Indonesia (LAI), a subsidiary formerly called PT Pacinesia Chemical Industry.

title: Sinergi Multi Lestarindo sets IPO price at IDR 175 per share
body: PT Sinergi Multi Lestarindo Tbk (SMLE) has set the Initial Public Offering (IPO) share price at IDR 175 per share, right at the lower limit of the price submitted during the initial offering (book building).

title: Raking in IDR 21.75 trillion from SUN auction, gov’t to set up state sukuk auction
body: Indonesian government will hold an auction of 7 series of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk with an indicative target of IDR 12 trillion on January 9, 2024.

title: SBI’s portion in VTNY increases
body: SBI Holdings Inc (SHI) has increased its direct ownership portion in PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VNTY).

title: PMMP to welcome 3 new investors and IDR 79 billion in private placement this January
body: PT Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk (PMMP) is planning a private placement, issuing 253.3 million new shares worth IDR 100 each on January 11, 2024.

title: BI confident CPI to arrive at 2.5% this year
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) is optimistic that the inflation of Consumer Price Index (CPI) will arrive at 2.5%-3.5% year-on-year (yoy) this year, following a solid synergy with government (central and regional).

title: Timothy Siddik’s portion in ZYRX rises to 61.04%
body: Timothy Siddik Shu adds 4.7% into its portion in PT Zyrexindo Mandiri Buana Tbk (ZYRX) via PT Binexcom Mandiri Buana (BMB).

title: LUCY seeks extra IDR 87.72 billion in a rights issue
body: PT Lima Dua Lima Tiga Tbk (LUCY), the managing company of Lucy in The Sky bar, plans to collect fresh funds by increasing capital through pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: PKPK to redirect rights issue proceeds to acquire mining company
body: PT Perdana Karya Perkasa Tbk (PKPK), an oil and gas industry support, will transfer some of its rights issue proceeds to acquire an affiliate.

title: Pushing for efficiency, MDKA to rent heavy equipment from subsidiaries
body: PT Merdeka Mining Indonesia (MMI), a subsidiary of PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), has signed a heavy equipment rental agreement with three other subsidiaries of MDKA.

title: Danatama Makmur is now shareholder of ITMA
body: PT Danatama Makmur Sekuritas (DMS) now serves as one of shareholders of PT Sumber Energi Andalan Tbk (ITMA) starting from last week (28/12). Its portion in ITMA now reaches 6.39% from the initial 0%.

title: Mayapada Hospital establish two new subsidiaries in the beginning of this year
body: PT Sejahtera Anugrahjaya Tbk (SRAJ), the issuer that manages Mayapada Hospital, introduced two new subsidiaries, PT Anugrah Inti Bahagia (AIB) and PT Anugrahsukses Utama Sejahtera (AUS), to support its business activities.

title: PALM injected IDR 1.86 trillion capital for subsidiary
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) injected IDR 1.86 trillion into capital for its subsidiary, PT Suwarna Arta Mandiri (SAM). The capital disbursement was in 1.86 million shares with a nominal value of IDR 1 million per share.

title: United Tractors grants USD 30 million loan to subsidiary
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), a heavy equipment company under Astra Group, agreed upon the loan given to its subsidiary, PT Multi Prima Universal (MPU), worth USD 30 million.

title: MMIX obtains IDR 60 billion capital loan from BANK
body: PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk (MMIX) secures a loan facility of IDR 60 billion for working capital from PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk (BANK).

title: Nanotech Indonesia takes over 51% of Cheria Halal Wisata
body: PT Nanotech Indonesia Global Tbk (NANO) has acquired 51% of PT Cheria Halal Wisata from its own parent, PT Nanotech Investama Sedaya (NIS).

title: Selling buyback shares, Wismilak raises IDR 12.96 billion
body: PT Wismilak Inti Makmur Tbk (WIIM), a processed tobacco manufacturer, bags IDR 12.96 billion from divesting 3.79 million shares.

title: LUCY to acquire two companies
body: PT Lima Dua Lima Tiga Tbk (LUCY), a restaurant chain managing company, will acquire 51% of PT Kreasi Sejahtera Bahagia (KSB) and 54% of PT Graha Senopati Sentosa (GSS).

title: Entering 2024, IDX already breaks record in JCI and market cap
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) officially opened the trading session in 2024 yesterday (2/1), witnessed by Vice President of Indonesia, Ma’ruf Amin.

title: PYFA to divest its portion in Mega Inter Distrindo
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) and its subsidiary, PT Pyfa Sehat Indonesia (PSI), have transferred their portions in PT Mega Inter Distrindo (MID) to PT Sukses Makmur Abadi (SMA) and its affiliate, PT Sari Murni Abadi.

title: META to channel IDR 45.17 billion to acquire mini hydropower plant
body: PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META) has signed a Sale and Purchase Deed with PT Pembangunan Perumahan Energi (PP Energi) regarding capital portions in PT Inpola Meka Energi (IME).

title: Adaro Minerals to inject IDR 376.7 billion of capital to subsidiary
body: PT Adaro Minerals Indonesia Tbk (ADMR), a coal mining company under Adaro Group, has channelled an extra capital of IDR 376.7 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Alam Tri Cakra Indonesia (ATCI).

title: VKTR to work on factory expansion with Bakrie Construction
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR) has signed a construction agreement with PT Bakrie Construction, one of its affiliates, for a factory and office construction in Central Java.

title: MAYA seeks IDR 4.01 trillion via rights issue
body: PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) is eyeing to raise IDR 4.01 trillion via rights issue of 26.74 billion series B shares of IDR 100 each.

title: SIPD to channel IDR 496.23 billion to Belfoods, 75% for capex
body: PT Sreeya Sewu Indonesia Tbk (SIPD) has reportedly allocated IDR 496.23 billion as extra capital to its subsidiary, PT Belfoods Indonesia.

title: CASS restructures its subsidiaries
body: PT Cardig Aero Services Tbk (CASS) restructured the share ownership of PT Cardig Anugrah Sarana Catering (CASC) by purchasing 2.204 million shares owned by Anugerah Gemilang Pte Ltd.

title: Refinancing and investment, DOID subsidiary secures US$ 750 million facility from BNI
body: A subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BMMA), has received a loan facility from PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk worth US$750 million.

title: Natureverse Inc. acquired 1.3 billion SLJ Global shares from UOB Kay Hian
body: On Tuesday (December 28), the transfer of 1.3 billion shares of PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI) kicked off market hints.

title: Remains in the green zone; net foreign volume hit 58.35 million shares
body: In line with previous trading days, net foreign volume on Friday, December 29, remained positive at roughly 58.35 million shares.

title: Fersindo Nusa now controls 5.8% of Estee Gold Feet (EURO) after purchasing 147 million shares
body: On Monday (December 27), PT Fersindo Nusa Jaya began the market hint by investing in PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO).

title: Foreign buying and selling volumes are steady, and net foreign closes at a surplus of 119.13 million shares
body: Share buying and selling transactions by foreign investors on Thursday, December 28, resulted in a foreign buying volume of 1.76 billion shares and a foreign selling volume of 1.64 billion shares.

title: Gerbangmas Tunggal acquires 22.56 billion Smartfren (FREN) shares
body: On Friday, December 22, PT Gerbangmas Tunggal Sejahtera became the new investor, acquiring 6.73% ownership of PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) through PT Sinarmas Sekuritas by purchasing 22.56 billion shares.

title: Foreign investors buy up Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares; net foreign volume reaches 925 million
body: On Wednesday, December 27, foreign investors purchased 293.76 million shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of 180.91 million shares.

title: Asri Karya Lestari to offer IPO price of IDR 100 per share
body: PT Asri Karya Lestari Tbk (ASLI), a construction contractor, has set the price of its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 100 per share.

title: Investing 1.12 billion shares, Denaya Cakra becomes a new investor in Bukaka Teknik Utama (BUKK)
body: On Thursday, December 21, PT Bukaka Teknik Utama Tbk (BUKK), which specialises in manufacturing and providing specific equipment in the construction sector, welcomed PT Denaya Cakra Cipta as a new investor.

title: Indonesian gov’t seeks IDR 25 trillion from SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) with an indicative target of IDR 25 trillion next Wednesday (3/1).

title: 16 constituents of Indeks52 set up interim dividend distributions
body: 16 constituents of Indeks52 reportedly plan interim dividend distributions for the fiscal year 2023. Some of them had distributed the dividends last year, while some others schedule the payment in early 2024.

title: Foreign purchasing and selling volumes slightly differ; net foreign volume closes at minus 24 million shares
body: Foreign purchasing and selling volumes were equally in the 1.6 billion share range on Friday, December 22, with foreign buying volume at 1.63 billion shares and foreign selling volume at 1.66 billion shares.

title: Citra Borneo Indah paid off its debt to Sawit Sumbermas with 1.64 billion CBUT shares
body: As the majority shareholder of PT Citra Borneo Utama Tbk (CBUT), PT Citra Borneo Indah settled its debt to PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk on Wednesday, December 20, with a debt-to-equity swap mechanism.

title: Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) is at the top of the buy list; net foreign volume closed at 357.20 million shares
body: Foreign investors bought the biggest shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Thursday, December 21.

title: Two major individual shareholders trade Tourindo Guide (PGJO) shares
body: Individual investors led the list of market hints on Tuesday, December 19. In the tourism sector, Hendri Widodo purchased 76.05 million shares of PT Tourindo Guide Indonesia Tbk (PGJO), while Ing Ing Cindy Eva sold 61.05 million shares of the same company.

title: Prajogo Pangestu’s companies secure highest growth rate in Indeks52
body: Prajogo Pangestu’s business group obtains the highest growth percentage in market capitalisation among constituents of Indeks52, as shown by PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA) and PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT) with 152.40% and 79,73% growth, respectively.

title: Bank Woori to set up interim dividend of IDR 171.36 billion this January
body: PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA) agrees upon the plan of interim dividend distribution for the fiscal year 2023, with total allocation of IDR 171.36 billion, on January 26, 2024.

title: Closing 2023, IDX records 903 issuers and 12.16 million investors
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) officially closes 2023 trading session last Friday (29/1) with a series of achievements and growth from 2022.

title: Setting IPO price to IDR 388 each, CGAS eyes potential IDR 179.62 billion
body: PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS), a company engaged in the natural gas distribution, has set the price of its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 338 per share.

title: Supporting subsidiary, Mahkota Group to put IDR 150 billion as collateral
body: PT Mahkota Group Tbk (MGRO), a palm plantation company, has granted deposit guarantee worth IDR 150 billion to creditors for the credit facility received by one of its subsidiaries, PT Intan Sejati Andalan (ISA).

title: ERAA to channel extra capital to maintain portion at Teknologi Belanja Digital
body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), through one of its subsidiaries, Eraspace Pte. Ltd., has channelled additional capital to PT Teknologi Belanja Digital (TBD) in order to keep its stock ownership.

title: UNTR and PAMA channel extra capital to Danusa Tambang Nusantara
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) and one of its subsidiaries, PT Pamapersada Nusantara (PAMA), have granted extra capital support to another of its subsidiaries, PT Danusa Tambang Nusantara (DTN).

title: Set on PIK 2 expansion, PANI spends IDR 991 billion for land acquisition
body: In its mission to expand the area of Pantai Indah Kapuk 2, PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI), through its subsidiary, PT Panorama Eka Tunggal (PET), carries out land acquisition of 357,081 m2 of land in Teluknaga, Banten, from two of its affiliates.

title: MKNT divests its business unit for IDR 24.44 billion
body: PT Mitra Komunikasi Nusantara Tbk (MKNT), a telecommunication product trading company, has sold one of its business unit, PT Catalist Integra Prima Sukses (CIPS).

title: Selamat Sempurna bags IDR 4 billion of dividend from subsidiary
body: Closing the year 2023, PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM), a manufacturer of machine and automotive spare parts, reported extra dividend income from its subsidiary.

title: Wrapping up transactions with HKCBL, Antam is all set for nickel downstream
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) announces the completion of a series of shares’ sale and purchase, as well as an establishment of a new joint venture (JV) with HongKong CBL Limited (HKCBL), regarding its plan of nickel downstream to further advance the electric vehicle (EV) battery ecosystem in Indonesia.

title: ENVY to secure shareholder loan facility of IDR 16 billion
body: PT Envy Technologies Indonesia Tbk (ENVY), an information technology service and trading company, has obtained a shareholder loan facility from PT Envy Manajemen Konsultasi (EMK) worth IDR 16 billion.

title: PTPP to extend its treasury stock sale
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), a state-owned construction and investment company, has extended the term of its treasury stock sale.

title: Bayan Resources assigned affiliate to work on Senyiur jetty worth IDR 167.72 billion
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), a coal mining company, announces the official plan to assign the contract for construction of jetty facility in Senyiur, East Kalimantan to its affiliate, PT Nirmala Matranusa (NMN).

title: Batavia Prosperindo Internasional to channel IDR 5.29 billion of capital to subsidiary
body: PT Batavia Prosperindo Internasional Tbk (BPII) has increased the issued and paid-up capital following extra capital investment of 23% in PT Arto Investama Pramathana (ARTO).

title: Profit at minus, PPRO still confident of 40% revenue surge in 2024
body: Despite its loss of IDR 118.85 billion until the end of Q3 2023, PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO) eyes 2024 optimistically by aiming to secure 30%-50% surge in its sales next year.

title: DSSA to secure USD 181.5 million loan from Bank Mandiri and Bank Woori
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA), a coal mining company under Sinarmas Group, has obtained a loan facility worth USD 181.5 million.

title: BCAP eyes IDR 260 billion through bonds’ issuance
body: PT MNC Kapital Indonesia Tbk (BCAP) will issue its Shelf-Registration IV Phase I Year 2023 with principal of IDR 260 billion.

title: CUAN sets up domestic marine transportation business, investing IDR 9.99 billion
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN), a holding and management consultancy company, has established a new subsidiary called PT Armada Maritim Persada (AMP).

title: Erajaya Swasembada’s subsidiary to receive IDR 32.25 billion extra capital
body: One of many subsidiaries of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), PT Era Sukses Abadi (ESA), has reportedly received extra capital of IDR 32.25 billion from its shareholders.

title: Let's take a look at five most profitable stocks in Indeks52
body: Stocks of 96 constituents of Indeks52, coming from Main Index, High Dividend, High Growth, and Big Market Capitalisation categories, have shown positive growth rate up until last week (22/12).

title: Medco Power Indonesia eyes IDR 750 billion through sukuk issuance
body: PT Medco Power Indonesia (MPI), a subsidiary of PT Medco Energy Internasional Tbk (MEDC), will issue Shelf-Registration Sukuk Wakalah I Phase III Year 2024 with total principal of IDR 750 billion.

title: Baramulti Suksessarana to set up interim dividend of USD 20 million
body: PT Baramulti Suksessarana Tbk (BSSR) will distribute interim dividend of USD 20 million for 22.61 billion of its shares.

title: JAYA grants IDR 3.15 billion loan to subsidiary
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA) has reportedly given a loan facility worth IDR 3.15 billion to its subsidiary, PT Aman Bae Perkasa (ABP), on December 26, 2023.

title: Securing IDR 1.2 trillion contract with PLN, KEEN to work on PLTM Salu Noling
body: PT Kencana Energi Lestari Tbk (KEEN) has signed a Power Sale and Purchase Agreement (PSPA) with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero), or PLN, in relation to their plan to build and manage the operation of PLTM Salu Noling.

title: Coal sales volume up, UNTR saw decline in gold and heavy equipment
body: Volume of coal sales recorded by two subsidiaries of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) increased approximately 15% year-on-year (yoy) as of November 2023, while gold production and heavy equipment declined.

title: PANI invested IDR 50 billion for in IKN property projects
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) announced its latest investment in the National Capital City (IKN) through the investment of minority shares in PT Kusuma Putra Alam (KPA).

title: Waskita Toll Road injects subsidiary with IDR 1.29 billion of fresh funds
body: PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), has distributed a capital injection of IDR 1.29 billion to PT Waskita Bumi Wira (WBW).

title: Gozco Plantation’s subsidiary secured IDR 450 billion loan from BSI
body: PT Suryabumi Agrolanggeng (SA), one of many subsidiaries of PT Gozco Plantation Tbk (GZCO), has obtained a loan facility worth IDR 450 billion from PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) or BSI.

title: Expanding to wood pellets, MBAP’s subsidiary granted USD 51.2 million loan from NISP
body: PT Malinau Hijau Nusantara (MHL), a subsidiary of PT Mitrabara Adiperdana Tbk (MBAP), has signed a loan facility agreement worth a total of USD 51.2 million with PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP).

title: Strengthening supply chain, FKS Multi Agro invested in capital and established PT Padi Raya Sejahtera
body: To strengthen the supply chain, PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk (FISH), invested shares in PT Berill Jaya Sejahtera (BJS), a local company in Semarang which engages in the rice milling and polishing industry, as well as rice trading.

title: Ford Motor Company injects IDR 88.7 billion in Kolaka Nickel Indonesia
body: Ford Motor Company, a leading multinational car manufacturer from the U.S, has invested a large amount of capital in PT Kolaka Nickel Indonesia (KNI).

title: Tokopedia’s co-founder sold 746.6 million of his shares in GOTO
body: William Tanuwijaya, Co-Founder of Tokopedia, divests 764.6 million of his shares in PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) for IDR 91.7 each. The total transaction was worth IDR 70.11 billion, which lasted from last week until earlier this week (14-18/12).

title: FAST claims 70% of Jagonya Ayam Indonesia
body: PT Fast Food Indonesia Tbk (FAST), the managing company of KFC fast food chain in Indonesia, now owns 70% of PT Jagonya Ayam Indonesia (JAI), the supplier of broilers for KFC.

title: Griptha Putra Persada to offer 200 million shares in IPO
body: PT Griptha Putra Persada Tbk (GRPH) will hold its Initial Public Offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by issuing 200 million shares.

title: Matahari Department Store to switch up directors and commissioners
body: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk (LPPF), a retail company operating since 1958, has changed the board of directors and commissioners after conducting its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders today (22/12).

title: Notes exchanged, SSMS now hold the majority of CBUT
body: PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk (SSMS) is now the major shareholder of PT Citra Borneo Utama Tbk (CBUT) after concluding the exchange of its notes (exchangeable notes) with PT Citra Borneso Indah (CBI).

title: With gov’t support, WSKT seeks IDR 17 trillion new contracts in 2024
body: Supported by the government, PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) is optimistic about attaining new contract target in 2024 of IDR 17 trillion.

title: Rights issue in January 2024, PANR eyes IDR 75 billion
body: PT Panorama Sentrawisata Tbk (PANR) aims to secure fresh funds of IDR 75 billion in a rights issue by offering 187.5 billion shares on January 8-19, 2024.

title: Transforming business, Bank KB Bukopin confident on 15% credit surge in 2024
body: PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (BBKP), a private bank, now under KB Financial Group from South Korea, aims for new credit growth of 15% in 2024, which will be supported by the wholesale segment and Korean business ecosystem.

title: Divesting, UOB Kay Hian secures IDR 78.75 billion from BOLT
body: UOB Kay Hian Pte Ltd rakes in IDR 78.75 billion after divesting 112.5 million of its shares in PT Garuda Metalindo Tbk (BOLT) in a transaction held earlier this week (8/12). The divestment is valued at IDR 700 per share.

title: Debuting, Samcro Hyosung Adilestari issues 693.82 million shares in IPO
body: PT Samcro Hyosung Adilestari Tbk (ACRO), a foreign company engaged in the hook and loop industry and trading, will offer 63.82 million shares through its initial public offering (IPO).

title: FREN to sell idle assets for IDR 544.21 billion to SMPlus
body: PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN), a wireless telecommunication service provider under Sinarmas Group, will divert unoptimized assets (idle) to PT SMPlus Sentra Data Persada.

title: PYFA to acquire Australian pharmaceutical company, Probiotec
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) has signed a Scheme Implementation Deed (SID) regarding the plan of one of its subsidiaries to take over shares of Probiotec, an Australia-based pharmaceutical company.

title: Erajaya Swasembada's subsidiary receives SGD 25 thousand of capital
body: Erajaya Property Holding Pte. Ltd. (EPH), a subsidiary of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), has been granted an extra capital of SGD 25 thousand.

title: OK Next Co, Ltd sells 3.67% stake in OK Bank to increase free float
body: OK Next Co, Ltd sold 3.67% of its shares in PT Bank Oke Indonesia Tbk (DNAR) in connection with the increase in free float shares. As of November 30 2023, this issuer's free float shares were recorded at 3.83% or amounting to 646.71 million shares.

title: Again, another TRJA’s shareholder to divest
body: PT Aneka, distributor of drilling machine, divests its portion in PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA), taking the same action led by two other shareholders, PT Damai Investama Sukses (DIS) and PT MSJ Investama Abadi (MIA), which had divested theirs prior.

title: Expanding distribution network, Ultrajaya’s DC in MM2100 to begin operation in 2024
body: Entering 2024, PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry and Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ) prepares to reinforce its distribution network through a new distribution centre (DC) and new factory that will be ready to operate in the first quarter in 2024.

title: Sinergi Multi Lestarindo to offer 465.6 million shares in IPO
body: PT Sinergi Multi Lestarindo Tbk (SMLE), a supplier of chemicals for food, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) of 465.6 million shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Late payment of Bonds 2018, IDX to put ZINC in suspension
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) has temporarily suspended stock trading session of PT Kapuas Prima Coal Tbk (ZINC) as the company has yet to pay off principal of its Series E of Bonds I Year 2018 worth IDR 23 billion.

title: Incoming bids in state sukuk auction reach IDR 11.94 trillion
body: The number of incoming bids in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) was recorded at IDR 11.94 trillion, as officially disclosed by Directorate-General of Risk Management and Budget Financing of the Ministry of Finance.

title: Working on PLN project, Arkora Hydro to grant IDR 75 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Arkora Hydro Tbk (ARKO), has channelled a loan to one of its subsidiaries, PT Arkora Hydro Malili (AHM), which has won the tender offer from PT PLN (Persero) for Sulbangsel Micro-Hydropowerplant (PLTMH Sulbagsel).

title: MDKA to channel revolving loan of USD 100 million to MBMA
body: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA) grants a revolving credit facility with a maximum limit of USD 100 million to fund the operation of PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA). This affiliate transaction was signed yesterday (18/12).

title: Pairing up with IBM, Metrodata Electronics gets ready for AI development
body: Through its subsidiary, PT Synnex Metrodata Indonesia (SMI), PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL) is now the official distributor of IBM in Indonesia, which is projected to be able to reinforce its IT services to the commercial segment.

title: Strengthening distribution, CLEO invests IDR 180 billion in SPS
body: PT Sariguna Primatirta Tbk (CLEO), a manufacturer of packaged drinks, is injecting PT Sentralsari Primasentosa (SPS) with IDR 180 billion in capital to add 50 branches in 2024. The transaction value is around 13.93% of the company's total equity of IDR 1.29 trillion as of June 2023.

title: Investasi Sukses Bersama acquired 452 million Era Media shares, giving it a 5.85% stake
body: On Monday, December 18, PT Investasi Sukses Bersama acquired 452.28 million shares of PT Era Media Sejahtera Tbk (DOOH) through five different securities companies, giving it a 5.85% stake.

title: Improving services, JAYA to acquire 7 CDD box trucks
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA) acquires 7 more of its colt diesel double (CDD) box trucks to enhance its service quality for its consumers.

title: Adhi Kartiko Pratama offers 1.21 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE), a nickel ore mining company, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) of 1.21 billion shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: EGMS approves META’s go-private plan, setting price to IDR 250 per share
body: Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META) on December 19, 2023, agreed upon the plan to change the company’s status from a public company to a private company, and will soon set up a tender offer of IDR 250 per share.

title: Setting capex to IDR 320 billion, IRRA to branch out to durable medical devices
body: After COVID-19 crisis subsides, PT Itama Ranoraya Tbk (IRRA) tries to keep its business afloat by expanding into durable medical devices, which are projected to generate stable income in the long run.

title: Staying realistic, PTPP only eyes 5% growth in 2024
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) sets a moderate target in its new contract growth for 2024, only approximately 5% compared to the numbers obtained in 2023.

title: AGII secures syndicated loan from 4 banks
body: A gas company, PT Samator Indo Gas Tbk (AGII) acquires a syndicated loan from 4 banks worth IDR 4.6 trillion. This loan is set to a tenor of 84 month or 7 years, and consists of 4 types of facilities that will be used for refinancing and business expansion.

title: Duta Pertiwi’s shares in Intitirta Primasakti diluted 31.68%
body: Ownership of PT Duta Pertiwi Nusantara Tbk (DPNS) over shares of PT Intitirta Primasakti (IP) is diluted 31.68%, shrinking from 67.10% to 35.42%.

title: Creditors approve restructuring of MTN WKR III 2022
body: PT Waskita Karya Realty (WKR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), is restructuring Medium Term Notes III Year 2022 worth IDR 475 billion.

title: Subsidiaries dragging PTPP down, profit declined
body: PT PP Properti (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), a state-owned construction company, reveals the reason behind its profit slippage despite its confidence in its revenue performance.

title: MIDI to open 450 new stores next year
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI) sets up capital expenditure (capex) budget of IDR 1.4 trillion in 2024. This capex will be used to establish 450 new Alfamidi and Lawson outlets.

title: Foreign investors sold 218 million Bumi Resources (BUMI) shares; net foreign volume nearly reached -300 million shares
body: On Tuesday, December 19, foreign investors sold the most shares of the coal mining company PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), totaling 218.36 million shares with a net volume of -169.68 million shares.

title: Global Mediacom bought billions of shares from three different issuers
body: PT Global Mediacom Tbk spent quite a lot of money on Friday, December 15, after buying up billions of shares from three different issuers.

title: PGAS to pair up with WIFI to develop gas pipe network and internet service
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk (PGAS) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) regarding a collaboration in developing gas pipe network and internet service with PT Solusi Sinergi Digital Tbk (WIFI).

title: After successfully entering the green zone, net foreign volume ended with a 177 million surplus
body: Foreign net volume finally entered the green zone on Monday, December 18. Foreign investors purchased approximately 4.55 billion shares and sold around 4.38 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume surplus of about 177.97 million shares.

title: Tembaga Mulia Semanan to set up stock split of 1:2 ratio
body: PT Tembaga Mulia Semanan Tbk (TBMS), a copper wire and wire product manufacturer, will carry out a stock split with a ratio of 1:2.

title: HRTA signs gold export MoU worth USD 30.02 million with Brights Metal Refiners
body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA), a gold jewellery manufacturer and trading company, has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) of gold jewellery export with Bright Metal Refiners (BMR).

title: Waskita Karya to channel another IDR 33.99 billion to Trans Jabar Tol
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) has once again channelled extra capital of IDR 33.99 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Trans Jabar Tol (TJT).

title: Foreign investors sold billions of GOTO and BUMI shares, resulting in a net foreign loss of 230 million shares
body: On Friday, December 15, the volume of foreign investors buying and selling shares reached 6 billion shares; 6.35 billion shares were bought, and 6.58 billion shares were sold.

title: BUVA getting ready for private placement
body: PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk (BUVA) will initiate a private placement by issuing 1.20 billion shares of IDR 50 each.

title: Maspion Bank sets vision to become the 20 largest bank in Indonesia by 2027
body: Maspion Bank has set a new vision and mission to become a top 20 bank in Indonesia by 2027. To achieve this goal, the bank whose majority shares are now owned by Kasikorn Vision Financials Company Pte/Ltd (KVF) has set a number of strategies to achieve high growth and sustainable income.

title: GZCO secures additional land
body: PT Gozco Plantations Tbk (GZCO) will receive an additional 9,610 hectares (Ha) of plantation land and 3,154 Ha of mature plantations from PT Sinar Karya Mandiri (SKM)

title: BRI to channel IDR 12.65 trillion of interim dividend
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) will pay out interim dividend of IDR 12.65 trillion for the fiscal year 2023 on January 18, 2024.

title: DSSA bags USD 197 million loan
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA) obtains a loan facility worth USD 197 million for improving its working capital and covering general operational needs.

title: Dream big, BBYB eyes 25% credit growth and business turnaround in 2024
body: Confident with its credit growth, PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) sets up target of credit disbursement growth by 20%-25% in 2024.

title: ADRO to distribute interim dividend of USD 400 million
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) prepares for interim dividend distribution of USD 400 million for the fiscal year 2023 on January 12, 2024.

title: Citra Nusantara Gemilang to offer 531.42 million shares in IPO
body: PT Citra Nusantara Gemilang Tbk (CGAS), a natural gas trading and distribution company, will issue 531.42 million shares through its initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: KIAS obtains IDR 30 billion facility
body: PT Keramika Indonesia Assosiasi Tbk (KIAS) acquires a loan of IDR 30 billion for ceramic business line expansion.

title: MORA to issue Sukuk Ijarah 2024 for refinancing and investment
body: PT Mora Telematika Indonesia Tbk (MORA) will issue Shelf-Registration Sukuk Ijarah II Phase II Year 2024 worth IDR 750 billion, which will be used as means of refinancing and investment.

title: Bookbuilding starts today, Multi Spunindo Jaya eyes IDR 308.82 billion in IPO
body: PT Multi Spunindo Jaya Tbk (MSJA), a non-woven fabric manufacturer, sets out to debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by issuing approximately 882.35 million shares.

title: Securing USD 90 million, Star Energy to install loan to Bangkok Bank
body: Star Energy Group Holdings Pte Ltd (SEGHPL) has paid off some of its facility B loan owed to Bangkok Bank Public Co. Ltd. after securing USD 90 million from its parent company, PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN).

title: Go private, META to set price 34% higher
body: PT Nusantara Infrastructure Tbk (META) has set the tender offer price of IDR 250 per share in its going-private plan.

title: By buying 35 billion shares, UOB Kay Hian becomes the new majority shareholder of Intermedia Capital (MDIA)
body: On Wednesday, December 13, foreign investor UOB Kay Hian Ltd. purchased 35.29 billion shares of PT Intermedia Capital Tbk (MDIA), a television broadcasting firm.

title: Foreign buying and selling volume differ slightly; net foreign volume closes at -392.83 million shares
body: Foreign buying and selling volumes did not differ much on Thursday, December 14, with foreign buying volume at 4.03 billion shares and foreign selling volume at 4.42 billion shares.

title: Elnusa to introduce new tech for East Pondok Aren well drilling
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA), an energy company under Upstream Subholding of Pertamina, participates in East Pondok Aren (EPN) exploration well drilling initiated by PT Pertamina EP (PEP) Regional Jawa Subholding Upstream Pertamina in Bekasi, West Java.

title: After buying nearly 2 billion shares, Multi Artha now holds 89.48% of Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua (PANI)
body: On Tuesday, December 12, the majority shareholders of PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI), namely PT Multi Artha Pratama, were observed adding more PANI shares to their collection.

title: Manggung Polahraya to issue 762.5 million shares in IPO
body: PT Manggung Polaharaya Tbk (MANG), a construction service provider, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by issuing 762.5 million shares.

title: NFCX to dissolve its EV battery rental line
body: PT NFC Indonesia Tbk (NFCX) has winded down one of its business lines, PT Sewa Baterai Listrik (SBL), a subsidiary engaged in the electric vehicle battery rental business.

title: Allobank eyes 12% credit growth next year and 50% income growth in 2023
body: PT Allo Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBHI), or Allobank, plans to boost its credit distribution rate by 12% year-on-year (yoy) in 2024 to IDR 8.5 trillion and 50%-60% year-on-year (yoy) income surge at the end of 2023.

title: Asri Karya Lestari to issue 1.25 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Asri Karya Lestari Tbk (ASLI), a construction contractor, will begin its initial public offering of 1.25 billion shares on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Trimegah Sekuritas scored dividend of IDR 19.98 billion
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) has obtained incoming dividend worth IDR 19.98 billion from one of its subsidiaries, PT Trimegah Asset Management (Trimegah AM).

title: BREN to acquire several renewable energy companies
body: PT Barito Wind Energy (BEW), a subsidiary of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN), has taken over several companies engaged in the new and renewable energy sector.

title: Allobank to introduce RDN, launching in July 2024
body: PT Allo Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBHI), popularly known as Allobank, announces its plan to introduce its latest product, Rekening Dana Nasabah (RDN), next year to accomodate users' investment activities through its digital application.

title: SBI Holdings to raise portion in Venteny
body: SBI Holdings Inc., Japan, has increased its portion in PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) worth IDR 2.59 billion.

title: Transforming business, BNI Multifinance granted another IDR 400 billion capital
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) has channelled extra capital to PT BNI Multifinance (BNI MF) worth IDR 400 billion.

title: ISSP to allocate capex of IDR 200 billion next year
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP) allocates IDR 200 billion for its capital expenditure (capex) budget in 2024.

title: TAYS to allocate IDR 25 billion for 2024 capex
body: PT Jaya Swarsa Agung Tbk (TAYS) allocates capital expenditure (capex) budget of IDR 20 billion to IDR 25 billion in 2024.

title: Remaining in the red zone, net foreign volume is -1.19 billion shares
body: Foreigners continued to sell billions of shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Wednesday, December 13.

title: Three individual investors increased their stakes in Wintermar Offshore (WINS)
body: Individual investors seemed to dominate the share-buying list on Monday, December 11.

title: Foreign sales volume is almost 6 billion shares; net foreign remains negative at 2.07 billion shares
body: On Tuesday, December 12, foreign investors sold 3.76 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), resulting in a net volume of -1.80 billion shares.

title: Jasa Marga to channel IDR 2.7 trillion for paying off subsidiaries’ loans
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has granted shareholder loan to one of its subsidiaries, PT Jasamarga Kunciran Cengkareng (JKC).

title: Petrindo Jaya Kreasi to secure syndicated loan of IDR 3.51 trillion
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) and one of its subsidiaries, PT Mareta Persada, have obtained a syndicated loan facility worth IDR 3.51 trillion from three creditors.

title: IPCC to channel IDR 39.45 billion as interim dividend
body: PT Indonesia Kendaraan Terminal Tbk (IPCC) will distribute interim dividend for the fiscal year 2023 worth IDR 39.45 billion on January 15, 2024.

title: AXIO to set up interim dividend of IDR 15.20 billion
body: PT Tera Data Indonusa Tbk (AXIO), a laptop manufacturer, distributed net interim dividend of IDR 15.20 billion, or IDR 9 per share, for the fiscal year 2023 yesterday (12/12).

title: SONA to carry out stock split with 1:2 ratio
body: PT Sona Topas Tourism Industry Tbk (SONA) will split the stock value (stock split) with a ratio of 1:2 or one old share will become two new nominal shares. This corporate action plan was approved at the General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS), yesterday (12/12).

title: DSNG optimistic performance will grow above 5% by the end of this year
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) estimates that its revenue and profit performance will grow by around 6% at the end of this year compared to the same period last year. In 2022, the issuer's revenue and profit will be recorded at IDR 9.63 trillion and IDR 1.20 trillion, respectively.

title: Buana Finance to secure loan of IDR 80 billion from Bank DKI
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a consumer financing company, has managed to acquire a loan facility from PT Bank DKI with limit set to IDR 80 billion.

title: SMDR to channel IDR 17.6 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk (SMDR), a logistics and shipping company, has channelled extra capital of IDR 17.6 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Cumawis.

title: Vastland Indonesia to acquire land and warehouse in Tangerang for IDR 97.5 billion
body: PT Vastland Indonesia Tbk (VAST), a warehouse developing company, has reportedly acquired land and building in a form of a warehouse in Tangerang for IDR 97.5 billion.

title: PIK 2 eyes IDR 5.5 trillion of marketing sales post-acquisition of 7 companies
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) announces quite ambitious marketing sales target for 2024, IDR 5.5 trillion.

title: Foreign investors sold massive numbers of Gojek Tokopedia shares; net foreign plunged to -6.97 billion shares
body: On Monday, December 11, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were sold in fantastic numbers.

title: Cash on deficit, Jasamarga Jalanlayang Cikampek secures IDR 160 billion loan
body: PT Jasamarga Transjawa Tol (JTT) has granted shareholder loan to PT Jasamarga Jalanlayang Cikampek (JJC) worth IDR 160 billion.

title: Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) contributes 41.50% of foreign sales volume; net foreign drops to negative 1.19 billion shares
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares had a net volume of -1.30 million shares after foreign investors sold 2.45 billion shares on Friday, December 8.

title: Replacing Charming Pharmacy, Indo Ventures becomes ERAA's new investment partner
body: Indo Ventures Indonesia Sdn. Bhd. has officially entered as an investment partner in the joint venture company owned by PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA).

title: Poor performance in profit, TRGU still eyes IDR 4.4 trillion sales in 2023
body: Despite its plummeting profit in Q3 2023, PT Cerestar Indonesia Tbk (TRGU) remains confident in its revenue, aiming to score IDR 4.4 trillion of sales at most at the end of this year.

title: BA Finance to pay off Bonds Phase II Year 2022
