body: PT Bussan Auto Finance (BA Finance) has paid off principal and last round of interest of Series A of its Shelf-Registration Bonds II Phase II Year 2022. Until June 2023, cash and bank were recorded at IDR 384.69 billion, much higher than cash and bank seen in December 2022 of IDR 273.25 billion.

title: INRU to stop operation for the next two months
body: PT Toba Pulp Lestari Tbk (INRU) has decided to temporarily terminate the operation of its pulp factory due to the lack of wood, following lawsuit made by communities in the company’s Forest Utilisation License areas in Parmaksian, Toba, North Sumatra.

title: Expanding, TRGU eyes milling capacity increase in Q1 2024
body: Noticing full utilisation rate of its mills, PT Cerestar Indonesia Tbk (TRGU), a flour manufacturer, plans to raise processing capacity of its mill in Gresik by another 600 metric ton (MT) per day next year.

title: Unilever consistently implements 5 strategies to encourage long-term growth
body: PT Unilever Indonesia Tbk consistently continues to focus on implementing five strategic priorities (Strategic Priorities) to encourage growth. This implementation has resulted in financial performance growth in the third quarter of 2023 which shows positive results and supports the progress of Unilever Indonesia's competitiveness.

title: David Hidayat: SIDO's export potential to Japan is wide open
body: President Director of PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) David Hidayat revealed that Sido Muncul's export potential to Japan is still wide open, following the Tolak Angin candy product which has been registered in Japan.

title: BSI pushes sharia wealth management ecosystem, securing international award
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS) continues to prove its commitment in becoming financial, social, spiritual partners to its users in managing wealth in sharia fashion through exclusive services of BSI Prioritas.

title: RDTX to set up interim dividend of IDR 200.25 billion
body: PT Roda Vivatex Tbk (RDTX) will issue interim dividend for the fiscal year 2023 of IDR 200.25 billion.

title: UBS AG London to divest portions in Bank Maybank
body: UBS AG London divested all of its portion in PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII) on December 8, 2023.

title: RISE bags IDR 400 billion loan from BCA for business expansion
body: PT Jaya Sukses Makmur Sentosa Tbk (RISE), a real estate company owned by Hermanto Tanoko of Tancorp Group, has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 400 billion from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) or Bank BCA.

title: NCKL grants IDR 500 billion as capital and operational support for subsidiary
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Perkasa Tbk (NCKL), a nickel ore mining company, has channelled a loan facility worth IDR 500 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Gane Tambang Sentosa (GTS).

title: Chandra Asri secures equity investment of USD 194 million from EGCO Group
body: PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA) has obtained an equity investment worth USD 194 million from Electric Generating Public Company Limited (EGCO) Group, an independent energy company from Thailand.

title: Acquiring land for new office, Carsurin take up cash and BCA loan of IDR 20.5 billion
body: PT Carsurin Tbk (CRSN), a testing, inspection, and certification service provider, has purchased one plot of land in Kebon Jeruk, Jakarta, which will be used as an operational office.

title: JAYA to add 12 new vehicles to meet year-end delivery demand
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA), a vehicle provider for general goods shipping, has acquired 12 units of new Colt Diesel Double (CDD) trucks to accommodate the surge of delivery demand nearing the end of the year.

title: Spending 30% of 2023 capex, WSBP to raise 2024 capex to IDR 130 billion
body: Up until the end of Q3 2023, PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) only used up 30% of total capital expenditure (capex) set for this year. However, WSBP already plans to increase its 2024 capex by 10%-20%.

title: WSBP to reach only 80% of its new contract target for 2023
body: PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) will only manage to attain 80% of total new contract target of 2023 at the end of this year.

title: Lowering operational costs, Tunas Alfin to use solar panel in factory
body: PT Tunas Alfin Tbk (TALF), a packaging and container manufacturer, attempts to lower down its operational costs by utilising power generated by solar panels installed at the roof of a factory.

title: Due to the 1:10 stock split, Green Resources now owns 2.66 billion shares of Sekar Laut (SKLT)
body: To boost the liquidity of PT Sekar Laut Tbk (SKLT) shares on the stock market, this ready-to-eat crackers and spices manufacturer conducted a stock split with a ratio of 1:10 at the beginning of December.

title: A new investor Edie acquires 637 million Estika Tata (BEEF) shares
body: On Wednesday, December 6, two major investors participated in the sale and purchase of shares in the cattle company, PT Estika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF). Asia Agri International Pte Ltd., a foreign investor as well as the controlling shareholder, sold 773.45 million BEEF shares and now owns 70.59% of the company.

title: Individual investors dominate market hints, with Tekardjo Angkasa currently holding 490 million Buyung Poetra (HOKI) shares
body: On Tuesday, December 5, individual investors were spotted dominating share transactions on the market hint list. Tekardjo Angkasa began by purchasing 490 million shares of PT Buyung Poetra Sembada Tbk (HOKI), and now this new investor owns 5.06% of the rice company.

title: Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa to channel extra IDR 6 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk (MAHA), a coal mining support service provider, has allocated extra capital to one of its subsidiaries.

title: Bangun Karya Perkasa to secure new contracts worth IDR 13.10 billion
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Tbk (KRYA), has obtained new contracts worth IDR 13.10 billion from a subsidiary of PT Central Pertiwi Bahari (CPB), also a subsidiary of PT Central Proteina Prima Tbk (CPRO).

title: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking ready to be standby buyer in BTPN's rights issue
body: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation (SMBC) has stated its ability to take part in the new shares to be issued by PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) in the rights issue, and will be a standby buyer for new shares that are not taken up by other shareholders.

title: SMBC and SAG to transfer ownership in Oto Multiartha
body: PT Summit Auto Group (SAG) and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation (SMBC) will transfer their ownership in PT Oto Multiartha (OTMA) to PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN). This bank issuer is a subsidiary of SAG and SMBC.

title: EMTK goes for MESOP next week
body: PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi Tbk (EMTK) will hold a private placement by issuing 75 million shares of IDR 20 each.

title: Foreign selling volume reaches 3.46 billion shares, resulting in a net foreign volume of -537.06 million shares
body: On Thursday, December 7, foreign selling volume reached 3.46 billion shares, while foreign buying volume was at 2.92 billion shares. This share buying and selling activity by foreign investors resulted in a net foreign of -537.06 million shares.

title: Foreigners are massively releasing GOTO, resulting in a drop in net foreign volume to -1.86 billion shares
body: On Wednesday, December 6, foreign investors sold 5.43 billion shares while buying only 3.56 billion, resulting in a foreign net volume of -1.86 billion. This was influenced once again by the high volume of foreign sales of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares, which reached 3.56 billion shares with a net volume of -1.83 billion.

title: 3.5 billion shares of Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) were sold, and net foreign plummeted to -509 million shares
body: On Tuesday, December 5, shares of the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were the most widely traded by foreign investors, with around 3.52 billion shares sold and a net volume of -306.81 million shares.

title: Business slowing down, AIMS seeks investment outside coal mining
body: PT Akbar Indo Makmur Stimec Tbk (AIMS), a coal trading company, is exploring new investments aside from its core business as its performance slows down.

title: Resource Alam Indonesia to channel IDR 66.3 billion of stock dividend
body: PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI), a coal mining company and high-pressure laminate (HPL) manufacturer, will carry out stock dividend distribution worth IDR 66.3 billion.

title: Prodia StemCell Indonesia to inaugurate stem cell production lab
body: PT Prodia StemCell Indonesia (ProSTEM), sister company of PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA), officially inaugurates Advanced Cell Therapy-Production Laboratory (ACT-PLab) phase one today (11/12) in Kramat, not far from Prodia headquarter at Prodia Tower.

title: TikTok to invest USD 1.5 billion in Tokopedia
body: PT Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) joins hands with TikTok Pte. Ltd. to drive growth in the Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs), TikTok will gradually put in investment worth USD 1.5 billion to support the operation of PT Tokopedia, GOTO’s subsidiary.

title: Bank Maspion aims for credit distribution of IDR 14 trillion in 2023
body: PT Bank Maspion Indonesia Tbk (BMAS) targets to book distributed credits of IDR 14 trillion at the end of this year, aiming for 61% growth compared to 2022’s achievement worth IDR 8.8 trillion.

title: Indonesian government eyes IDR 19 trillion in tomorrow SUN auction
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) tomorrow (12/12) with an indicative target of IDR 19 trillion.

title: Restructuring debts, Port Fraser and Levoca Enterprise join BNBR
body: Port Fraser International Ltd (PFI) and Levoca Enterprise Ltd (LE) step in as new shareholders of PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR) via private placement a couple of weeks ago (29/11).

title: Bayan Resources secures USD 210 million loan facility from BCA
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN) has signed a bank facility agreement with PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) with total value of USD 210 million.

title: Barito Renewables readies Sidrap Wind takeover from OMI
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN), through one of its subsidiaries, PT Barito Wind Energy (BWE), has reached in-principle agreement with UPC Renewables Asia Pacific Holdings Pte. Ltd. and ACEN Renewables International Pte. Ltd. to acquire 100% of PT UPC Sidrap Bayu Energy (Sidrap).

title: Success in technology innovation, BRI seizes Contact Center Asia Pasific Award 2023
body: Consistently up-to-date with current global industry, especially in contact centre services, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk once again secures an international-scale achievement.

title: Raking in 3 awards at BI Awards 2023, proof of BRI’s leading position in financial inclusion
body: Thanks to dedication and commitment in promoting financial inclusion and literacy in Indonesia, PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) managed to win three awards at Bank Indonesia (BI) Award in Jakarta last week (29/11).

title: AVIA to allocate IDR 1 trillion for buyback
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) allocates IDR 1 trillion to repurchase a maximum of 1.42 billion shares (buyback) or 2.3% of its total issued and paid-up capital of the company

title: OPPM issues bonds and sukuk
body: PT Oki Pulp & Paper Mills (OPPM) is eyeing fresh funds through the issuance of Shelf Registration Bonds, Sukuk, Currency Bonds (US$), and Environmentally Friendly Bonds. A number of these debt securities were offered on Friday (8/12) and listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) on (13/12).

title: KETR to pay off bonds maturing in 2024
body: PT Ketrosden Triasmitra Tbk (KETR) will pay off series A of Bonds of KETR I Year 2020 with a principal of IDR 415 billion, which will mature on January 8, 2024

title: Blibli to carry out MESOP this week
body: PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI), the managing company of e-commerce platform, Blibli.com, will conduct its management and employee stock option plan (MESOP) I Phase II and MESOP II Phase I.

title: UBS AG Singapore has acquired nearly 6% of Charoen Pokphand Indonesia (CPIN)
body: On Monday, December 4, foreign investor UBS AG Singapore Non-Treaty Omnibus Account 2091144090 annexed 974.91 million shares of PT Charoen Pokphand Indonesia Tbk (CPIN) via foreign securities at Deutsche Bank AG.

title: Asia Intrainvesta purchased 445 million Graha Mitra (RELF) shares, giving it a 17.29% stake
body: PT Asia Intrainvesta purchased 445.60 million shares of PT Graha Mitra Asia Tbk (RELF) on Friday, December 1. With this investment, Asia Intrainvesta's ownership of the property developer rose from 9.51% to 17.29%.

title: Foreign buys exceed 5 billion shares; net foreign volume is a 399 million surplus
body: On Monday, December 4, foreign buying volume was roughly 5.17 billion shares, which was higher than the foreign selling volume of 4.77 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume closed with a surplus of 399.16 million shares.

title: Foreign investors buy 4 billion of Gojek Tokopedia's (GOTO) shares; the net foreign volume is 1.22 billion
body: The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk's (GOTO) shares were bought up by foreign investors in as many as 4,07 billion shares on Friday, December 1, with a net volume of 1.33 billion shares.

title: DNAR obtains interbank financing facility from PermataBank worth IDR 300 billion
body: PT Bank Oke Indonesia Tbk (DNAR), a private bank under the control of APRO Financial Co Ltd, has reportedly signed a credit agreement with PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI).

title: Pulau Subur to distribute interim dividend of IDR 1.2 per share
body: PT Pulau Subur Tbk (PTPS), an agriculture product company recently listed on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) last October, announced its interim dividend distribution plan of IDR 1.2 per share, or IDR 2.6 billion in total.

title: Hartadinata Abadi’s subsidiary secure IDR 300 billion credit facility
body: One of subsidiaries of PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA), PT Gemilang Hartadinata Abadi (GHA), has signed a credit agreement worth IDR 300 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Agus Salim Pangestu earns title the Best CEO in Basic Materials
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials awarded Agus Salim Pangestu, CEO of PT Barito Pacific Tbk (BRPT), as the Best CEO in Basic Materials at the 2023 TOP CEO Awards at Sofitel Nusa Dua, Bali, last Friday (1/12).

title: Foreign buying and selling volume reached 8 billion shares; net foreign closes were minus 111 million shares
body: On Thursday, November 30, the foreign buying and selling volumes were both around 8 billion shares, with the foreign selling volume at 8.73 billion shares and the foreign buying volume at 8.62 billion shares.

title: Samindo Resources buys up to 1.11 billion shares of Transkon Jaya (TRJA)
body: On Thursday, November 30, PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA), a construction and mining vehicle rental services company, welcomed PT Samindo Resources Tbk as a new investor.

title: Four companies welcomed new investors; Bakrie & Brothers (BNBR)'s shares were bought up the most
body: Despite four issuers finding new investors, the shares of the manufacturing and infrastructure company PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR) were the most purchased among three other companies on Wednesday, November 29.

title: Jan Darmadi Investindo transfers 154 million shares of Jakarta Setiabudi (JSPT) to Citibank Switzerland
body: The shares of PT Jakarta Setiabudi Internasional Tbk (JSPT), which is engaged in the property and hotel industries, were transferred to a new investor on Tuesday, November 28

title: Alexander Ramlie is the Best CEO in Resources Materials
body: Alexander Ramlie, CEO of PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) secured the title the Best CEO in Resources Materials according to Tempo-IDNFinancias during the TOP CEO Awards 2023 at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali, last Friday (1/12).

title: Bayan Resources to distribute interim dividend of USD 500 million
body: PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), a coal mining company owned by Dato’ Low Tuck Kwong, will distribute its interim dividend of USD 500 million or USD 0.015 per share.

title: Joining hands with Chevron for WKP Way Ratai, PGEO got 40%
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO) has formed a joint venture (JV) with Chevron New Energies Holdings Indonesia Ltd to work on Geothermal Work Area (GWA) of Way Ratai, Lampung.

title: Allocating IDR 93.47 billion, Temas Lestari raise stakes in TMAS
body: PT Temas Lestari (TL) raises its stock portion by 1.09% to 81.93% in PT Temas Tbk (TMAS) in a transaction taking place yesterday (5/12).

title: 'Indonesia's Bill Gates' Toto Sugiri named as Best CEO In Data Center and Its Services
body: Otto Toto Sugiri, President Director of PT Data Center International Indonesia Tbk (DCII) received an award as The Best CEO In Data Center And Its Services from Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com last weekend at the Sofitel Nusa Dua Resort, Bali.

title: GIAA sets up USD 50 million to pay off loans to creditors
body: PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA) takes USD 50 million out of its internal cash in order to pay off bonds and sukuk to its creditors via tender offer as a part of its Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) process.

title: Sabana Prawirawidjaja secured the Best CEO in Dairy Products
body: CEO of PT Ultrajaya Milk Industry & Trading Company Tbk (ULTJ), Sabana Prawirawidjaja, is granted an award as the Best CEO in Dairy Products by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials last Friday (1/12) at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali.

title: TOWR to set up interim dividend of IDR 298.79 billion
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) will prepare interim dividend of IDR 298.79 billion or IDR 6 per share.

title: Seeking extra capital for IKN, WIKA arranges rights issue of 92.24 billion shares
body: PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) is scheduling capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Tempo-IDNFinancials crowned Ririek Ardiansyah as the Best CEO in Integrated Telecommunication Services
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials named Ririek Adriansyah as the Best CEO in Integrated Telecommunication Services. As CEO of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM), he has contributed in driving performance and growth of telecommunication industry in Indonesia.

title: AKRA and BP Gas & Power to work on imported LNG project
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) has reportedly signed a contract with BP Gas & Power Investment Ltd. to work on imported LNG project in Special Economic Zone (JIIPE) Gresik.

title: Suhendra Wiriadinata named as The Best CEO In Forestry and Paper with Renewable Energy
body: President Director of PT Tjiwi Kimia Tbk Suhendra Wiriadinata won the award as the Best CEO in Forestry and Paper with Renewable Energy from tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com last weekend at the Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua Resort, Bali.

title: Hendra Soetjipto Tan secures The Best CEO title by Tempo-IDNFinancials
body: Hendra Soetjipto Tan, President Director of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) received the title of The Best CEO Of The Best IPO Of The Year at the TOP CEO 2023 event at Sofitel Nusa Dua Resort Beach, Bali last weekend (1/12 ).

title: Vidjongtius of Kalbe Farma named as Best CEO in Pharmaceuticals
body: PT Kalbe Farma Tbk (KLBF) received the Best CEO in Pharmaceuticals award at the 2023 TOP CEO Awards in Bali last Friday (1/12).

title: AKRA President Director crowned as The Best CEO In Oil and Gas Storage and Distribution
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials named Haryanto Adikoesoemo as one of the Best CEOs among 43 CEOs of public listed companies in the capital market.

title: Rustiyan Oen won the Best CEO in Healthcare Provider
body: President Director of PT Mitra Keluarga Karyasehat Tbk (MIKA) Rustiyan Oen has won the Best CEO in Healthcare Provider title at the TOP CEO Awards 2023, which was held by Tempo-IDNFinancials in Nusa Dua Bali last week.

title: TOP CEO Awards 2023 crowned Wendy Yap the Best CEO in Processed Grain Products
body: CEO of PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI), or familiarly known as Sari Roti, received an award as the Best CEO in Processed Grain Products.

title: Hendra Jaya Kosasih seizes The Best CEO In Forestry and Paper Products
body: CEO of PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), Hendra Jaya Kosasih, won the Best CEO In Forestry And Paper Products award from Tempo.co and IDNFinancials last Friday (1/12) at Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua, Bali.

title: Royal with dividend, Eddy Hartono won The Best CEO in Automotive Parts Dividend Payment
body: Eddy Hartono, founder and Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of PT Selamat Selamat Tbk (SMSM), is named The Best CEO in Automotive Parts Dividend Payment.

title: Tempo-IDNFinancials named CEO of PWON the Best CEO in Superblock Development
body: Alexander Stefanus Ridwan Suhendra secures the title the Best CEO in Superblock Development, awarded by Tempo-IDNFinancials. Said title is given after evaluating his performance and contribution in leading PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) to establish various superblocks in different cities in Indonesia.

title: CEO of IMPC won The Best CEO in Building Products International Market
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials named Haryanto Tjiptodihardjo as The Best CEO in Building Products International Market. His figure was successful in bringing PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC) to go international, performing positively during the Covid-19 pandemic, and consistently distributing dividends to shareholders.

title: Avia Avian’s CEO receives the Best CEO in Specialty Chemical award from Tempo-IDNFinancials
body: CEO of PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), Wijono Tanoko, is awarded the Best CEO in Specialty Chemical at TOP CEO Awards 2023 event held by Tempo-IDNFinancials last Friday (1/12) at Sofitel Nusa Dua, Bali.

title: 1.24 billion Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO) shares are sold; net foreign volume closed at negative 331 million
body: Foreign investors sold 1.24 billion shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Wednesday, November 29, resulting in a net volume of -267.11 million shares.

title: Global entrepreneurs to show off at BRI UMKM EXPO(RT) BRILIANPRENEUR
body: Hundreds of Indonesian best MSMEs will show off their works at BRI UMKM EXPO(RT) BRILIANPRENEUR. Pushing forward the title “Crafting Global Connection”, BRI UMKM EXPO(RT) BRILIANPRENEUR 2023 will be held at Jakarta Convention Centre (JCC) on December 7-10, 2023.

title: Alam Permai recently invested 5.86 billion shares in Merdeka Battery Materials (MBMA)
body: On Monday, November 27, PT Alam Permai became a new investor in PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), purchasing 5.86 billion shares. As a result, the investor now owns 5.43% of this company that manufactures electric vehicle batteries.

title: Net foreign volume closes at 20.97 million shares, remaining in the green zone
body: Net foreign has been stable in the green zone over the last few days, reaching 20.97 million shares on Tuesday, November 28.

title: Sarana Agro Investama now owns 95.35% of Jaya Agra Wattie (JAWA) shares following a private placement
body: On Friday, November 24, PT Sarana Agro Investama (SAI) was seen purchasing 12.45 billion shares of agribusiness company PT Jaya Agra Wattie Tbk (JAWA) via private placement or selling shares to selected investors.

title: Hery Gunardi crowned as the Best CEO of Sharia Bank by Tempo-IDNFinancials
body: CEO of PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), Hery Gunardi, is granted the award of the Best CEO of Sharia Bank in TOP CEO Awards 2023 held by Tempo-IDNFinancials.

title: Needing extra capital for acquisition, BTPN to hold rights issue of 3.09 billion shares
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN), one of financial institutions under Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation, plans to raise capital through preemptive rights (PMTHMETD II), also known as rights issue.

title: SAPX signed shipping partnership contract with Semangat Logistik Andalan
body: PT Satria Antaran Prima Tbk (SAPX), a logistics and shipping company, has signed a cooperation agreement regarding goods shipping with PT Semangat Logistik Andalan (SLA).

title: Jahja Setiaatmadja won The Best CEO In The Most Valuable Company
body: Jahja Setiaatmadja, CEO of Bank BCA secures the title the Best CEO In The Most Valuable Company following his success in leading the company to perform well, both financially and in the stock market in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Subakti Syukur of Jasa Marga secures the Best CEO in Infrastructure Service
body: CEO of PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk is crowned the Best CEO in Infrastructure Service at TOP CEO Awards 2023 held by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials last Friday (1/12) at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali.

title: AUTO President Director named The Best CEO in Automotive Parts and Equipment
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials named Hamdhani Dzulkarnaen Salim as The Best CEO in Automotive Parts and Equipment at the 2023 TOP CEO at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali, last weekend (1/12).

title: Donny Arsal won The Best CEO In Construction Materials, The Largest Market Share
body: Donny Arsal, President Director of PT Semen Indonesia Group Tbk (SIG) (Ticker Code: SMGR) won the Best CEO in Construction Materials (The Largest Market Share) from Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.

title: Darmawan Djunaidi is crowned The Best CEO In The Largest Asset Bank In Indonesia
body: Darmawan Djunaidi, CEO of PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI), has been awarded the Best CEO in the Largest Assets Bank in Indonesia by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials. The award ceremony took place at the Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua Resort, Bali last Friday (1/12).

title: Consistent growth, MTDL won the Best CEO in IT and Computer Technology
body: CEO of PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL), Susanto Djaja, has received the title the Best CEO in IT and Computer Company from Tempo-IDNFinancials during TOP CEO Awards Indonesia 2023 in Nusa Dua, Bali last Friday (1/12).

title: Anthony Salim earns Best CEO In Processed Foods
body: Anthony Salim, CEO of PT Indofood Sukses Makmur Tbk (INDF) won the award as The Best CEO In Processed Foods from Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com. The TOP CEO awarding took place at the Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua Resort, Bali last weekend.

title: ERAA performance improves, Budiarto Halim awarded Best CEO In Electronics and Lifestyle Retails
body: Tempo-IDNFinancials awarded The Best CEO In Electronics and Lifestyle Retail to Budiarto Halim, Director of PT Era Jaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) for bringing the issuer's performance growth since the Covid-19 pandemic.

title: Sunarso from BBRI named Best CEO in The Most Profitable Bank award
body: Sunarso, President Director of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI), has received the Best CEO in The Most Profitable Bank award from Tempo-IDNFinancials in Nusa Dua, Bali on Friday (1/12) last week.

title: BSI collaborates with UAE for branch office optimisation in Dubai
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BSI) further advances its strategic collaboration with the United Arab Emirates (UAE) through branch office optimization in Dubai.

title: Alvin W. Sariaatmadja receives The Best CEO in Online Application and Services
body: Alvin W. Sariaatmadja secured the title of The Best CEO In Online Application and Services in the TOP CEO Awards 2023 held by Tempo-IDNFinancials at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali, last Friday (1/12).

title: Tandean Rustandy won The Best CEO in Building Products Material
body: CEO of PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk Tendean Rustandy won the award the Best CEO in Building Products Material, initiated by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com last Friday (1/12).

title: President Director of Bukit Asam awarded as The Best CEO In Beyond Coal
body: Arsal Ismail, President Director of PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA), has received the Best CEO in Beyond Coal award from Tempo-IDNFinancials in Nusa Dua, Bali yesterday (1/12).

title: President Director of Astra Agro Lestari received The Best CEO in Agriculture award
body: Santosa, President Director of PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) was awarded the Best CEO in Agriculture (Plantation and Crops) by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com. The awarding night took place at the Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua Resort, Bali last weekend.

title: Christian Kartwijaya secures the Best CEO in Construction Materials and ESG
body: CEO of PT Indocement Tunggal Prakarsa Tbk (INTP), Christian Kartawijaya, has been awarded the Best CEO in Construction Materials And ESG, in a collaborative event held by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials last Friday (1/12) at Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua, Bali.

title: Ira Noviarti named the Best CEO in Consumer Products
body: Ira Noviarti is crowned the Best CEO in Consumer Products by Tempo-IDNFinancials during the appreciation night of TOP CEO Awards 2023 at Sofitel Nusa Dua Beach Resort, Bali last Friday (1/12).

title: Astra International’s leader secures the Best CEO in Diversified Conglomeration award
body: Djony Bunarto Tjondro, CEO of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), has seized the Best CEO in Diversified Conglomeration award given by Tempo-IDNFinancials.

title: Faty Khusumo won the Best CEO in Logistics and Deliveries
body: Faty Khusumo, CEO of PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), has secured the Best CEO in Logistics and Deliveries award in TOP CEO Awards 2023 at Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua, Bali last Friday (1/12).

title: Consistently diversifying, Frans Kesuma awarded the Best CEO in Construction Machinery and Heavy Equipment
body: CEO of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), Fransiscus Xaverius Laksana Kesuma, fondly called Frans Kesuma, receives the award of the Best CEO in Construction Machinery and Heavy Equipment by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials last Friday at Sofitel Hotel, Nusa Dua, Bali.

title: BNBR to divest in Fitzroy Offshore to pay off loans

With his leadership, the oldest bank has implemented a sustainable financial strategy so that it is able to record continuously increasing performance. For his leadership role, Royke Tumilaar was awarded as The Best CEO of The Most Sustainable Bank by Tempo.co and IDNFinancials.com, last weekend at the Sofitel Nusa Dua Resort, Bali.

title: Alastair McLeod: We’ll diversify to sectors where we have strength

title: David Hidayat crowned the Best CEO in Herbal Pharmaceuticals

title: Royke Tumilaar is awarded the Best CEO of the Most Sustainable Bank

body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) will begin the construction of Venteny Super App to optimise its information-technology-based financing services.

body: Franchise & License Indonesia (FLEI) Expo 2023 officially opened today, Friday, October 13 2023.

title: Avia Avian to distribute IDR 681.49 billion in interim dividend
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint company with the flagship brand Avian, announced plans to distribute interim dividends of IDR 681.49 billion.

title: JCI remains strong in Friday morning

title: 4 companies listed on IDX this week, from energy to logistics sectors
body: A total of 4 companies have listed shares on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) this week, ranging from companies from the energy sector to logistics.

title: BIMA scored 34.78% jump to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Primarindo Asia Infrastructure Tbk (BIMA) rose 34.78% during yesterday’s (12/10) session in the stock exchange.

title: Gov’t to hold another SUN auction, setting target to IDR 19 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will once again hold an auction of Government Securities (lit. Surat Utang Negara/SUN) on next Tuesday (17/10) with an indicative target of IDR 19 trillion.

title: Concluding IPO, LOPI to acquire 8 more trucks

title: Foreign sales volume nearly hit 4 billion; net foreign volume closed at minus 318 million

title: Alpha Investasi Mandiri adds shares up to 7.17% in Amman Mineral Internasional (AMMN)

body: The stock of PT Sumber Energi Makmur Tbk (IOTF) shot up, gaining 35% jump during its debut in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) yesterday (6/10).

title: Improving, BEEF sets out to fix and expand Subang facility
body: PT Estika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF) has successfully turned its loss into net profit as the revenue skyrocketed 1,917% year-on-year (yoy) at the end of June 2023. With this financial improvement, BEEF redirects its focus to relocation of cold storage from Cikarang to Subang, as well as expansion of Subang facility.

title: Foreign sales volume almost hits 3 billion; net foreign volume reaches negative 794 million

body: On Wednesday, October 4, foreign investors continued to sell shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) in high volume.

title: Foreign buying and selling values were not significantly different; net foreign closed at minus 391 million

title: Jaya Swarasa Agung (TAYS) welcomes Mixio Holding as a new investor
body: On Tuesday, September 26, PT Jaya Swarasa Agung Tbk (TAYS) acquired a new investment from foreign investor Mixio Holding Incorporated.

title: Shifting 34.55%, PRIM soared to top gainers

title: In mid-to-late October, five issuers spread out bond payments

title: Erajaya Group to receive extended credit limit and tenor from BCA

title: Waskita to hold off bonds' payment of IDR 941 billion

body: PT Link Net Tbk (LINK) has acquired a loan facility worth IDR 3 trillion from PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA).

title: Boosting connectivity of IKN and Eastern Indonesia, CCSI introduces VARUNA
body: PT CCSI Konektivitas Digital (CKD), a subsidiary of PT Communication Cable Systems Indonesia Tbk (CCSI), officially joins hands with strategic partners to develop Varuna Cable Systems (VARUNA), a submarine cable backbone network connecting islands in Indonesia.

title: INET out, POLU rose to top gainers
body: Until yesterday’s (14/9) closing bell, PT Golden Flower Tbk (POLU) had reportedly climbed 24.56% from its previous closing price.

title: Once postponed, PYFA to re-offer bonds of IDR 400 billion
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA) once again offers Shelf-Registration Bonds I of PYFA Phase II Year 2023 with a total principal of IDR 400 billion.

title: High credit interest rate forces WOOD to lower sales target to 45%
body: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk (WOOD), a company engaged in the wood processing for furniture, has reduced its sales growth target this year to 45%-50% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Bank Tabungan Negara to issue LTN of IDR 404.75 billion
body: PT Bank Tabungan Negara Tbk (BBTN) once again issues securities in the form of Long-Term Notes (LTN) with total principal of IDR 404.75 billion.

title: JAWA will convert IDR 1.24 trillion of debt into shares
body: PT Jaya Agra Wattie Tbk (JAWA) announced plans to convert part of its debt with a total value of IDR 1.24 trillion into shares, through additional capital without granting pre-emptive rights (PMTHMETD).

title: NETV lets go 273 workers
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) has officially laid off approximately 30% of its total employees, due to piling losses faced by this television channel network.

title: ANTM to complete first metal tapping of its Haltim Ferronickel Plant
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) concluded the first metal tapping of Haltim Ferronickel Plant in Halmahera, North Maluku, yesterday (12/9).

title: Indonesian govt to hold another IDR 14 trillion SUN auction next week
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Debt Securities (SUN) on Tuesday (19/9) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 14 trillion.

title: Sumber Sinergi Makmur to offer 1.1 billion shares via IPO
body: PT Sumber Sinergi Makmur Tbk (IOTF), distributor of Global Positioning System (GPS) equipment for automotive and logistics, will carry out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by releasing 1.1 billion shares.

title: DMMX with Digi Flora Indonesia to launch digital flower boards
body: PT Digital Mediatama Maxima Tbk (DMMX) announces its latest collaboration with PT Digi Flora Indonesia (DFI) that delivers an innovation in the form of digital flower boards for various events.

title: DOID’s subsidiary to secure sharia syndicated loan of US 60 million
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), one of many subsidiaries of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), has obtained a sharia syndicated loan facility worth USD 60 million or worth approximately IDR 920 billion.

title: TFAS out, INET secures top gainers
body: PT Sinergi Inti Andalan Prima Tbk (INET) shifted to the top of the gainers’ list yesterday (13/9). PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk (TFAS), previous top gainer, is forced to take a massive downturn to become the top loser with 20.40% decline.

title: HRUM’s subsidiary acquires more shares in Mahkota Emas Nickel
body: PT Harum Nickel Perkasa, a subsidiary of PT Harum Energy Tbk (HRUM), has acquired 4% of PT Mahkota Emas Nickel’s (MEN) portion in PT Tanito Harum Nickel (THN).

title: Foreign net volume fell further to 1.31 billion in the red zone
body: The decline in net foreign volume further into the red zone remained incomplete. The net foreign volume dropped to minus 1.31 billion shares on Wednesday, September 13, as foreign investors sold nearly 3.5 billion shares in total, while only buying about 2.17 billion shares.

title: Two big investors sell hundreds of Nusantara Sawit (NSSS) shares
body: On Monday, September 11, two investors in total sold more than four hundred million shares of the issuer, PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS).

title: Acset Indonusa to establish JV with Adhi Karya
body: PT Acset Indonusa Tbk (ACST), a construction company under Astra Group, announces an establishment of Joint Venture (JV)) along with PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI).

title: Incoming bids in SBSN auction hit IDR 31.33 trillion
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities or State Sukuk on September 12, 2023, reached IDR 31.33 trillion.

title: First half in, Buana Finance scored profit growth
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD) successfully booked revenue and current profit growth in the first half of 2023 compared to the same period last year.

title: PANI’s controlling shareholder to participate in rights issue
body: PT Multi Artha Pratama (MAP) has declared its willingness to exercise its entire rights in a capital raise of PT Pantai Indah Kapuk Dua Tbk (PANI) through granting pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Building factory in Karawang, INKP signs land sale and purchase agreement
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP) has signed a Sale and Purchase Binding Agreement over a piece of land in Karawang for the construction of a factory.

title: MEDC grant subsidiary guarantee for crude oil purchase of USD 100 million
body: PT Medco Energi Internasional Tbk (MEDC), an oil and gas company, has signed a Deed of Guarantee and Indemnity with Glencore Singapore Ltd.

title: TFAS back to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk (TFAS) seized back its top gainers title during yesterday’s (12/9) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) after slipping up to the runner-up position last Monday (11/9).

title: Aiming for revenue growth, LUCY to open outlet in Medan
body: PT Lima Dua Lima Tiga Tbk (LUCY), the managing company of Lucy Group, has introduced another outlet in Medan, North Sumatra.

title: Net foreign volume dropped even further, reaching 1 billion shares in the negative
body: On Tuesday, September 12, net foreign volume dropped even further, reaching -1,005,938,700 shares. This figure represents the difference between the total number of shares purchased by foreigners (2.51 billion) and the total number of shares sold (3.51 billion).

title: After buying 171 million Kota Satu Properti (SATU) shares, Raden Yohanes now holds 12.47% control
body: Raden Yohanes Kristian Hardianto, the chief commissioner of BPR Gunung Rizki, recently became a new investor in PT Kota Satu Properti Tbk (SATU), after purchasing 171.40 million shares on Friday, September 8.

title: In need of additional capital, Bank MNC to carry out rights issue of 13.5 billion shares
body: PT Bank MNC Internasional Tbk (BABP), a banking issuer owned by MNC Group, will increase capital by providing Pre-emptive Rights (HMETD) or rights issue.

title: Soho Global Health plans for stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Soho Global Health Tbk (SOHO), a pharmaceutical company with a market capitalization of IDR 6.15 trillion, will carry out a stock split with a ratio of 1:10.

title: JCI closed Tuesday session weakly
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) remained in the red zone until the closing bell on today’s (12/9) session.

title: Net foreign volume continues to fall, with a current deficit of 683 million shares
body: On Monday, September 11, net foreign volume fell further to -683,588,900 shares. This was due primarily to the volume of foreign sales, which totaled 3.30 billion shares, while foreign purchases totaled only 2.62 billion.

title: ASSA secures extra credit facility of IDR 100 billion from BNI
body: PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA), a trading and transportation service provider, has obtained an extension of credit facility from PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) or BNI.

title: Promising recurring income, PWON's rating rises to BB+ Stable
body: S&P, an international credit rating agency, upgraded the rating of PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) from the initial "BB" to "BB+" with "Stable" outlook.

title: SMIL sets aside IDR 50 billion of IPO proceeds
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL) readies IDR 50 billion from the proceeds of its initial public offering (IPO), which will be spent on acquisition of forklifts, operational vehicles, and workshop construction.

title: Batang Industrial Park infrastructure development to complete by 2024
body: The development of infrastructure of Batang Industrial Park (BIP), an industrial park owned by PT Intiland Development Tbk (DILD), is projected to be concluded by 2024.

title: JCI strengthened, LAJU rode the wave to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Jasa Berdikari Logistics Tbk (LAJU) was closed 33.33% higher, leading the company to arrive as the top gainer in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) this Monday (11/9).

title: Triputra Agro Persada to acquire affiliate
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG), a palm and rubber plantation company, has acquired one of its affiliates, PT Sejahtera Anugerah Kapuas (SAK).

title: Maybank Sekuritas has become a new investor in four different issuers at once
body: On Thursday, September 7, PT Maybank Sekuritas Indonesia increased its share ownership by becoming a new investor in four issuers at the same time.

title: Equity at deficiency, OCAP still earns from forex gains
body: Although it reported zero income from its main source, PT Onix Capital Tbk (OCAP) still managed to book a profit in the first half of 2023.

title: Arwana Citramulia to set up IDR 150 billion for buyback
body: PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA), the ceramic tile manufacturer of UNO and Arwana tiles, is preparing for a buyback.

title: TAF eyes IDR 625 billion in bonds’ issuance
body: PT Toyota Astra Financial Services (TAF), a business unit under Astra Group engaged in the financing industry, will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds IV Phase II Year 2023.

title: Officially listed on IDX, AEGS eyes for IDR 50 billion revenue this year
body: PT Anugerah Spareparts Sejahtera Tbk (AEGS), an automotive components issuer which has just listed its shares on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) today, is targeting revenues of IDR 50 billion in 2023.

title: The net foreign volume dropped to negative 636 million shares
body: Net foreign volume fell to -636,173,400 shares at the end of the first week of September. On Friday, September 8, foreign investors purchased approximately 2.16 billion shares while selling somewhere near 2.79 billion shares.

title: Mitsui & Co. recently purchased 252 million shares of Pelat Timah (NIKL), gaining control of 10% of the company
body: On September 6, a foreign investor known as SMTBUSA S/A Mitsui & Co. Ltd. purchased 252.33 million shares of PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk (NIKL).

title: Increased foreign sales leads to a net foreign volume of -150 million shares
body: Foreign investors increased their stock purchases on Thursday, September 7. The total number of shares sold was 3.22 billion, while the total number of shares purchased was around 3.07 billion, though it was still relatively high.

title: Starting the week, JCI slipped Monday morning
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) entered the red zone following its brief jump to 6,931.14 this morning (11/9).

title: Subsidiaries dissolved, Onix Capital lost income source again
body: PT Onix Capital Tbk (OCAP), a business and management consultant service, announces the winding up of one of its subsidiaries, PT Menteng Medika Indonesia (MMI).

title: BSML’s major shareholders to transfer rights issue portion to public
body: PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk (BSML), a marine transportation service provider, will issue a capital raise with pre-emptive rights, also known as a rights issue, by issuing 46.25 million new shares.

title: TFAS seized back top gainers title
body: PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk (TFAS) managed to once again secure the top gainers title last Friday (8/9) after slipping up to the runner-up on September 7.

title: Surya Fajar Capital distributes IDR 4.63 billion capital injection to subsidiaries
body: PT Surya Fajar Capital Tbk (SFAN), a holding and investment issuer, has provided additional capital for one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Surya Fajar Urun Dana (SFUND).

title: Petrosea enters partnership with Hyundai Construction Equipment Asia
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with PT Hyundai Construction Equipment Asia to provide solutions for mining, construction, and heavy equipment sectors in Indonesia.

title: MCAS reveals underlying connection among dozens of subsidiaries
body: Until June 2023, PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) recorded dozens of subsidiaries under its belt, three of which have been established as publicly listed companies.

title: Sharia unit of BFI Finance: small contribution, huge growth up to 44%
body: Until the end of June 2023, the contribution of Sharia Business Unit of PT BFI Finance Tbk (BFIN) towards total financing were still recorded at approximately 2.2%.

title: MNC Land introduces Lido Music & Art Center
body: PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG), a tourism and hotel affair company under MNC Group, officially inaugurates Lido Music & Art Center (LMAC) today (8/9).

title: Mandiri Tunas Finance to issue bonds of IDR 1.13 trillion
body: PT Mandiri Tunas Finance (MTF), a subsidiary of PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) engaged in the financing sector, will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds VI Phase II Year 2023 with a total principal of IDR 1.13 trillion.

title: Marketing costs drag profit down, MCAS: short-term pinch for long-term gain
body: The significant profit decline of PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS) in the first half of 2023, reaching minus 60% year-on-year (yoy), is revealed to be the result of swelling selling expenses.

title: Eyeing IDR 750 billion, IATA to issue bonds and sukuk wakalah
body: PT MNC Energy Investments Tbk (IATA) is targeting to secure IDR 750 billion from the issuance of Shelf-Registration Bonds I 2023 worth IDR 500 billion and Shelf-Registration Sukuk Wakalah I 2023 worth IDR 250 billion starting from September 29 to October 3, 2023.

title: BFIN to launch unsecured loans and EV financing
body: PT BFI Finance Tbk (BFIN) announces its upcoming products, consisting of unsecured financing and electric motorcycle financing.

title: Kokoh Exa Nusantara to offer 450 million shares in IPO
body: PT Kokoh Exa Nusantara Tbk (KOCI), a construction and real estate company, is set to debut through initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 450 million shares.

title: LinkAja launches payment app aimed for SOE employees
body: LinkAja, a payment service platform developed by PT Fintek Karya Nusantara (Finaraya), has introduced a payment service and integrated communication application for employees of State-Owned Enterprises (SOE).

title: APEX replaces TFAS at top gainers
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX) increased 34.74% on yesterday’s (7/9) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX), replacing PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk (TFAS), which last Wednesday (6/9) reigned at the top of the gainers’ list.

title: Indonesian govt will hold another state sukuk auction next week
body: The Indonesian government once again will hold an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on Tuesday (12/9) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 6 trillion.

title: Yeti Sopandi, who just joined Esta Multi (ESTA), immediately holds a 12.49% stake
body: An individual investor called Yeti Sopandi purchased 303.04 million shares of PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk (ESTA) on Tuesday, September 5.

title: Dana Brata Luhur to distribute IDR 30 per share interim dividend
body: PT Dana Brata Luhur Tbk (TEBE), a holding company in the infrastructure to transportation sector, will distribute an interim dividend of IDR 30 per share.

title: Lovina Beach Brewery to release 1.18 billion shares via IPO
body: PT Lovina Beach Brewery Tbk (STRK), an alcoholic beverage distributor from Bali, will carry out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by releasing 1.18 billion shares.

title: TBIG sold 81.59 million treasury shares to Bersama Digital Infrastructure
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG), a telecommunications company belonging to the Djarum Group, has sold 20.59 million treasury shares.

title: The total of shares bought and sold was around 2.8 billion, with a slight surplus in net foreign volume
body: On Wednesday, September 6, total foreign investor purchases and sales were in the 2.8 billion-share range. With 2.87 billion in foreign purchases and 2.85 billion in foreign sales, the foreign net volume was only a slight surplus of around 20,745,000 shares.

title: Bank Maspion Indonesia to arrange rights issue of 9.84 billion shares
body: PT Bank Maspion Tbk (BMAS) will issue an increase of capital with pre-emptive rights, also known as a rights issue, of 9.48 billion new shares.

title: CGS-CIMB Sekuritas now holds more than 400 million Cilacap Samudera Fishing (ASHA) shares
body: On Monday, September 4, PT CGS-CIMB Sekuritas Indonesia acquired 400.10 million shares of PT Cilacap Samudera Fishing Industry Tbk (ASHA).

title: Collected by investors, TFAS arrived to top gainers
body: PT Telefast Indonesia Tbk (TFAS), an issuer with market capitalisation of IDR 2.11 trillion, rose 25% during yesterday’s (6/9) transaction in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: BKSL’s shareholders to raise portion in CITY
body: PT Sakti Generasi Perdana (SGP) acquires 20.63% of shares in PT Natura City Developments Tbk (CITY) worth IDR 55.75 billion. This acquisition raises SGP’s direct portion in this company.

title: Ifishdeco to transfer 5.65 million treasury shares through MESOP Phase II program
body: PT Ifishdeco Tbk (IFSH), a nickel mining issuer, will transfer 5.65 million treasury shares through the management and employee share ownership program (MESOP) Phase II.

title: Eyeing fresh funds, Bank Niaga to sell of 188.87 million treasury shares
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) will divest 188,878,782 units of its treasury shares starting from mid-September to December 2023. Yesterday (5/9), the shares were traded with the highest price at IDR 1,700 per share.

title: Primadaya aims for plastic manufacturing plant expansion in Solo
body: PT Primadaya Plastisindo Tbk (PDPP) plans to establish a plastic packaging manufacturing plant and a branch office in Solo, Central Java, in order to raise its market share.

title: Bumi Resources once again enters FTSE Global Equity Index
body: PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI), an energy company under Salim Group, has been officially listed in FTSE Global Equity Index as of September 2023.

title: BSSR to allocate USD 60 million of interim dividend
body: PT Baramulti Suksessarana Tbk (BSSR) will distribute interim dividend of USD 60 million or equal to approximately IDR 915.6 billion.

title: NCKL to form joint venture, owning 36%
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) expands its business in the nickel mining industry by introducing a joint venture named PT Karya Tambang Sentosa (KTS).

title: IDX Market Cap hit IDR 10.33 quadrillion
body: Market capitalisation of Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) hit over IDR 10.33 quadrillion as of yesterday (5/9), recorded since the beginning of this year (year-to-date/ytd). It shows an increase from IDR 10.24 trillion seen on August 31, 2023.

title: EDGE to channel IDR 105.5 billion to subsidiary
body: PT Indointernet Tbk (EDGE), a digital infrastructure provider, has granted additional credit facility worth IDR 105.5 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Ekagrata Data Gemilang (EDG).

title: Ulima Nitra aims for over IDR 30 billion net profit in 2023
body: PT Ulima Nitra Tbk (UNIQ), a mining equipment and service provider, record net profit of IDR 18.8 billion in the first half of 2023.

title: Foreign net volume slid into negative territory, now at minus 62 million shares
body: On Tuesday, September 5, foreign net volume slid into negative territory, closing at minus 62,791,800 shares. Foreign investors purchased a total of 2.39 billion shares, while approximately 2.45 billion shares were released.

title: Prinsep Management now owns 78% of FAP Agri (FAPA) after acquiring 2.2 billion shares
body: On Friday, September 1, Prinsep Management Limited kicked off September by purchasing 2.2 billion shares of palm oil producer PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA).

title: Net foreign volume is a surplus of 124 million; BUMI and BRMS shares are the highest
body: Starting the new week in September, net foreign volume was 124,754,400 shares on Monday, September 4.

title: BRIS prepares for Saudi Arabian branch
body: PT Bank Syariah Indonesia Tbk (BRIS), or BSI, will expand a new branch office in Saudi Arabia at least by the first half of 2023. The company has reportedly been meeting with several stakeholders in order to realise this plan.

title: IPAC acquires Era Pro Realty shares for business expansion
body: PT Era Graha Realty Tbk (IPAC), the real estate company holding the ERA brand in Indonesia, has acquired shares in PT Era Pro Realty (EPR).

title: Chandra Asri Petrochemical eyes IDR 1 trillion in bonds’ issuance
body: PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA), a petrochemical provider, will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds IV Phase III Year 2023 with a total principal of IDR 1 trillion.

title: Court denied Greylag Goose Leasing’s appeal
body: Commercial Court of Central Jakarta District Court has denied the plea for peace agreement revocation submitted by Greylag Goose Leasing in regard to the homologated restructuring process of PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA).

title: Panca Mitra Multiperdana to set up rights issue of 235.3 million shares
body: PT Panca Mitra Multiperdana Tbk (PMMP), a shrimp processing and trading company, will issue 235.3 million new shares with pre-emptive rights, also known as a rights issue.

title: Chandra Asri’s subsidiary to rent affiliate’s land for plant construction
body: One of subsidiaries of PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA), PT Chandra Asri Alkali (CAA), has leased a piece of land owned by PT Krakatau Daya Listrik (KDL) to make preparation for a plant construction.

title: Elnusa concludes seismic survey in Southwest Papua
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA) has completed an ocean seismic survey project in the waters of Sorong Regency, Southwest Papua.

title: CUAN eyes coal and gold mines in Central Kalimantan and West Nusa Tenggara
body: PT Petrindo Jaya Kreasi Tbk (CUAN) extends its interest in gold and metallurgical coal mining in Murung Raya, Central Kalimantan, as well as in Sumbawa, West Nusa Tenggara.

title: PALM secures revolving loan worth USD 75 million
body: PT Provident Investment Bersama Tbk (PALM) obtains a revolving loan facility worth USD 75 million from United Overseas Bank Limited, which will be used for refinancing and enhancing working capital.

title: Philmon Samuel Tanuri increased his stake in Treimegah Sekuritas by 0.5%
body: Philmon Samuel Tanuri, the president director and investor of PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM), purchased 35.71 million shares of TRIM on Thursday, August 31.

title: Lautan Luas to invest more in water treatment business
body: PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS) has channelled investment worth IDR 5 billion to one of its subsidiaries engaged in the water treatment industry, PT Lautan Solusi Airindo (LSA).

title: 26 companies in line for IPO
body: Until September 1, 2023, Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) reveals that there are 26 companies queuing for initial public offering (IPO).

title: Anugerah Spareparts sets offering price to IDR 100 per share
body: PT Anugerah Spareparts Sejahtera Tbk (AEGS), an automotive filter manufacturer, has set the offering price in its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 100 per share.

title: IMPC’s market cap skyrockets after bonus shares distribution
body: Market capitalisation of PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC) reportedly soared to IDR 17.47 trillion as of August 2023, multiplying nearly tenfold of IDR 1.9 trillion recorded on June 27, 2023.

title: Bank Victoria International issues NCD of IDR 440 billion
body: PT Bank Victoria International Tbk (BVIC) has issued Negotiable Certificate of Deposit (NCD) with total principal of IDR 440 billion.

title: Era Digital Media to invest IDR 57.57 billion in cloud service business
body: PT Era Digital Media Tbk (AWAN) has channelled extra capital worth IDR 57.57 billion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Era Awan Digital (Eranyacloud).

title: At the beginning of the month, there was a surplus of 442 million shares in foreign trade
body: Foreign sales volume was only 1.61 billion shares at the beginning of September. The volume of foreign purchases itself reached 2.05 billion, so September's net foreign volume began with a surplus of 442,844,200 shares on Friday, September 1.

title: Bank Mandiri will pay the most money out of the 20 bonds that will mature in September
body: In September 2023, twenty bonds from fifteen different issuers will mature. Companies from various sectors will pay their maturing bonds to their investors, beginning with banking, mining, infrastructure, and media.

title: PP London Sumatra Indonesia to sell 2.9 million treasury shares
body: PT PP London Sumatra Indonesia Tbk (LSIP), a plantation company under Salim Group, will divest 2.9 million units of its treasury shares.

title: Allo Bank optimistic in double-digit growth this year
body: PT Allo Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBHI) is optimistic that its interest income will grow over 10% at the end of this year.

title: Indo Tambangraya Megah to channel interim dividend of IDR 2,660 per share
body: PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG), a coal mining group under Banpu Group of Thailand, plans an interim dividend distribution worth USD 199.27 million.

title: Low sales and utilisation, ARNA still goes for deliberate expansion
body: Amid its performance decline, PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA) maintains its focus on expanding Plant 4C in Ogan Ilir, South Sumatra.

title: Agro Manunggal acquired nearly 12% of Argo Pantes (ARGO) stock
body: On Wednesday, August 30, textile company PT Argo Pantes Tbk (ARGO) welcomed PT Agro Manunggal Triasta as the new owner of 380 million ARGO shares.

title: Excellent foreign transaction volume near the end of August
body: On Thursday, August 31, foreign investors traded a massive amount of stock. The total number of shares purchased exceeded 8.31 billion, while foreigners sold 7.22 billion.

title: Sunterra's stake in Cerestar Indonesia (TRGU) rose from 12.5% to 21.5%
body: On Tuesday, August 29, PT Sunterra Indonesia, the owner of 1 billion shares of PT Cerestar Indonesia Tbk (TRGU), purchased an additional 714.28 million shares through PT Semesta Indovest Sekuritas. Sunterra's stake in this wheat flour producer rose from 12.59% to 21.58%.

title: GOTO's net foreign volume is in excess; net foreign is also surplus by 235 million
body: PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) reported the highest net foreign volume on Wednesday, August 30, with 176 million shares.

title: Multitrend Indo sets IPO price to IDR 266 per share
body: PT Multitrend Indo Tbk (BABY), a retail company for children clothing and toys, has set the price for its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 266 per share.

title: Shifting 27.41%, VINS seated at top gainers
body: PT Victoria Insurance Tbk (VINS) became the top gainers whilst the Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) slowed down yesterday (31/8).

title: Gov’t eyes IDR 14 trillion in SUN auction next week
body: The Indonesian Government will hold an auction of Government Securities (SUN) on next Tuesday (5/9), aiming for an indicative target of IDR 14 trillion.

title: INKP to drop 2 inactive subsidiaries
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a pulp and paper company under Sinarmas Group, has liquidated two of its inactive subsidiaries.

title: ALDO to sell off 22.99 million treasury shares
body: PT Alkindo Naratama Tbk (ALDO) plans to transfer 22.99 million units of its treasury stock to PT Pabrik Kertas Noree Indonesia (PKNI) and PT Ardana Investama Indonesia (AII).

title: Designing superblock in Semarang, Pakuwon Jati to acquire land for IDR 302.8 billion
body: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON), a property and real estate company, has acquired a piece of land for IDR 302.8 billion in Semarang, which will be developed into a superblock area.

title: MITI’s subsidiary to obtain IDR 47 billion worth of contracts
body: PT Wasesa Line (WL), a subsidiary of PT Mitra Investindo Tbk (MITI), secures a procurement contract for tugboat and drill pipe barge worth DIR 47 billion from PT Pertamina Hulu Kalimantan (PHKT).

title: Armada Berjaya Trans to channel IDR 1.3 trillion for subsidiary’s working capital
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA), a common good transportation company, has channelled a loan facility worth IDR 1.3 billion to one of its subsidiaries.

title: Hebang enters JIIPE with AKRA, investing USD 800 million for plant
body: Sichuan Hebang Biotechnology Co. Ltd., a chemical manufacturer based in China, will invest USD 800 million for plant construction in the Special Economic Zone of Java Integrated Industrial and Port Estate (JIIPE) in East Java.

title: Concluding session I, JCI slowed down
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was corrected to red zone until the closing on Thursday’s (31/8) first session.

title: Ceramic market still idle, ARNA revises 2023 profit target to IDR 444 billion
body: After reporting consecutive decreases in its performance in Q1 and Q2 this year, PT Arwana Citramulia Tbk (ARNA) sets up realistic target and lowers the profit target to IDR 444 billion.

title: Incoming bids reached IDR 21.28 trillion at state sukuk auction
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) on August 29, 2023, were recorded at IDR 21.28 trillion.

title: CITA’s profit plummeted 110.08% in H1 2023
body: The performance of PT Cita Mineral Investindo Tbk (CITA) shrank in the first half of 2023 due to declining revenue, particularly seen in third-party sales.

title: Jaya Agra Wattie granted tenor extension of shareholder loan
body: PT Jaya Agra Wattie Tbk (JAWA), a rubber and palm plantation company, has extended the credit tenor secured from its ultimate shareholder that have been overdue.

title: JCI strengthened, OMED rode the wave to top gainers

Hal itu menyusul dicapainya volume produksi sebesar 33,41 juta ton pada Semester I-2023, naik 19% dari 28,02 juta ton.

body: The profit of PT Bintang Mitra Semestaraya Tbk (BMSR) dropped 84.54% in the first half of 2023 from the numbers seen in the same period in 2022 due to losses on foreign exchange

title: BCA continues to protect users’ data
