title: BRI secures Sustainable Finance Award 2023
body: The consistency in implementing sustainable business practices has become one characteristic of a modern company that abides by the triple bottom line: profit, people, and planet. This consistency is also what makes PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) become the only company in Indonesia that is granted the Sustainable Finance Award 2023.

title: Equity worth IDR 18.3 trillion, Indolife reigns over 50 insurance companies
body: PT Indolife Pensiontama recorded equity worth IDR 18.3 trillion as of March 2023, arriving at the top among 50 insurance companies with highest equity in the non-bank financial industry.

title: Foreigners purchase many GOTO shares, increasing net foreign volume to a 475 million-share surplus
body: On Wednesday, July 12, net foreign volume was boosted by a large volume of shares of technology company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) purchased by foreign investors.

title: HITS’s subsidiary to debut, offering 2.7 billion shares in IPO
body: PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS), will conduct the initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: TBS Energi (TOBA)'s two large investors released their shares
body: On Monday, July 10, two investors who own more than 5% of the shares in the energy and mining company PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) decided to release their shares.

title: President names Head of Projo as Minister of Communication and Informatics
body: President Joko Widodo has inaugurated Budi Arie Setiadi as Minister of Communication and Informatics and named five vice ministers in State Palace today (17/7).

title: Jasa Marga to loan IDR 490 billion for Balikpapan-Samarinda Toll Road
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) has channelled a shareholder loan worth IDR 490 billion to Balikpapan-Samarinda Toll Road operator, PT Jasa Marga Balikpapan Samarinda (JBS).

title: Japfa Comfeed Indonesia to sell 7.36 million treasury shares
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA) will initiate the sale of 7.36 million units of its treasury shares that were gained in a buyback from April 5, 2016, to October 5, 2017.

title: ADHI secured 57% new contracts from private sector in H1
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) obtained 57% new contracts, worth IDR 7.98 trillion, from the private sector in the first half of 2023.

title: ERAA's subsidiary to debut on stock market, releasing 1.03 billion shares
body: PT Sinar Eka Selaras Tbk (ERAL), a subsidiary of PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), will carry out an Initial Public Offering of 1.03 billion shares on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Arkadia Digital Media's first half revenue soars 37.8%
body: PT Arkadia Digital Media Tbk (DIGI), an issuer that owns news and multimedia portals, posted revenue of IDR 25.98 billion in the first half (1H) of 2023.

title: Minahasa Pembangunan Hebat offers 240.74 million shares in IPO
body: PT Minahasa Pembangunan Hebat Tbk (HBAT), a real estate company from North Sulawesi, will release 240.74 million shares through an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange.

title: IPO realization for SICO business development is still low
body: PT Sigma Energy Compressindo Tbk (SICO) has just realized a business development budget of IDR 1.18 billion out of a total allocation of IDR 12 billion.

title: PAM still has IDR 45.58 billion capex from IPO
body: PT PAM Mineral Tbk (NICL) still has IDR 45.58 billion left from the initial public offering (IPO) until the first half of 2023. The unrealized funds are much more than the capital expenditure allocation.

title: First half, AMOR recorded IDR 32.6 trillion in managed funds
body: PT Ashmore Asset Management Indonesia Tbk (AMOR) recorded assets under management (AuM) of IDR 32.6 trillion in the first half of 2023, a 2.5% decrease from the first semester of 2022 of IDR 33.4 trillion.

title: LAJU disbursed IDR 31.95 billion IPO proceeds to purchase assets
body: PT Jasa Berdikari Logistics Tbk (LAJU) realized IDR 31.95 billion in proceeds from the initial public offering (IPO) until the first semester of 2023.

title: Equity Global purchases 3.33 billion Bank Ganesha shares
body: Equity Global International Limited (EGIL), the ultimate shareholder of PT Bank Ganesha Tbk (BGTG), has purchased 3.33 billion shares through transactions on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in stages from 3-7 July 2023.

title: PGEO cooperates with various parties to develop geothermal business
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO) has signed strategic partnerships with a number of parties to achieve the target of geothermal development in Indonesia.

title: GULA deposits IDR 28.80 billion of IPO remainder in two banks
body: PT Aman Agrindo Tbk (GULA), a sugar producer, has kept the remaining funds from the initial public offering of IDR 28.80 billion. SUGAR's IPO proceeds on August 3, 2022 were recorded at IDR 50.34 billion.

title: Foreign trade volume increased, resulting in a net foreign surplus of 23 million shares
body: The number of shares traded by foreign investors increased on Tuesday, July 11, after falling the previous trading day.

title: Reaching top gainers, SKRN gained 23.02%
body: PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk (SKRN) shares are in the top position of Top Gainers with a 23.02% gain in a stock transaction on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on (13/7).

title: Indomobil Multi Jasa's cash dividend increases 100%
body: PT Indomobil Multi Jasa Tbk (IMJS), a financial services company owned by the Salim Group, will distribute a higher cash dividend for the 2022 financial year, namely IDR 0.5 per share.

title: Armada Berjaya Trans converts Aman Bae Sentosa's debt into shares
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA), a transportation company owned by PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk (PPGL), has carried out the debt conversion provided to PT Aman Bae Sentosa (ABS).

title: PGAS announces low carbon business partnership with Pertamina NRE
body: PGAS announces low carbon business partnership with Pertamina NRE

title: BRI to bring corporate financing to the next level
body: In their development of business and enhancement of profile, companies in the corporation segment must be pushed to access fundings through alternative fundings, one of them being the Initial Public Offering (IPO).

title: Gov’t to offer state sukuk to public, eyeing IDR 6 trillion this time
body: The Indonesian government will once again schedule an auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on July 18, 2023, this time seeking an indicative target of IDR 6 trillion.

title: Book building, MUTU reveals future business prospects
body: PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk (MUTU), which is currently holding its book building stage before debuting through initial public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX), is revealing its three business strategic focuses that will become future prospect of MUTU.

title: Profiting, BOSS still abstain from dividend distribution
body: Despite raking profit throughout 2022, PT Borneo Olah Sarana Sukses Tbk (BOSS) decided to abstain from distributing dividend to its shareholders. In 2021, the issuer did not channel any dividend as it lost IDR 165.35 billion.

title: First half, PTPP new contract grows 6.31%
body: Until the first semester of 2023, PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) pocketed new contracts of IDR 11.62 trillion, growing 6.31% from the same period last year of IDR 10.93 trillion.

title: Because of the low volume of foreign purchases, net foreign is minus 93 million shares
body: In comparison to typical stock exchange days, the volume of shares traded by foreign investors on Monday, July 10, was quite low.

title: JCI declines after moving up at opening bell
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHGS) plunged into the red zone in the morning session at 11.21 WIB on Thursday (13/7).

title: Equity Global increases its holdings in Bank Ganesha (BGTG) by 1.19 billion shares
body: An additional 1.19 billion shares of PT Bank Ganesha Tbk (BGTG) entered Equity Global International Limited's holdings on Friday, July 7.

title: DOID, RALS, and DGIK all initiated share buybacks
body: If normally only PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID) conducts share buybacks, two other issuers appear to have done so on Thursday, July 6.

title: MNC Sekuritas took over 4.05 billion MNC Land (KPIG) shares from MNC Asia
body: On Wednesday, July 5, as many as 4.05 billion shares of PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG) changed ownership.

title: MIDI prepares IDR 373.55 billion capex
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI), the manager of Alfamidi's modern retail, is preparing IDR 373.55 billion for capital expenditure.

title: TRON soared 25% to top gainers
body: The stock of PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusa Tbk (TRON) was seen surging 25% in yesterday’s (12/7) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Elnusa invests 40% of capex in additional tank cars
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA), a company engaged in the upstream oil and gas industry, announces the allocation of 40% of its total capital expenditure (capex) to acquire more land-based tankers.

title: PSSI to channel IDR 100 billion to Pelita Samudera Sreeya
body: PT IMC Pelita Logistik Tbk (PSSI), a marine transportation service provider, has channelled a loan facility to one of its subsidiaries, PT Pelita Samudera Sreeya (PSS).

title: United Tractors to raise interest rates for subsidiary loan
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) has increased the loan interest rate and extended the funds’ availability period for facilities granted to its subsidiaries.

title: BRIlian Villages Program of BRI highlights economic potential of ‘Durian Village’
body: Tunjungan Village, Blora, Central Java is known for its robust nature tourism potential, which is further supported by BRIlian Village program that showcases the culinary prospect of a particular horticulture commodity, durian.

title: H1 2023 ended, JRPT used up IDR 32.92 billion for buyback
body: PT Jaya Real Property Tbk (JRPT) had realised IDR 32.92 billion of its buyback budget in the first half of 2023. The allocated funds for buyback that had been spent since this program started on December 20, 2019, has reached IDR 377.43 billion.

title: MDKI saves up IDR 114.93 billion of 2017 IPO proceeds
body: After conducting its initial public offering (IPO) in 2017, PT Emdeki Utama Tbk (MDKI) still holds onto IDR 114.93 billion of its IPO proceeds.

title: JCI declined and swiftly recovered this morning
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) regained its strength to 6,814.095 at 9.41 AM WIB on today’s (12/7) morning session. At the opening bell at 9 AM, the index was seen declining to 6,795.47.

title: Debuting, Mutuagung Lestari eyes IDR 103.71 billion in IPO
body: PT Mutuagung Lestari Tbk (MUTU), a testing and certification service provider, will initiate its public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange.

title: RMKO to integrate mining and logistics services post-IPO
body: PT Royaltama Mulia Kontraktorindo Tbk (RMKO) plans to integrate its mining and logistics services in South Sumatra after raising funds through its initial public offering (IPO).

title: Incoming bids in last SUN auction hit IDR 47.79 trillion
body: The total incoming bids recorded in the auction of 7 series of Government Securities last Tuesday (11/7) were recorded at IDR 47.79 trillion.

title: Indika Energi sets up 2 new subsidiaries for EV rental business
body: PT Indika Energi Tbk (INDY), through its subsidiaries, has established two new subordinate companies that are projected to operate in the electric vehicle (EV) rental businesss.

title: Rising 25%, AIMS secured top gainers title
body: The stock of PT Akbar Indo Makmur Stimec Tbk (AIMS) increased 25% at the end of yesterday’s (11/7) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: APL Realty to pay off senior bonds maturing in 2024
body: APL Realty Holdings Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of PT Agung Podomoro Land Tbk (APLN), will pay off its Senior Bonds of USD 300 million that will mature in 2024.

title: UNTR provides additional loan IDR 225 billion for subsidiary
body: PT United Tractros Tbk (UNTR), a subsidiary of Astra International which runs the business of heavy equipment and mining, has provided an additional loan limit of IDR 225 billion for one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Bina Pertiwi (BP).

title: MPXL obtains IDR 35 billion contract to transport Conch Cement waste
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL) has obtained a cooperation contract for the transportation of fly ash and bottom ash (FABA) worth IDR 35 billion from PT Conch Cement Indonesia.

title: Private placement, ARGO to convert IDR 1.61 trillion bonds to equity
body: PT Argo Pantes Tbk (ARGO), a textile company under Argo Manunggal Group, has converted debts worth IDR 1.61 trillion to equity, issued through a capital increase without pre-emptive rights, also known as private placement.

title: MIDI seeks IDR 1.24 trillion via rights issue
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI) is eyeing IDR 1.24 trillion in fresh funds via the issuance of 4.61 billion shares with an exercise price of IDR 270 per share.

title: Cinema XXI to utilise over 50% IPO proceeds for expansion
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA) will allocate over 50% of the proceeds of its initial public offering (IPO) for the development and expansion of Cinema XXI theatre network in Indonesia.

title: IDX to sanction 49 issuers late for financial report submission
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) gives written sanctions III and fines worth IDR 150 million to 49 issuers that have yet to deliver their Q1 2023 financial reports.

title: Officially under BRI Group, Danareksa Investment Management is now BRI Manajemen Investasi
body: The industry of investment management in Indonesia has shown a positive trend, increasing almost 7% within the past 5 years. Therefore, the opportunity blooms for companies active in supporting this industry, including PT Danareksa Investment Manajemen (DIM).

title: PGN’s Western Java operational area uses up 500-550 BBTUD of natural gas
body: Western Java is one of work areas of PGN with the natural gas utilisation level at 500-550 BBTUD, whose service has been brought into industrial, commercial, and residential sectors in Western Java,

title: Saka Energi sets up buyback Bonds 2017
body: PT Saka Energi Indonesia (SAKA) is repurchasing (buyback) USD 200 million of the remaining Bonds 2017 worth USD 376.25 million. This corporate action plan will last for a month, starting yesterday (6/7) and ending on August 2.

title: Foreign purchases are low, and net foreign volume slips back into negative territory
body: In comparison to previous exchange days, the volume of foreign purchases on Friday, July 7, was quite low. Foreign investors only purchased approximately 1.78 billion shares, while more than 2.43 billion shares were sold.

title: With a net foreign surplus of 147 million, foreign trade volumes show a slight disparity
body: Foreign trade of Indonesian stocks on Thursday, July 6, was still showing a slight disparity. Foreign purchases totaled 2.42 billion shares, while foreign sales totaled around 2.28 billion.

title: First day on board, TGUK reigned as top gainers
body: PT Platinum Wahab Nusantara Tbk (TGUK) arrived at the top of the gainers' list on its first trading day in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) yesterday (10/7).

title: MAP Aktif Adiperkasa sets up stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT MAP Aktif Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPA), a retail company under PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPI), will initiate a stock split with a 1:10 ratio.

title: MNC Media transferred 545 million MNC Digital Entertainment shares to Global Mediacom
body: On Tuesday, July 4, as many as 545 million shares of PT MNC Digital Entertainment Tbk (MSIN) were transferred from its parent company, PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk, to PT Global Mediacom Tbk.

title: Successfully supporting rubber farmers of Pagar Dewa, PGN secures Padmamitra Award 2022
body: PT PGN Tbk (PGAS), as a gas subholding of Pertamina, through its Corporate Social & Responsibility (CSR), designs the Desa Kaya program for Pagar Dewa Village.

title: Foreign trade volumes differ slightly, with a net foreign surplus of 160 million shares
body: On Wednesday, July 5, the volumes of foreign trade were stable at around 2 billion shares. The volume of foreign purchases was 2.07 billion, which was only slightly more than the volume of foreign sales, which was 1.91 billion.

title: MNC Sekuritas acquired 9.16 billion shares of MNC Land (KPIG)
body: On Monday, July 3, PT MNC Land Tbk (KPIG), a member of the MNC Group involved in the entertainment and hospitality sectors, handed over more than 9.16 billion of its shares to PT MNC Sekuritas.

title: Foreign sales are low; net foreign volume is a surplus of over 330 million
body: On Tuesday, July 4, foreign investors sold a relatively small number of shares, totaling 1.59 billion shares.

title: Superkrane Mitra Utama (SKRN) sold 156 million shares of its own
body: On Tuesday, June 27, the equipment rental, lifting, and construction company PT Superkrane Mitra Utama Tbk (SKRN) sold 156 million SKRN shares.

title: SEMA to realise IDR 55.22 billion IPO proceeds
body: PT Semacom Integrated Tbk (SEMA), a new and renewable energy (NRE) manufacturer, had realised IDR 55.22 billion of the proceeds of initial public offering until June 2023.

title: Waskita Beton only secures 17.35% of new contract target

title: Media Nusantara Citra to distribute dividend of IDR 5 per share
body: PT Media Nusantara Citra Tbk (MNCN), the media company under MNC Group, will carry out the distribution of cash dividend of IDR 5 per share taken out of the net profit in the fiscal year 2022.

title: Jumbo dividends from 3 top banks of Indeks52
body: Three bank constituents of Indeks52 have arranged distributions of jumbo dividends to their respective shareholders. Among the top 3 dividends, the lowest amount is recorded at IDR 20 trillion.

title: First session, Indeks52 top stocks strengthen
body: Several top stocks listed as constituents of Indeks52 have been seen shifting upwards until 10 AM WIB today (10/7) since the opening bell at 9 AM.

title: Shifting 34.97%, INPS sat at the top gainers
body: The shares of PT Indah Prakasa Sentosa Tbk (INPS) were closed 34.97% higher during last Friday’s (7/7) closing bell. This issuer managed to arrive at the top of the gainers’ list, winning over 10 other issuers.

title: Cinema XXI to go public next month, offering 8.33 billion shares
body: PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA), widely known as Cinema XXI, will begin the initial public offering (IPO) of 8.33 billion of new shares.

title: Aneka Tambang to initiate first stage of commissioned ferronickel plant

body: PT Royaltama Mulia Kontraktorindo Tbk (RMKO), a mining support and heavy equipment rental service provider, will issue 250 million shares in the initial public offering (IPO) on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: OKAS to conclude debt conversion to ISIL
body: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk (OKAS) issues 607.52 million shares to convert its debts of USD 12.35 million to Island Spice Investments Limited (ISIL).

title: Kimia Farma opens 23 new outlets in various provinces
body: PT Kimia Farma Tbk (KAEF) opened 23 new outlets simultaneously on Friday (7/7) today, which are spread across various provinces in Indonesia.

title: Despite making profit, RAFI has not distributed dividends
body: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk (RAFI) collected profit for the year attributable to the parent entity of IDR 10.42 billion in 2022, but this issuer has not distributed dividends this year.

title: Officially listed on IDX, Amman Mineral becomes the biggest IPO this year
body: PT Amman Mineral Internasional Tbk (AMMN) officially debuted on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Friday (7/7) today, after carrying out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on 3-5 July 2023.

title: MITI team up with SANY and EFL to develop solar farm
body: PT Mitra Investindo Tbk (MITI) cooperates with Sanya South East Asia Ltd (SANY) and Emas Fortuna Ltd (EFL) to develop a Solar Power Plant (PLTS) or solar farm.

body: PT Fortune Mate Indonesia Tbk (FMII), a property and real estate company, will distribute bonus shares worth IDR 370 billion.

title: Govt holds SUN auction targeting IDR 14 trillion
body: The Indonesian government once again is holding an auction for Government Bonds (SUN) on Tuesday (11/7) next week with an indicative target of IDR 14 trillion.

title: BNP Paribas AM optimistic ESG Equity will be accepted by customers
body: PT BNP Paribas Asset Management (AM) is optimistic that the ESG Equity Mutual Fund product will be accepted by customers considering it is a long-term investment product with consistent growth.

title: Expanding container unloading business in eastern Indonesia, TMAS establishes new subsidiary
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a container and goods transportation company, has formed a new subsidiary, namely PT Temas Port Maluku Utara (TPMU) domiciled in North Maluku.

title: Gaining 35%, DWGL reach top gainers
body: The shares of PT Dwi Guna Laksana Tbk (DWGL) rose 35%, the upper limit for the increase in the transaction price, which brought it to Top Gainers, yesterday (6/7).

title: JNK secures IDR 2.81 trillion in loans
body: PT Jasamarga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR), the holding company of PT Jasamarga Tranjawa Tol (TJJ) has disbursed loans to its subsidiary, PT Jasamarga Ngawi Kertosono Kediri (JNK)

title: AMRT included in four categories of Index52
body: PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT) was selected as an Index52 constituent in the Main Index, High Dividend, High Growth, and Big Market Capitalization (Big Market Cap) categories.

title: 5 sectors that record largest trading value
body: The Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) listed five business sectors with the largest trading value until June 2023.

title: Trimegah Sekuritas issues IDR 408.8 billion bonds
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM), a securities brokerage and underwriting company, issued shelf Registration Bonds I Phase I 2023 with a principal amount of IDR 358.8 billion.

title: JCI strengthened throughout the day
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) strengthened until the closing bell of the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Thursday (6/7). In monitoring at 15.15 West Indonesia Time (WIB), the index closed at 6,749.68.

title: Akseleran aims IDR 358.62 billion fresh funds via IPO
body: PT Akselerasi Usaha Indonesia Tbk (AKSL), a fintech P2P lending company, will hold an initial public offering (IPO) of 2.99 billion shares on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: 3 years of loss, MIRA absent in paying dividends
body: PT Mitra International Resources Tbk (MIRA) is still absent from distributing dividends to its shareholders because it has recorded losses in the last three years.

title: TBIG issues IDR 1.5 trillion bonds for subsidiary's refinancing
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG), a telecommunications infrastructure issuer owned by the Djarum Group, issued Phase I Shelf Registration Bonds VI of 2023 with a total principal amount of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Garda Tujuh Buana to distribute US$1.02 million cash dividends
body: PT Garda Tujuh Buana Tbk (GTBO), a coal mining company that has been operating since 2007, will pay out a cash dividend of US$1.02 million or around IDR 15.4 billion (at an exchange rate of IDR 15,068.6).

title: Sentra Food Indonesia's subsidiary receives IDR 20 billion capital injection
body: PT Kemang Food Industries (KFI), a subsidiary of PT Sentra Food Indonesia Tbk (FOOD), has received a capital injection of IDR 20 billion from PT Super Capital Indonesia (SCI).

title: BRI Finance issues IDR 500 billion bonds
body: BRI Finance issues IDR 500 billion bonds

title: Newcomer on IDX, BEER immediately distributed dividends
body: BEER to pay out dividends IDR 4.92 billion

title: Need working capital, Soechi Lines to conduct rights issue up to 2.35 billion shares
body: PT Soechi Lines Tbk (SOCI), a shipping and shipbuilding company, announced plans to increase its capital by providing pre-emptive rights (HMETD) or rights issue.

title: Waskita Karya channels IDR 178.62 billion additional capital for Trans Jabar Toll Road
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT), a construction company owned by the Indonesian Government, has provided a capital injection of IDR 178.62 billion for one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Trans Jabar Tol (TJT).

title: BCA optimistic credit will grow above 10%
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) is optimistic about achieving growth of 10 -12% in lending by the end of 2023, even though it is during the campaign period ahead of the 14 February 2024 elections.

title: Top 5 market caps on IDX as of June 2023
body: 50 issuers recorded a market capitalization (market cap) of IDR 6.72 quadrillion or 71.12% of the total market cap on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) of IDR 9.45 quadrillion as of June 2023.

title: Adira Finance issues IDR 2 trillion bonds and sukuk for working capital
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multifinance Tbk (ADMF), a finance company owned by PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN), issued Shelf Registration Bonds VI and Shelf Registration Sukuk Mudharabah V with a total principal amount of IDR 2 trillion.

title: JCI has been moving up since opening bell
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) opened higher in the morning session, Wednesday (5/7).

title: The month of July began with a net foreign surplus of 324 million shares
body: Monday, July 3, saw a net foreign volume surplus of 324,470,700 shares on the first trading day of the month. Foreign investors purchased more than 2.46 billion shares, while foreign sales were only around 2.13 billion shares.

title: Samudera Indonesia injects IDR 13.5 billion capital to subsidiary
body: PT Samudera Indonesia Tbk (SMDR) has distributed a capital injection of IDR 13.5 billion for one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Masaji Prayasa Cargo (MPC).

title: AMAG will distribute IDR 100 billion in cash dividends
body: PT Asuransi Multi Artha Graha Tbk (AMAG), an insurance company which is part of the Panin Group, will distribute a cash dividend of IDR 100 billion.

title: DEPO cooperates with SCG to increase the number of imported house brands

title: ERAA posts IDR 299.88 billion in dividend, sloping 16.6%
body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA) dividends have slumped in the 2022 fiscal year even though profits have increased from the 2021 fiscal year.

title: Produces from DSA Wisata Negeri Hila of Astra now enter Europe
body: Desa Wisata Negeri Hila (Negeri Hila Tourism Village), one of developing villages under assistance of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII), has managed to export its agricultural produces to European market.

title: Diversifying business, Energi Mega Persada takes over FSRU company

title: Profit up, CITA’s dividend down by 81.81%
body: PT Cita Mineral Investindo Tbk (CITA) allocates IDR 39.60 billion for dividend, 81.81% lower than the dividend for the fiscal year 2021 of IDR 217.81 billion.

title: Sinergi Inti Andalan Prima eyes IDR 151.5 billion from IPO
body: PT Sinergi Inti Andalan Prima Tbk (INET), a telecommunication holding and fibre optic provider, will begin its initial public offering (IPO) by issuing 1.5 billion shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: UNIQ allocates 50% profit as dividends
body: PT Ulima Nitra Tbk (UNIQ) will distribute cash dividends of IDR 11.45 billion from profits for the 2022 fiscal year

title: JCI weakened at first session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was seen weakening during today’s (4/7) first session on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Nusantara Investama now controls BUVA
body: The shareholders PT Bukit Uluwatu Villa Tbk (BUVA) agree upon the debt restructuring through the debt conversion mechanism, turning it into equity via a private placement.

title: Samuel Sekuritas increased its stake in Nusantara Sawit (NSSS) by 143 million shares
body: The new investor, PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia, was apparently not yet satisfied with its stake in PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS) after purchasing 4.18 billion shares the previous week.

title: Asia Agri acquires 5.14 billion shares of Estika Tata Tiara (BEEF), gaining control of 81% of the company
body: On Friday, June 23, a foreign investor, Asia Agri International Pte Ltd., was seen purchasing a massive amount of PT Estika Tata Tiara Tbk (BEEF) shares.

title: Indomobil Sukses Internasional to distribute cash dividend of IDR 39.94 billion
body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS), an automotive and its component manufacturer under Salim Group, will arrange a dividend distribution of IDR 39.94 billion or IDR 10 per share.

title: Paying off debts to supplier, WICO schedules rights issue of IDR 140 billion

title: Enhancing distribution chain, VICI acquires land for warehouse in Sidoarjo
body: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk (VICI), a cosmetic and bath product manufacturer, has acquired a landbank for IDR 17 billion, which will be utilised for warehouse and operational office purposes.

title: EMTK to divest 80% of shares in Sakalaguna Semesta

Foreign investors only purchased approximately 1.68 billion shares of Indonesian issuers but sold approximately 2.12 billion shares, bringing the foreign net volume once again into negative territory with -433,834,700 shares.

PT Asiantrust Arya Nusantara made the largest share purchase, adding 120 million shares in Express Taxi, PT Express Transindo Utama Tbk (TAXI) to be exact, giving this investor 6.41% control of the company.

title: Import piling up, trade surplus shrank in May 2023
body: The trade surplus plummeted in May 2023 from April 2023 as the import activities rose.

title: Demand for offshore vessels is projected to increase, WINS to add high tier fleet
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) is increasing the capacity of its high tier fleet in line with the projected demand for offshore support vessels for offshore projects.

title: Erick Thohir replaces president commissioner and appointed two independent commissioners for PTBA
body: Erick Thohir, Minister of State-Owned Enterprises (BUMN) appointed new commissioners of PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA), namely, Kurnia Toha and Rahmat Hidayat Pulungan at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS), yesterday (15/6).

title: PTBA to channel entire profit of IDR 12.6 trillion as dividend
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) will distribute dividend for the fiscal year 2022 of IDR 12.6 trillion, shifting IDR 159% from the 2021 dividend of IDR 7.9 trillion.

title: INPS bounced back to top gainers after slowing down
body: PT Indah Perkasa Sentosa Tbk (INPS) surged right to the top gainers list in yesterday’s (15/6) session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Although foreign trade is steady, net foreign trade is still negative by 569 million shares
body: On Wednesday, June 14, foreign trade ended with a net foreign volume of -569,281,500. Approximately 2.28 billion shares were bought in total by foreign investors, compared to 2.85 billion shares sold.

title: JTPE to share IDR 51.39 billion of cash dividend

title: HILL to channel IDR 88.44 billion of dividend
body: PT Hillcon Tbk (HILL) is planning a dividend distribution of IDR 88.44 billion or IDR 30 per share on July 14.

title: Profit down, Grha Kedoya's dividend also down to IDR 75.30 billion
body: The dividend of PT Kedoya Adyaraya Tbk (RSGK) in the fiscal year 2022 is set to IDR 81 pr share, decreasing from the dividend of the fiscal year 2021 of IDR 86 per share.

title: Coca-cola's distributor eyes IDR 40.17 billion in IPO

title: Trimegah Sekuritas acquired 1.5 billion shares of Energi Mega Persada (ENRG), gaining control of 6.26%

title: Foreign debts clock up to USD 403.08 billion
body: Foreign debts until April 2023 are reported at USD 403.08 billion, declining from USD 403.34 billion in March 2023.

title: BNP Paribas AM eyes ESG-friendly issuers
body: PT BNP Paribas Asset Management (AM) is targeting companies or publicly listed issuers that have implemented sustainability policy to be listed in investment portfolio in the Environment Social Governance (ESG) Equity Mutual Fund.

title: Gov’t seeks IDR 7 trillion in next week’s sukuk auction

title: Mayora Indah readies IDR 782.55 billion of dividend

title: ADES to explore new business line: food and cooking oil manufacturing

title: At -840 million shares, foreign net volume was stuck in the red zone

body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) announces the final dividend distribution of IDR 143.97 billion or IDR 25 per share, which will be taken out of its net profit in 2022.

title: Branching to horticulture, DSNG takes over plantation company in Sukabumi
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) announces the acquisition of PT Panyindangan, a company that owns a plantation in Sukabumi.

title: IMA asks members to contribute to economic improvement
body: Indonesia Marketing Association (IMA) has encouraged its members to design programs that will drive the economy based on their respective competencies. As of now, IMA manages 100 chapters and 1,350 members in Indonesia

title: SAGE closed the week as top gainer
body: PT Saptausaha Gemilangindah Tbk (SAGE) arrived at the first position at the top gainers’ list during last week’s (19/5) transaction in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX). The stock price of this issuer was seen increasing 13.38% from the previous closing price.

title: Tolaram Group to invest IDR 17.11 billion more in Bank Amar
body: Tolaram Group Inc will increase investment worth IDR 17.11 billion in PT Bank Amar Indonesia Tbk (AMAR) through a transaction that took place last week.

title: Jakarta’s beer manufacturer to share IDR 260.2 billion of dividend
body: PT Delta Djakarta Tbk (DLTA), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer owned by the Jakarta Regional Government, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 260.2 billion that is taken out of its 2022 net profit.

title: Branching out to restaurants and EO, LUCY gets ready for rights issue
body: PT Lima Dua Lima Tiga Tbk (LUCY) will raise its capital by giving out pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue, by offering 584,775,000 new shares.

title: PLN scored 197% profit growth in Q1 2023
body: PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) or PLN managed to collect net profit of IDR 16.04 trillion in the first quarter of 2023.

title: Multi Medika secures invoice financing of IDR 50 billion
body: PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk (MMIX) secures an invoice financing facility worth IDR 50 billion from PT Bank Aladin Syariah Tbk (BANK).

title: The shares of GOTO made a net foreign surplus of 1.93 billion shares due to their strong sales
body: On Friday, May 19, as many as 3.05 billion shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) were selling well among foreign investors.

title: Energy Collier purchases an additional 239 million shares of Resource Alam (KKGI) to bring its stake to 35%
body: Energy Collier Private Limited, one of the foreign investors holding more than 5% of coal issuer PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI), bought an additional 239.79 million shares on Friday, May 16.

title: Bigger dividend this year, AMRT to channel IDR 999 billion

title: With a net foreign surplus of 122 million, the total volume of foreign transactions exceeded 4 billion

title: Lucas SH CN significantly increased his stake in Arthavest (ARTA) by purchasing 223.33 million shares
body: On May 15, Lucas SH CN, an individual investor who owned 38.69% of PT Arthavest Tbk (ARTA) shares, acquired an additional 223.33 million shares.

body: Tuesday, May 16, still saw a high volume of foreign exchange transactions. In contrast to the 3.62 billion shares that were sold, 3.34 billion shares were bought by foreign investors. The result was that the net foreign volume was negative by up to 278.95 million shares.

title: TKIM’s net profit saw 86.07% surge, dividend stood still
body: Although the 2022 net profit of PT Pabrik Kertas Tjiwi Kimia Tbk (TKIM) soared 86.07% year-on-year (yoy), its dividend remains unchanged, still at IDR 25 per share.

title: BEEF to convert debts to Asian Agri to equity

title: BFI Finance Indonesia to distribute cash dividend of IDR 902.36 billion
body: PT BFI Finance Indonesia Tbk (BFIN) will arrange a dividend distribution of IDR 32 per share or IDR 902.36 billion in total.

title: Budi Delta Swakarya to channel another IDR 222.57 billion to TBLA
body: PT Budi Delta Swakarya (BDS) will raise its investment in PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk (TBLA) worth IDR 222.57 billion in a rights issue.

title: Asuransi Maximus Graha Persada to repurchase 895.83 million shares

title: Petrosea to channel USD 76 million of dividend this year
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO), a coal mining company established circa 1972, announced its plan to distribute cash dividend of USD 76 million.

title: Gozco Capital scored IDR 58.5 billion from divesting BBYB’s shares

title: MPOW pushed OKAS off from top gainers
body: The stock of PT Megapower Makmur Tbk (MPOW) sat at the top of the gainers list during last Wednesday’s (17/5) closing bell in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: PMJS granted IDR 13.6 billion extra capital to Tokoparts

body: PT Mitra Pack Tbk (PTMP) recorded sales of IDR 32.7 billion in the first quarter of 2023, shifting 4.3% year-on-year (yoy) down from the position seen in the same quarter last year.

title: Pyridam Farma's subsidiary secures IDR 102.5 billion credit
body: PT Ethica Industri Farmasi (EIF) obtains a credit facility from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) of IDR 102.5 billion.

title: TUGU to stock split, setting up 1:2 ratio

title: Eastparc Hotel sets aside IDR 8.06 trillion for interim dividend
body: PT Eastparc Hotel Tbk (EAST) confirms the plan of interim dividend distribution of IDR 8.06 billion or IDR 1.95 per share.

title: Sandiaga Uno’s Saratoga to channel IDR 1.01 trillion of dividend

title: Cement industry weakens, Indocement lowers dividend to IDR 549 billion
body: PT Indocement Tunggal Perkasa Tbk (INTP) readies the dividend distribution for the fiscal year 2022, which is set to IDR 548.97 billion, on June 8, 2023.

title: JAYA sets dividend to IDR 2.38 billion, down from 2021’s allocation
body: PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA) will distribute dividend of IDR 2.38 billion from the fiscal year 2022. Said amount of dividend was smaller than the dividend taken out from its 2021 profit of IDR 2.80 billion.

title: DEFI shifts business field to investment
body: After the Financial Services Authority (OJK) suspended the financing business, PT Danasupra Erapacific Tbk (DEFI) changed its focus to investment.

title: PICO to convert debts of IDR 173.37 billion to equity via private placement
body: PT Pelangi Indah Canindo Tbk (PICO) will convert its debts to Eternal Nation Capital Limited (ENCL) to equity through a capital raise without pre-emptive rights or private placement.

title: One year debuting, TRGU to channel IDR 9.97 billion dividend

title: KUAS readies dividend, bigger than last year
body: PT Ace Oldfields Tbk (KUAS) plans to distribute cash dividend of IDR 2.06 billion from its 2022 net profit.

title: OKAS seized SMIL’s top gainer title
body: PT Ancora Indonesia Resources Tbk (OKAS) managed to grab the top gainer title during yesterday’s closing bell (16/5) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Transkon Jaya to spin-off its ISP division
body: PT Transkon Jaya Tbk (TRJA) decides to spin-off its own internet service provider (ISP) business division, PACNet, that have been operating since 2011.

title: Gov't to offer state sukuk of IDR 9 trillion next week
body: The Indonesian government will hold another tender for Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) next Tuesday (23/5) with an indicative target of IDR 9 trillion.

title: Solusi Bangun Indonesia to send out cash dividend of IDR 251.78 billion
body: PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk (SMCB) arranges a dividend distribution of IDR 251.78 billion that will be taken out of its 2022 net profit.

title: ADRO's subsidiary secures IDR 2.5 trillion loan

title: Pendanaan Efek Indonesia now owns 7.92% of Widodo Makmur Unggas (WMUU) after purchasing 1.02 billion shares
body: On May 12, more than 1.02 billion shares of PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk (WMUU) were purchased by PT Pendanaan Efek Indonesia (PEI), a funding firm established by the Indonesian Capital Market Self-Regulatory Organization (SRO).

title: Profiting, yet TBLA to skip another dividend distribution
body: PT Tunas Baru Lampung Tbk (TBLA) decided not to distribute dividend for the fiscal year 2022. The decision was made official during the Annual General Shareholders Meeting held last week (12/5).

title: With a net foreign surplus of 704 million shares, GOTO's foreign transactions are still high
body: On Monday, May 15, foreign investors continued to trade PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares at a high level even after the previous day's fantastic transaction volume. These investors purchased 2.45 billion GOTO shares in total, bringing the net volume to 784.30 million shares.

title: Dunway Holdings acquires 300 million shares of Resource Alam Indonesia (KKGI)
body: On May 11, PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI), an issuer involved in the coal mining industry, added Dunway Holdings Limited as a new investor.

title: Bids in today’s SUN auction reached over IDR 65.45 trillion
body: The total incoming bids recorded in today’s (16/5) Government Securities (SUN) reaches IDR 65.45 trillion, higher than the incoming bids seen in the previous SUN auction.

title: TOWR to distribute final dividend of IDR 901.36 billion

title: Sejahtera Jaya increases stake in KKGI worth IDR 28.77 billion

title: ATIC sells Griya Anabatic to pay off liabilities

body: PT AirAsia Indonesia Tbk (CMPP), the managing company of AirAsia airline in Indonesia, booked a net profit of IDR 20.64 billion in the first quarter of 2023.

title: Modalku to support procurement vendors in government projects
body: Modalku readies its platform to facilitate vendors and companies in the e-catalogue and e-procurement sector, especially those who are engaged in the government's projects, through its latest program called Modal Proyek.

title: SMIL remained as top gainer
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL) managed to secure its top gainer position during yesterday’s (15/5) closing bell in Indonesia Stock Exchange. The stock price was seen increasing 3.81% on the second day since its debut in IDX last week (12/5).

body: PT Total Bangun Persada Tbk (TOTL) announces the plan of cash dividend distribution of IDR 341 billion that will be taken out of the net profit gained in the fiscal year 2022.

title: Pindo Deli Pulp and Paper Mills to issue MTN of USD 1.65 million
body: PT Pindo Deli Pulp and Paper Mills, the paper manufacturer under Sinarmas Group, issues Medium Term Notes (MTN) with a total principal worth USD 1.65 million.

title: April's trade surplus hit USD 3.94 billion, surpassing March 2023

title: PALM to allocate IDR 80.65 billion for buyback
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) is allocating IDR 80.65 billion to repurchase a maximum of 103.95 million shares, which will take place soon after obtaining approval from its shareholders.

title: Foreign investors bought nearly 5 billion shares, netting more than 1 billion

title: Many investors, including three controlling shareholders, are actively buying additional shares
body: On Wednesday, May 10, investors with more than 5% ownership traded shares in a series of additional investments. Even more, three of the investors hold controlling shares.

title: The volume of foreign trade increased; net foreign volume reached 205 million shares
body: On May 11, the number of shares sold and purchased in foreign trade increased significantly. More than 3.93 billion shares were purchased by foreign investors, who also sold 3.72 billion shares, increasing the net foreign volume to 205,456,000 shares.

title: Scoring fantastic growth, ISAT readies dividend of IDR 2 trillion

title: Q1 ended, Surya Semesta’s revenue climbed 25.1%

title: MEDCO to submit assets as guarantee for USD 420 million loan

title: Saratoga eyes golden opportunities in healthcare and renewable energy sector
body: In its pursue of new business pillars, PT Saratoga Investama Tbk (SRTG) seeks to seize opportunities in the healthcare and renewable energy sectors.

title: FAP Agri to ready IDR 900 billion for buyback
body: PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA) will initiate a shares buyback, setting the budget to IDR 900 billion.

body: PT Saratoga Investama Tbk (SRTG), the investment company of Edwin Suryadjaja and Sandiaga Uno, plans a dividend distribution and reveals the details of its upcoming buyback.

title: Zareen Kapital to invest more in SMKM
body: PT Zareen Kapital Investama (ZKI) has raised its portion by 1.43% worth IDR 17.96 billion in PT Sumber Mas Konstruksi Tbk (SMKM).

title: INKP to spend USD 3.63 billion on new Karawang factory
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP) plans to establish a new paper manufacturing plant worth a total investment of USD 3.63 billion.

title: TMAS to stock split with ratio 1:10

title: MAP Boga Adiperkasa to hold private placement, offering 217.09 million shares

body: The Indonesian government will once again hold a tender for Government Securities (SUN) next Tuesday (16/5), aiming to gain IDR 17 trillion.

title: SMI issues IDR 4 trillion bonds
body: PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (Persero) is issuing Shelf-Registration Bonds III Phase III Year 2023 worth IDR 4 trillion today (12/5).

title: Bank Oke to postpone dividends despite improving performance
body: PT Bank Oke Indonesia Tbk (DNAR) has not distributed cash dividends to shareholders for at least the last three years.

body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) will acquire 99.93% of shares of PT Kemilau Mulia Sakti (KMS) for USD 90.5 million.

title: Expanding business, Millenium Pharmacon introduces new subsidiary
body: PT Millennium Pharmacon International Tbk (SDPC) has formed a new subsidiary in order to expand its business.

title: Allocating IDR 23.16 billion, WEGE’s dividend shrank from last year
body: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk (WEGE) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 23.16 billion from its net profit gained in 2022.

title: KJEN replaced JATI as top gainer, JATI out to the top 10
body: PT Krida Jaringan Nusantara Tbk (KJEN) arrives at the top of the gainers’ list during yesterday’s (11/5) closing bell in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Hasnur Internasional Shipping to distribute cash dividend of IDR 34.8 billion
body: PT Hasnur Internasional Shipping Tbk (HAIS) announces its plan to distribute cash dividend worth IDR 34.8 billion that is sourced out from its 2022 net profit.

title: Temas to form subsidiary in depot management sector
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a shipping and container transportation service provider, has introduced a new subsidiary called PT Temas Depot Jatim (TDJ).

title: PGAS secures USD 800 million loan
body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara (Persero) Tbk (PGAS) has obtained a loan facility worth a total of USD 800 million from national banks.

title: Skipped a year, JSMR to distribute dividend of IDR 549.37 billion this time
body: PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk (JSMR) will channel out cash dividend of IDR 549.37 billion from the 2022 net profit.

title: Gozco Capital sells 100 million shares of Bank Neo (BBYB), while Akulaku adds 7.87 million more
body: On Tuesday, May 9, two investors with more than 5% ownership in PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) made contrasting choices regarding their investment in this banking issuer.

title: Foreign purchases increased significantly, and net foreign volume soared to 1.46 billion shares
body: On Wednesday, May 10, foreign investors flooded the Indonesian Stock Exchange, purchasing over 4.28 billion shares. Because the volume of shares sold by foreigners alone was only around 2.81 billion shares, the net foreign volume soared to 1,469,724,200 shares this time.

title: Prima Globalindo purchases 33.9 million shares of Armada Berjaya Trans (JAYA) to increase its stake to 40%
body: On Monday, May 8, the investor who owned 36.49% of JAYA's shares, PT Prima Globalindo Logistik Tbk, purchased an additional 33.9 million shares from PT Armada Berjaya Trans Tbk (JAYA).

title: Foreign investors purchased a large number of shares, resulting in a net foreign surplus of nearly 300 million shares
body: On Tuesday, May 9, the net foreign volume was nearly 300 million shares, or 299,768,800 shares to be exact. This figure was driven by foreign investors purchasing shares totaling 3.79 billion shares, while shares sold totaled only 3.49 billion shares.

title: WTON’s dividend doubled in 2022
body: PT Wijaya Karya Beton Tbk (WTON) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 32.68 billion taken out of the 2022 net profit.

title: DMIG abstains from dividend distribution three years in a row
body: PT Damai Indah Golf Tbk (DMIG) will not distribute any dividend this year despite its success in scoring IDR 53.02 billion of profit in the fiscal year 2022.

title: Mandom Indonesia to ready IDR 18.09 billion of dividend
body: PT Mandom Indonesia Tbk (TCID), a cosmetic and cleaning agent manufacturer and distributor, announces the divided distribution plan of IDR 18.09 billion that will be taken out of the net profit gained in 2022.

title: Transcoal Pacific’s subsidiary to secure credit of IDR 128.5 billion
body: PT Energy Transporter Indonesia (ETI), a subsidiary of PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI), has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 128.5 billion.

title: Preparing strategies for 2023, DNAR's free float plan still unknown
body: PT Bank Oke Indonesia Tbk (DNAR), which is the result of a merger between PT Bank Dinar Tbk and PT Bank Oke Indonesia, presents strategies to improve its performance in 2023.

title: Suwarna Arta increases stake in MMLP for IDR 127.99 billion
body: PT Suwarna Arta Mandiri (SAM) has increased its share in total of IDR 127.99 billion in PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk (MMLP)

title: Steadily rising, JATI secures the top gainer title
body: PT Informasi Teknologi Indonesia Tbk (JATI) shifted to the top position at the gainers’ list in yesterday’s (10/5) trading session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) after securing a 26.37% increase from its initial runner-up position on May 9.

title: Energy Collier increased its stake in Resource Alam (KKGI) by 223 million shares, giving it a 30% stake
body: On Friday, May 5, a Singapore-based foreign investor, Energy Collier Private Limited, increased its stake in coal mining company PT Resource Alam Indonesia Tbk (KKGI) by 223.28 million shares.

title: MD Pictures to increase ownership over Barakuda Film Galeri
body: PT MD Pictures Tbk (FILM) has reportedly increased its portion in PT Barakuda Film Galeri Indonesia by acquiring 39.99% of its shares.

title: Eratex Djaja secures USD 3.5 million credit from HSBC Indonesia
body: PT Eratex Djaja Tbk (ERTX), a textile and garment manufacturer, has recently acquired a new banking facility from PT Bank HSBC Indonesia with a collective credit limit of USD 3.5 million.

title: Provident Investasi Bersama to offer 2.77 million treasury shares
body: PT Provident Investasi Bersama Tbk (PALM) announces its plan to sell off 2,779,309 shares of its treasury stock.

title: SMBR to distribute IDR 18.9 billion of dividend
body: PT Semen Baturaja Tbk (SMBR) will channel out cash dividend of IDR 18.96 billion from its net profit gained in 2022.

title: MNC Energy to issue bonds of IDR 1.5 trillion
body: PT MNC Energy Invesments Tbk (IATA) will issue bonds worth a maximum of IDR 1.5 trillion.

title: Highest record in 5 years, ABMM is generous with its dividend
body: After its 82.36% yoy increase in its 2022 net profit, PT ABM Investama Tbk (ABMM) gets ready to distribute dividend of USD 75 million, which will be taken out of its net profit in 2022 of USD 269.9 million.

title: PTBA to set COD of PLTU Sumsel-8 to September 2023
body: PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) has scheduled the commercial operation date (COD) of the Steam Power Plant (PLTU) of Mulut Tambang Sumsel-8 in September 2023.

title: Putra Mandiri Jembar to raise stakes in Dipo Pahala Otomotif
body: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar Tbk (PMJS) has increased its investment in one of its subsidiaries, PT Dipo Pahala Otomotif (DPO) by channelling another IDR 4 billion.

title: Sawit Sumbermas Sarana to channel IDR 710.99 billion of final dividend
body: PT Sawit Sumbermas Sarana Tbk (SSMS) reveals its intention to distribute final dividend of IDR 710.99 billion that is taken out of the 2022 net profit.

title: Prinsep Management divested its portion in FAPA for IDR 153.13 billion
body: Prinsep Management Limited (PML), the major shareholder of PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA), has divested its portion for IDR 153.13 billion for investment purposes.

title: CPIN to acquire piece of land in Sukabumi for IDR 45.60 billion
body: PT Charoen Pokhpand Indonesia Tbk (CPIN) will build a chicken meat processing plant over a piece of land of 82,922 m2 in Bojongkembar Village, Cikembar, West Java.

title: Fantastic growth in 2022, ESTA stumbled in Q1 2023
body: Following the ease of the pandemic crisis, PT Esta Multi Usaha Tbk (ESTA), a hotel management, as well as vehicle and property rental service provider, recorded revenue of IDR 43.5 billion at the end of the fiscal year 2022.

title: Net foreign volume was pulled further into the red zone when it dropped below -251 million shares
body: On Monday, May 8, the volume of shares traded by foreign investors nearly doubled from the usual. Foreign investors purchased a total of 4.37 billion shares, while the total number of shares sold exceeded 4.62 billion.

title: Capital Life invests in Bintang Oto Global (BOGA) and gains a 5% stake immediately
body: On Thursday, May 4, insurance company PT Capital Life Indonesia became a new investor in automotive issuer PT Bintang Oto Global Tbk (BOGA), with a stake of more than 5%.

title: Back in the red, net foreign minus was 51 million shares
body: On Friday, May 5, net foreign volume returned to the red zone. Foreign investors purchased a total of 3.10 billion shares, while they sold 3.15 billion.

title: SMIL to allocate IDR 75 billion for 250 new forklifts
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL), a forklift rental service provider, has set the budget for the purchase of 250 new units of forklift and material handling equipment to IDR 75 billion.

title: Tumiyana increased his stake in Widodo Makmur Perkasa (WMPP) by purchasing 3 billion shares
body: Tumiyana, an individual investor and also the CEO of PT Widodo Makmur Perkasa Tbk (WMPP), purchased 3 billion shares of WMPP on Wednesday, May 3.

title: Gov’t recorded IDR 40.73 trillion of incoming bids in last sukuk auction
body: The total value of incoming bids submitted during the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk yesterday (9/5) clocked up to IDR 40.73 trillion.

title: Financial expenses swelled, ZYRX saw 49% profit decline

title: IRSX made a comeback as top gainer

Deutsche Bank AG Singapore is one of them, having recently acquired 9.35% ownership of AWAN after purchasing 321,312,000 shares of the mobile content service provider issuer on Tuesday, April 18.
