body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was seen gaining strength during the opening of the first trading day after Eid holiday on April 26, 2023.

title: Wilmar weakened in Q1 2023 after 99.68% surge last year
body: The profit of PT Wilmar Cahaya Indonesia Tbk (CEKA) plummeted 27.54% year-on-year (yoy) in Q1 2023, contrasting to 99.68% yoy increase reported in the same period last year.

title: Continuous loss, MPPA to abstain from dividend distribution 4 years in a row
body: Due to persistent losses within the last 4 years, PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk (MPPA) decided not to distribute cash dividend to the shareholders for the fiscal year 2022.

title: Foreign trade volume fell, but net foreign trade remained positive
body: On Monday, April 17, the volume of shares traded by foreign investors was lower than usual, with 1.65 billion shares purchased and 1.61 billion shares sold.

title: A new investor, United Overseas Bank Nominees, took over 50% of Arthavest (ARTA)
body: On Thursday, April 13, the market emphasised the purchase of 223,337,000 shares of PT Arthavest Tbk (ARTA) by United Overseas Bank Nominees (Private) Limited. By taking ownership from the controlling shareholder, Lucas SH CN, this Singaporean foreign investor became the new owner of 50% of the investment company's shares.

title: Q1 ended, RS Hermina saw 5.85% yoy decline
body: Although its revenue went 10.57% year-on-year (yoy) higher, PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL) saw a decline in its net profit by 5.85% yoy in Q1 2023.

title: WIKA made IDR 1.5 billion loan arrangement to Wika Realty
body: JAKARTA. PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA) has provided arrangement on a credit facility of IDR 1.5 trillion provided to its subsidiary, PT Wijaya Karya Realty (Wika Realty).

title: Tigaraksa Satria to distribute cash dividends IDR 298.5 billion
body: PT Tigaraksa Satria Tbk (TGKA) will distribute cash dividends of IDR 298.51 billion from net profit for the 2022 fiscal year.

title: TRIN subsidiary receives additional loans to work on Sequoia Hills project
body: PT Triniti Garam Properti (TGP), a subsidiary of PT Perintis Triniti Properti Tbk (TRIN), has obtained an additional credit limit of IDR 80 billion to fund one of its projects.

title: Bio Farma ready to provide IDR 157 billion loan for Indofarma's restructuring
body: PT Bio Farma (Persero), the parent of a pharmaceutical holding company owned by the Government of Indonesia, will distribute a loan facility worth IDR 157 billion to support the restructuring plan of PT Indofarma Tbk (INAF).

title: Cashlez pockets IDR 20 billion loan facility from shareholders
body: PT Cashlez Worldwide Indonesia Tbk (CASH) has obtained a loan facility from shareholders worth IDR 20 billion.

title: Siloam takes over Lippo Karawaci's land worth IDR 90 billion for a new hospital
body: PT Siloam International Hospitals Tbk (SILO) through its subsidiary, namely PT Gempita Nusa Sejahtera (GNS), took over land owned by a subsidiary of PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (LPKR), namely PT Irama Karya Megah (IKM).

title: Modalku Group channels US$ 3 billion in financing in 5 countries
body: Modalku Group, a fintech platform, has channeled US$ 3 billion in financing to 100 thousand Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) debtors in five countries, including Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand and Vietnam.

title: Wahana Interfood Nusantara issues IDR 150 billion MTN
body: PT Wahana Interfood Nusantara Tbk (COCO) issued bonds in the form of Medium Term Notes (MTN) with a principal amount of IDR 150 billion.

title: Oversubscribed 19.9 times, MBMA scored IDR 9.2 trillion on its debut
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA), a giant nickel company under PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk (MDKA), is officially listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) after holding an Initial Public Offering (IPO) at a price of IDR 795 per share from 12 to 14 April.

title: Citi Indonesia scored IDR 1.4 trillion of net profit in 2022
body: Citibank N.A. Indonesia (Citi Indonesia) recorded a net profit of IDR 1.4 trillion in 2022, 28% year-on-year (yoy) higher than the number seen in 2021.

title: PGEO to issue global bonds worth USD 800 million
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy Tbk (PGEO), a recently listed energy company under Pertamina Power Indonesia, will issue global bonds with an estimated total value ranging between USD 600 million and USD 800 million.

title: Bank Nobu to raise authorised capital to IDR 2 trillion via rights issue
body: The shareholders of PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk (NOBU) agreed to raise the authorised capital to IDR 2 trillion from IDR 795 billion.

title: Metrodata saw 11% decrease in profit in Q1
body: The profit of PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk (MTDL) shrank 11% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 146.4 billion in Q1 2023.

title: Uni-Charm to allocate repurchased shares to MESOP
body: PT Uni-Charm Indonesia Tbk (UCID) will reassign all shares repurchased during its buyback for its management and employee stock option programme (MESOP).

title: DSNG secured IDR 215 billion of profit in Q1
body: PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) posted IDR 215 billion of net profit in Q1 2023, climbing 3% year-on-year (yoy). In the meantime, the company recorded 26% revenue increase.

title: Extending buyback, Jaya Real Property puts in another IDR 65 billion
body: PT Jaya Real Property Tbk (JRPT) has allocated IDR 65 billion to repurchase its shares (buyback) for the next three months, starting today (18/4).

title: HELI gained 30.85% increment, arriving at top gainers
body: PT Jaya Trishindo Tbk (HELI) reached the top og the gainers list after booking 30.85% increase in its stock price during yesterday’s (17/4) transaction. With HELI arriving at the top gainers, the list now has gained another non-blue-chip issuer.

title: Kaltara Power to secure extra IDR 235.77 billion of capital
body: PT Kaltara Power Indonesia (KPI) has received additional capital worth IDR 235.77 billion injected by PT Cita Mineralindo Tbk (CITA) after issuing 16,260 shares.

title: CSAP to seek IDR 857.37 billion in rights issue
body: PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana Tbk (CSAP) aims to score IDR 857.37 billion in a rights issue scheduled from June 14-20. In this corporate action, the company plans to issue 1.22 billion shares of IDR 700 each.

title: iForte acquires 60% of internet service provider Varnion
body: PT iForte Solusi Infotek (iForte), a subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR), has signed a conditional sale and purchase agreement (CSPA) for 60% of PT Varnion Technology Semesta's shares.

title: Building waterpark, Nusantara Almazia to add new business line
body: PT Nusantara Almazia Tbk (NZIA), a property developer that handles two housing projects in Tangerang and Karawang, plans to extend its business scope by building a pool and waterpark.

title: Slowing down, but Indonesia still at surplus of USD 2.91 billion
body: The trade of balance reached surplus of USD 2.91 billion in March 2023. However, it was still lower than March 2022’s surplus of USD 4.54 billion. This decline is seen for the first time since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic in 2020.

title: UNTR to increase investment in mining holding
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) has raised its investment in PT Danusa Tambang Nusantara (Danusa), a mining holding company since 2015.

title: Garudafood to send out IDR 219.16 billion of dividend
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) will channel out cash dividend of IDR 219.16 billion from its net profit in 2022, scheduled on May 16, 2023.

title: BASF to invest USD 2.6 billion in EV battery ecosystem
body: Badische Anilin und Sodafabrik/Baden Aniline and Soda Factory (BSAF) is committed to make investments in electric vehicle (EV) battery ecosystem in Indonesia worth USD 2.6 billion.

title: Two GMFI partners withdrew PKPU lawsuit
body: Two partners of PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) are known to have withdrawn their lawsuit for Suspension of Debt Payment Obligations (PKPU/bankruptcy) at the Central Jakarta Commercial Court, last week (13).

title: PKPK seeks capital expenditure via rights issue
body: PT Perdana Karya Persada Tbk (PKPK) will issue a maximum of 600 million shares with a nominal value of IDR 200 per share via a rights issue.

title: Indonesia-Germany to join hands for investment and digitalisation
body: The Indonesian and German governments have reportedly signed two agreements, including the Joint Declaration of Intent on Joint Economic and Investment Committee and the Joint Declaration of Intent in The Feed of Digitalization.

title: Foreign purchases totaled 3.38 billion shares, resulting in 552 million in net foreign volume
body: After being in the negative 551 million the day before, net foreign volume on Friday, April 14, was actually in the positive 552,990,100 shares. The number of shares purchased by foreign investors exceeded 3.38 billion, while the number of shares sold was only 2.83 billion.

title: Foreign investors sold 2.23 billion GOTO, resulting in a -551 million share net foreign volume
body: Foreign investors sold over 2.23 billion shares of GOTO shares on Thursday, April 13. PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia (GOTO)'s net volume then fell to -814.09 million pieces due to lower purchase volume.

title: BTPN to channel IDR 619.14 billion of dividend
body: PT Bank BTPN Tbk (BTPN) announces its plan to distribute cash dividend of IDR 619.14 billion that will be sourced out of its net profit of 2022.

title: Moody’s raises Pelindo’s and its bonds’ ratings
body: Moody's Investors Service (Moody's) has increased the rating of PT Pelabuhan Indonesia (Persero) or Pelindo along with its obligations, following the revenue growth and strategic initiatives of the company.

title: BUMA Australia secured mining service contract of AUD 60 million
body: BUMA Australia Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), has obtained a new mining service contract worth AUD 60 million or approximately IDR 598.7 billion from BHP and Mitsubishi Alliance (BMA).

title: Temas to distribute IDR 456.41 billion of dividen
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a shipping company, will channel out IDR 456.41 billion of cash dividend on May 12, 2023, which will be taken out of the net profit in 2022.

title: Astea’s car sales grew 5.6% in Q1 2023
body: The car sales of PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) in the first quarter (Q1) of 2023 climbed approximately 6% year-on-year (yoy), reaching 150,006 units.

title: Double-digit growth, Mitratel hit over IDR 7 trillion revenue
body: PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL), widely known as Mitratel, recorded revenue surge of up to 12.5% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 6.87 trillion to IDR 7.73 trillion in 2022.

title: Bank Jatim upping dividend to IDR 797.12 billion
body: PT BPD Jatim Tbk (BJTM) will channel cash dividend of IDR 797.12 billion, which will be taken out of its net profit of the fiscal year 2022, on May 12, 2023.

title: Menthobi Karyatama distributes IDR 12 billion in dividends
body: Shareholders of PT Menthobi Karyatama Raya Tbk (MKTR) approved the distribution of a cash dividend of IDR 12 billion at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS), yesterday (12/4).

title: Success in increasing profits up to 5.9%, GOOD to distribute dividends on May 16
body: Shareholders of PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) approved the dividend distribution agenda for the 2022 financial year of IDR 6 per share or a total of around IDR 219 billion.

title: External debt recorded at US$ 400.1 billion, down from January 2023
body: Public and private sector external debt (ULN) each decreased in February 2023, which had implications for a 3.7% decrease in Indonesia's external debt to US$ 400.1 billion from January 2023 of US$ 404.6 billion.

title: Garudafood posts 19.4% increase in net sales, ready to launch new products this year
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD), a well-known snack and beverage producer in Indonesia, managed to record a double-digit revenue increase of 19.4% year-on-year (yoy)

title: Entering expansion phase, manufacturing industry expected to increase in second quarter
body: The Processing Industry's Business Field Performance (LU) is estimated to still grow with an index of 54.79% in the second quarter of 2023.

title: Film production house Multivision Plus releases 929.2 million shares through IPO
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM), the company that owns the Multivision Plus film production house, conducted an Initial Public Offering (IPO) by releasing 929.2 million shares

title: Zeze Ajuwel Tambang became a new investor, purchasing 215 million Rukun Raharja (RAJA) shares
body: PT Zeze Ajuwel Tambang was brought in by PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA) as a new investor in this natural gas issuer on Wednesday, April 12.

title: Two foreign investors have decided to sell their GOTO shares once more
body: On Tuesday, April 11, two foreign investors with more than 5% ownership sold their GOTO shares.

title: PTPP to divest IDR 1.4 trillion of assets this year
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), a state-owned building construction company, plans to divest some of its assets with a total value of IDR 1.4 trillion this year.

title: At 380 million, net foreign exchange has turned positive
body: Following several days in the red, net foreign trade volume turned positive on Wednesday, April 12. This time, the net volume was positive at 380,912,700 shares, resulting from the difference between the total shares purchased by foreign investors (2.13 billion shares) and the total shares sold (1.75 billion shares).

title: Suge Talesta Guna recently acquired control over 5.66% of Bhakti Multi Artha (BHAT)
body: On Monday, April 10, PT Suge Talesta Guna took over ownership of 5.66% of PT Bhakti Multi Artha Tbk (BHAT).

title: Distributing dividend, TRIS rose to top gainers
body: PT Trisula International Tbk (TRIS) was crowned as the top gainers in yesterday’s (13/4) transaction. This textile and garment manufacturer recorded 15.79% increment in its stock price from IDR 228 to IDR 264 per share.

title: Net foreign is still in the negative 837 million range, and GOTO is even further in the red
body: On Tuesday, April 11, the net volume of foreign exchange was still negative, at roughly 837.61 million shares. This time, foreign investors bought 2.33 billion shares, while more than 3.17 billion shares were sold.

title: Indonesia Investment Authority now owns 7.46 billion BMRI shares following the Bank Mandiri stock split
body: Following a stock split with a 1:2 ratio, there were 93.33 billion PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) shares total available on the market.

title: While GOTO's net volume was at -1.17 billion, the foreign net was at -1.14 billion
body: On Monday, April 10, net foreign trade volume sank to minus 1.14 billion shares. Only about 1.48 billion of the total shares were purchased by foreign investors, while 2.62 billion total shares were sold.

title: ADHI records three years without dividend
body: Although its performance has improved from last year, PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) still allocates the entire net profit in 2022 as retained earnings.

title: MPX Logistics International to offer 400 million shares in IPO
body: PT MPX Logistics International Tbk (MPXL), a transportation and logistics company, will issue 400 million shares in its initial public offering (IPO) on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: TPIA and INA sign up for chlor-alkali production plant
body: PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA) has officially signed the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Indonesia Investment Authority (INA) regarding the joint operation for the development of the chlor-alkali production facility.

title: Bank Bukopin lost IDR 5.03 trillion in 2022
body: The revenue of PT Bank Bukopin Tbk (BBKP) in 2022 was 26.53% year-on-year (yoy) higher. However, its loss also doubled instead, from minus IDR 2,30 trillion in 2021 to IDR 5.03 trillion at the end of 2022.

title: Bintang Samudera to arrange rights issue of 400 million shares
body: PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk (BSML) will issue 400 million shares in a rights issue. The proceeds of this corporate action will then be utilised to strengthen capital structure and refinance its obligation.

title: Refinancing, PP Properti to issue IDR 800 billion bonds
body: PT PP Properti Tbk (PPRO), a property and real estate developer owned by PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP), will issue Bonds II of PPRO Year 2023 with a principal of IDR 800 billion.

title: Buana Finance secured IDR 125 billion credit facility from Bank DKI
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a leasing and consumer financing company, has recently obtained a credit facility worth IDR 125 billion from PT Bank DKI.

title: Eyeing higher revenue, IMC Pelita Logistik to form new subsidiary
body: PT IMC Pelita Logistik Tbk (PSSI), formerly known as Pelita Samudera Shipping, has recently formed a new subsidiary called PT Pelita Samudera Sreeya (PSS).

title: AVIA to allocate 92.9% of net profit as dividend
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer, decides to allocate 92.9% of the 2022 net profit as dividend, amounting to IDR 1.3 trillion. The decision was made during the Annual General Shareholders Meeting held earlier today (13/4).

title: Zeze Ajuwel secures 5% of RAJA
body: PT Zeze Ajuwel Tambang (ZAT) steps in as one of the shareholders with a portion above 5% di PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA) , following yesterday’s (12/4) transaction.

title: GTV hit IDR 24.9 trillion mark, RUN System recorded triple-digit growth
body: PT Global Sukses Solusi Tbk (RUNS), more popularly known as RUN System, booked impressive achievement in 2022, recording 534% year-on-year (yoy) surge in its revenue.

title: Akulaku to increase its investment in Bank Neo Commerce
body: PT Akulaku Silvvr Indonesia, the owner of Akulaku fintech platform, has increased its investment by approximately IDR 6.76 billion in PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) within separate transactions in the past two weeks.

title: Astra Otoparts to send out final dividend of IDR 424.14 billion
body: PT Astra Otoparts Tbk (AUTO), an automotive component manufacturer under Astra Group, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 530 billion that is taken out of the net profit in 2022.

title: PGEO to sell carbon credit worth USD 1.93 million
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Tbk (PGEO) will reassign the carbon credit from PLTP Lahendong Unit 5 and 6 to PT Pertamina Power Indonesia (PPI) worth USD 1.93 million. PPI is the owner of 69.01% of PGEO’s issued and paid-up capital.

title: Gov’t to hold another sukuk auction, eyeing IDR 9 trillion
body: The Indonesian government will hold another auction of Government Sharia Securities (lit. Surat Berharga Syariah Negara/SBSN) or State Sukuk on May 9, 2023. The indicative target is set to IDR 9 trillion.

title: Despite decline in post-pandemic performance, PRDA continues to distribute dividends
body: PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA) has consistently distributed dividends in the 2022 fiscal year of IDR 237.9 per share, despite recording a decline in revenue and profit due to normalization after the COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Low Tuck Kwong ranks first on RI's top billionaires
body: Low Tuck Kwong occupies the top position of Indonesia's richest man of forbes.com’s version in real time as of April 2023.

title: Moving up since beginning of this week, PADA occupies top gainers
body: PT Personal Alih Daya Tbk (PADA) occupies the top of the Top Gainers after its share price has strengthened since the beginning of the week (10/4).

title: INDY's profit soared 706.7%
body: The profit of PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) skyrocketed 706,7% to USD 510.77 million in 2022 from USD 63.31 million in 2021.

title: TRIS to distribute IDR 20.23 billion of dividend
body: PT Trisula International Tbk (TRIS) will disburse dividend worth a total of IDR 20.23 billion on May 12, 2023.

title: Ifishdeco to distribute cash dividends IDR 59.76 billion
body: PT Ifishdeco Tbk (IFSH), a nickel mining company that owns a concession area in South Konawe, will distribute cash dividends of IDR 59.76 billion from net profit for the 2022 fiscal year.

title: Car sales target this year revised to 1.05 million units
body: The Association of Indonesian Automotive Industries (Gaikindo) revised its car sales target this year to 1.05 million units, from the previous target of 975 thousand units.

title: AP I to manage Kediri Airport's operation
body: PT Aviasi Pariwisata Indonesia (Persero), theparent company of PT Angkasa Pura (AP) I, will officially take over the operation of Kediri Airport in East Java.

title: Informasi Teknologi Indonesia to offer 652.5 million shares in IPO
body: PT Informasi Teknologi Indonesia Tbk (JATI) is gearing up towards its initial public offering (IPO) of 652.5 million units of shares.

title: Tolaram Group to raise investment in Bank Amar
body: Tolaram Group Inc has reportedly increased its investment in PT Bank Amar Indonesia Tbk (AMAR) by IDR 9.96 billion, bringing its portion up from 70.44% to 70.63% of the total shares of Bank Amar.

title: Performance slowing down, KEJU to share IDR 112.5 billion of dividend
body: After the stagnation in sales and decrease in profit, PT Boga Mulia Raya Tbk (KEJU), the manufacturer of Prochiz products, will still allocate 95.9% of its net profit in 2022 as cash dividend.

title: Indopoly’s profit down by 60.88%
body: The profit of PT Indopoly Swakarsa Industry Tbk (IPOL) reportedly plummeted 60.88% year-on-year (yoy) to USD 3.74 million in 2022 from USD 9.9 million in 2021.

title: Two shareholders of Sumber Mas divested their entire portions
body: Two shareholders of PT Sumber Mas Konstruksi Tbk (SMKM) divested their entire shares, accumulated to a total of 150 million units, in a transaction that took place last week (7/4).

title: Catur Sentosa Adiprana to distribute IDR 49.04 billon of cash dividend
body: PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana Tbk (CSAP), a retail specialised in building material products, announces its plan to channel out cash dividend of IDR 49.04 billion that will be taken out of the net profit in 2022.

title: INKP to increase subsidiary’s capital by IDR 9.8 billion
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a pulp and paper manufacturer, has increased its investment to one of its subsidiaries, PT Graha Kemasindo Indah (GKI).

title: MBMA sets IPO price at upper limit of IDR 795 per share
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA) set its initial public offering (IPO) price at IDR 795 per share, right above the price range announced previously.

title: UNTR final dividend IDR 6,185/share, AGMS appoints new director
body: The annual general meeting of shareholders (AGMS) of PT United Tractors Tbk. (UNTR) approved the distribution of a final dividend of IDR 6,185 per share or IDR 25.5 trillion.

title: KEJU profit slumps to IDR 117.37 billion due to high raw material price
body: PT Boga Mulia Raya Tbk (KEJU) is experiencing stagnation in its net sales in 2022, so it is only able to reach IDR 1.04 trillion

title: Inflation to loosen post-Eid
body: The inflation pressure is expected to loosen starting from this year’s Eid until August 2023. It is also in line with the estimated decrease in retail sales and price.

title: Freshly debuting, PIPA sat at the top gainers
body: PT Multi Makmur Lemindo Tbk (PIPA) arrived at the top of the gainers list in yesterday’s (11/4) transaction, replacing PT Prima Alloy Steel Universal Tbk (PRAS) that seized the first position last Monday. In its debut day, PIPA only came as strong as the runner-up.

title: Two investors in Impack Pratama (IMPC) increased their holdings
body: On Wednesday, April 5, two existing investors of PT Impack Pratama Industri Tbk (IMPC) incrementally increased their ownership stakes.

title: Due to the sale of GOTO, the net foreign deficit is -1.41 billion shares
body: On Thursday, April 6, there was a deficit of 1,417,706,200 shares for the foreign net volume. This number was calculated from the difference between the total number of shares bought by foreigners, 2.13 billion, and the total number of shares sold by foreigners, 3.55 billion.

title: ADHI scored IDR 8.9 trillion of new contracts in Q1 2023
body: Until Q1 2023, PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) managed to obtain new contracts worth IDR 8.9 trillion in total.

title: Bank CIMB Niaga to share IDR 2.87 trillion of dividend
body: PT Bank CIMB Niaga Tbk (BNGA) will channel out final dividend for the fiscal year 2022 worth IDR 2.87 trillion on May 10, 2023.

title: Dian Swastatika Sentosa injects US$260 thousand in capital for subsidiary
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA), a coal mining company owned by the Sinarmas Group, has distributed capital injections for its subsidiary, Shining Energy Pte. Ltd.

title: Dharma Polimetal to disburse IDR 98.54 billion of cash dividend
body: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk (DRMA), an automotive component manufacturer, will distribute cash dividend of IDR 98.54 billion that will be taken out of its net profit in 2022.

title: Low Tuck Kwong’s portion in BYAN now worth IDR 425.19 trillion
body: Low Tuck Kwong invested another IDR 11.32 billion in PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), bringing his portion up to IDR 425.19 trillion.

title: Astra to join hands with Equinix to form JV
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) has officially introduced a joint venture (JV) called Equinix (NASDAQ: EQIX) to reinforce the digital infrastructure in Indonesia.

title: Economic condition is expected to rise
body: The expectation of consumers regarding the national economic condition within the next 6 months, starting from March 2023, rises.

title: CLAY seeks IDR 200 billion in a rights issue
body: PT Citra Putra Realty Tbk (CLAY) aims to secure IDR 200 billion of fresh funds by issuing 1 billion shares of IDR 100 each. This plan had been approved by the shareholders during the Extraordinary General Shareholders Meeting last week (6/4).

title: Alam Sutera booked nearly sevenfold increase in profit to IDR 1.10 trillion
body: The profit of PT Alam Sutera Realty Tbk (ASRI) was recorded at IDR 1.10 trillion, skyrocketing 673.23% year-on-year (yoy), nearly seven times higher than the profit seen in 2021 of IDR 158.47 billion.

title: Trisula Textile and Trisula International to share IDR 23.8 billion of dividend
body: Two garment and textile companies under Trisula Group, PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk (BELL) and PT Trisula International Tbk (TRIS), will distribute dividend together with the total amount of IDR 23.8 billion.

title: Advertising company Era Media Sejahtera offers 1.55 billion shares through IPO
body: PT Era Media Sejahtera Tbk (DOOH), an advertising and agency company, will hold an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) by releasing 1.54 billion shares.

title: Solid performance last year, NISP readies dividend distribution
body: PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) plans to distribute 40% of its consolidated net profit in 2022 as cash dividend after successfully obtaining double-digit growth in credit distribution and income, while maintaining its non-performing loan (NPL) ratio at 2.4%.

title: CSAP’s shareholders agreed on rights issue
body: The shareholders of PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana Tbk (CSAP) approved the rights issue plan in order to advance the new outlet expansion until 2030.

title: Up 34.75%, PRAS seized the top gainers spot
body: PT Prima Alloy Steel Universal Tbk (PRAS), an automotive component manufacturer, arrived at the top of the gainers list after recording 34.75% increment in its stock yesterday (10/4).

title: April is a slow month, only two bonds will mature
body: April is a slow month with only two issuers whose bonds were scheduled to mature.

title: Pinky NK acquires a 5% stake in Logindo Samudramakmur (LEAD)
body: Pinky NK, an individual investor, was named a new investor in PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk (LEAD) on Tuesday, April 4.

title: Hermina Hospital saw 70.65% profit decline in 2022
body: The profit of PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the owner of Hermina Hospital network, plummeted 70.65% year-on-year (yoy) in 2022.

title: MAP Boga Adiperkasa arranges rights issue
body: PT MAP Boga Adiperkasa Tbk (MAPB) seeks IDR 625.22 billion to reinforce capital structure and promote expansion via a rights issue.

title: Cisarua Mountain Dairy distributes IDR 555.43 billion cash dividend
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY) will distribute cash dividends of IDR 555.43 billion from net profit for the 2022 financial year.

title: Garudafood readies IDR 50 billion for buyback
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD), a snack manufacturer that has been operating since 1994, will repurchase its shares (buyback) with a budget set to IDR 50 billion.

title: NCKL to pay off USD 150 million loan to OCBC
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL) will pay off a total loan of USD 150 million to Oversea-Chinese Banking Corporation Limited (OCBC) and PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NSIP).

title: Bank Permata to distribute IDR 542.72 billion of cash dividend
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) will initiate the cash dividend distribution of IDR 542.72 billion that will be taken out of the 2022 net profit.

title: Supporting EV credit payment, Volta to join hands with Bank Mandiri
body: PT Volta Indonesia Semesta (Volta), an electric vehicle (EV) manufacturer under PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk (MCAS), has collaborated with PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) to offer an EV credit.

title: MGRO’s subsidiary to widen plantation area in South Sumatra
body: PT Berlian Inti Mekar (BIM) took over 40,838 shares issued by PT Mega Sawit Sriwijaya (MSS) worth a total of IDR 49 billion.

title: PTPP wrapped up Q1 with IDR 4.08 trillion of new contracts
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) secured new contracts worth IDR 4.08 trillion at the end of the first quarter of 2023. The new contracts’ value rose 32.13% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 3.09 trillion recorded in 2021.

title: Foreign exchange reserves increased to US$ 145.2 billion
body: Foreign exchange reserves were recorded at US$ 145.2 billion in March 2023, up from February 2023 of US$ 140.3 billion

title: ROTI to distribute IDR 177.47 billion of dividend
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corporindo Tbk (ROTI) readies IDR 177.47 billion to be disbursed as dividend, which are taken out of its net profit in 2022 of IDR 430.22 billion.

title: Revenue up by 49%, WSBP is out of the woods
body: The performance of PT Waskita Beton Precast Tbk (WSBP) in 2022 skyrocketed, turning the tides from nearly IDR 2 trillion loss in 2021 to a net profit of IDR 675 billion at the end of December 2022.

title: BUMI and BBRI shares were the best-selling, with a net foreign surplus of 162 million shares
body: On Wednesday, April 5, foreign trade volume appeared to be lower than in prior days. The overall number of shares purchased was only 1.67 billion, while the total number of shares sold was 1.51 billion.

title: IHSG already hit the red zone during early week’s first session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) weakened during the opening bell of session I of today’s (10/4) trading at 9 AM WIB.

title: The conglomerate Prajogo Pangestu acquired an additional 1.35 billion shares of Chandra Asri Petrochemical
body: Prajogo Pangestu began the fourth month of this year by purchasing 1,357,544,940 shares of the company that supplies petrochemical goods, PT Chandra Asri Petrochemical Tbk (TPIA).

title: 650 million shares were sold by foreigners; GOTO's net volume is -408 million
body: On Tuesday, April 4, foreign investors sold 650.23 million shares of GOTO.

title: 1.17 billion Bakrie & Brothers (BNBR) shares are purchased by Kingswood Union Corporation
body: On Friday, March 31, Kingswood Union Corporation, a fund management firm based in the British Virgin Islands, became the newest investor in manufacturing and infrastructure issuer PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BNBR).

title: DANA welcomes Ramadhan with solid transaction growth
body: DANA, the e-wallet service provider, reported increases in the number of transactions, as well as the number of frequent users, within the first half of Ramadhan 2023.

title: Foreign investors, primarily from Singapore, are busy selling shares
body: On Thursday, March 30, foreign investor transactions were dominated by divestment activities carried out by Singaporean investors.

title: Inalum to reassign 20% its share in INCO to MIND ID
body: PT Indonesia Asahan Aluminium (Persero), the owner of PT Vale Indonesia Tbk (INCO), transferred its portion to PT Mineral Industri Indonesia (MIND ID) last week (6/4).

title: Revenue up 15.17%, WSKT still at loss
body: PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) was still burdened with loss, although the revenue shifted 15.17% year-on-year (yoy) higher.

title: Japfa Comfeed Indonesia to distribute cash dividends IDR 581.02 billion
body: PT Japfa Comfeed Indonesia Tbk (JPFA) has received approval from its shareholders to distribute a cash dividend of IDR 581.02 billion or IDR 50 per share.

title: Ifishdeco completes buyback of 214.04 million shares
body: PT Ifishdeco Tbk (IFSH), a nickel mining company, completed a buyback program of 214.04 million shares which has been going on for 3 months.

title: Supporting electric vehicle ecosystem, NFCX established JV with IDR 5.5 billion investment
body: PT NFC Indonesia Tbk (NFCX) through one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Energi Always Baru (ESB), has established a joint venture company by investing IDR 5.5 billion in capital.

title: Pyridam scored IDR 275.47 billion of profit
body: PT Pyridam Farma Tbk (PYFA), a pharmaceutical company, gained IDR 275.47 billion of net profit in 2022, proliferating 4,928% year-on-year (yoy) from IDR 5.47 billion in 2021.

title: Bank Danamon Indonesia to share IDR 1.16 trillion cash dividend
body: PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk (BDMN), one of banks under Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG), will distribute cash dividend of IDR 1.16 trillion taken out of the 2022 net profit.

title: Kingland's tyre manufacturer to issue 700 million shares in IPO
body: PT King Tire Indonesia Tbk (TYRE), an inner tube and outer tire manufacturer under the brand Kingland, will soon kick off its initial public offering (IPO) of 700 million shares in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Solidifying financial position, Latinusa to cancel dividend distribution
body: Although PT Pelat Timah Nusantara Tbk (NIKL), popularly known as Latinusa, managed to score double-digit growth in both profit and revenue in 2022, the company decided not to disburse dividend this year to stabilise its financial condition.

title: GMFI faced PKPU lawsuit
body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) is sued with Suspension of Debt Payment Obligation (PKPU) claim by PT Berkah Altama (BA) in the Central Jakarta Commercial Court.

title: Profit went over IDR 1 trillion, Cimory to channel IDR 555.4 billion dividend
body: PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy Tbk (CMRY), or popularly known as Cimory, booked 34% year-on-year (yoy) net profit growth, increasing from IDR 790 billion to IDR 1.06 trillion in 2022. It was further supported by its net sales surge of up to 56% yoy.

title: JCI walks right into the red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index (IHSG) closed weakly at 11.29 AM WIB in today’s (6/4) first session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX). The index dropped right after gaining strength at the early minutes of the trading session.

title: TLKM to spin-off IndiHome
body: PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) restructures its business lines through a spin-off of IndiHome, its internet (WiFi) and digital services business segment.

title: Gaining 26.05% shift, KJEN arrived at top gainers
body: The stock price of PT Kinda Jaringan Nusantara Tbk (KJEN) was seen increasing 26.50% until the last closing bell in yesterday's (5/4) trading session in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Astra Graphia to share dividend of IDR 38.82 billion
body: PT Astra Graphia Tbk (ASGR) will distribute dividend of IDR 38.83 billion from its net profit of the fiscal year 2022 of IDR 97.07 billion.

title: Production capacity maxed out, INKP to build another plant worth USD 3.63 billion
body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk (INKP), a pulp and paper company under Sinarmas Group, plans to distribute a new production plant to meet ever-increasing demand for papers.

title: Adira Finance to distribute IDR 803 billion of dividend
body: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk (ADMF) will channel out dividend of IDR 803 billion from its 2022 net profit on May 4, 2023. The remaining net profit of IDR 786.49 billion will be allocated as retained earnings.

title: Waskita Toll Road to channel loan for Teluk Balikpapan Toll Road project
body: PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR), a subsidiary of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk (WSKT) that is engaged in the toll road business, has channelled a loan facility worth IDR 4.12 billion for PT Tol Teluk Balikpapan (TTB).

title: Graha Layar Prima suffers IDR 58.87 billion in loss
body: PT Graha Layar Prima Tbk (BLTZ), the issuer that manages the CGV cinema network, posted a loss of IDR 58.87 billion in the 2022 fiscal year.

title: BJBR to distribute IDR 1 trillion dividend
body: PT Bank Pembangunan Daerah Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR) will distribute cash dividends of IDR 1 trillion, which will come from net profit for the 2022 fiscal year.

title: CMNP to hold rights issue of 2.23 billion shares, with nominal value IDR 500 per share
body: PT Citra Marga Nusaphala Persada Tbk. (CMNP) will conduct a rights issue of 2.23 billion shares with a nominal value of IDR 500 per share.

title: Pan Brothers’ profit dropped 77.18%
body: The increased financial expenses took up 77.18% of net profit of PT Pan Brothers Tbk (PBRX) in 2022, lowering it from USD 16.14 million to USD 3.68 million.

title: Nippon Indosari schedules dividend distribution of IDR 607 billion
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI), Sari Roti manufacturer and distributor, announces its plan to disburse cash dividend of IDR 607 billion that will be taken out of its 2022 net profit.

title: Issuing phase III bonds, PTPP secures IDR 630.47 billion
body: PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) issues Shelf-Registration Bonds III Phase III and Shelf-Registration Bonds I Phase III Year 2023 worth a total of IDR 630.47 billion.

title: The incoming bids in state sukuk auction clocked up to IDR 24.77 trillion
body: The incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk yesterday (4/4) clocked up to IDR 24.77 trillion.

title: Trimegah Bangun Persada to set IPO price to IDR 1,250
body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (NCKL), a nickel mining company operating in South Halmahera, has named the offering price for its initial public offering (IPO) to IDR 1,250 per share.

title: AALI to disburse IDR 613.97 billion of dividend
body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) will distribute dividend of IDR 613.97 billion or IDR 319 per share, taken out from its net profit attributable to the parent company in 2022.

title: ADRO plans a buyback, preparing IDR 4 trillion
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) has decided to repurchase its shares, known as buyback, amounting to 10% of its issued and paid-up capital at most with a maximum budget of IDR 4 trillion.

title: Provident Warehouse invests IDR 430.57 billion in MMLP via tender offer
body: Provident Warehouse Pte Ltd (PWH) will invest IDR 430.57 billion by purchasing a maximum of 861.14 million shares of PT Mega Manunggal Property Tbk (MMLP) via a tender offer starting yesterday (4/4) to (3/5).

title: Radana Bhaskara receives syndicated loan from 9 banks worth IDR 750 billion
body: Permata Bank has led a syndication of nine banks to provide loans to PT Radana Bhaskara Finance Tbk. (HDFA) of IDR 750 billion. Meanwhile HDFA will channel the loan to support heavy equipment financing.

title: AXA Financial Indonesia introduces its unit link product, AXA Link Protector
body: Amidst the recent talk regarding investment-linked insurance plan (unit link) and the implementation of SEOJK No.5/2022, AXA Financial Indonesia launches AXA Link Protector, its investment-linked insurance product that offers protection as well as investment value.

title: TAYS, snack manufacturer, rose to the top gainers
body: PT Jaya Swarasa Agung Tbk (TAYS) arrived at the top of the gainers list at the end of yesterday’s (4/4) trading session, sporting 34.19% increment in its price compared to the previous day.

title: HSBC Bank made IDR 61.30 billion investment in APEX via private placement
body: HSBC Bank Plc raises its investment worth IDR 61.30 billion via a private placement in PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX).

title: Mayapada Hospital faced IDR 44.18 billion loss
body: PT Sejahteraraya Anugrahjaya Tbk (SRAJ), the managing company of Mayapada Hospital network, posted a net loss of IDR 44.18 billion in 2022.

title: Blue Bird’s profit soared 4,074%
body: The profit of PT Blue Bird Tbk (BIRD), a taxi company, proliferated 4,074% in 2022 compared to the same period in 2021.

title: Lion Parcel ready to facilitate social commerce for MSMEs
body: Lion Parcel management reports that it is preparing a program or system to facilitate the performance of MSMEs in social commerce, or trading via social media.

title: Targeting younger generation, Lion Parcel appoints Densu as "CEO"
body: Lion Parcel, a logistics company under Lion Group, announced the appointment of Denny Sumargo, a rising public figure, as its new “CEO”. However, the "CEO" in question is not the chief executive officer but the Chief Eccentric Officer.

title: Maybank Indonesia to distribute cash dividends IDR 588.43 billion
body: PT Bank Maybank Indonesia Tbk (BNII) announced plans to distribute a cash dividend of IDR 588.43 billion from net profit for the 2022 fiscal year.

title: Philadel Terra to divest shares in BINA for IDR 198.04 billion
body: PT Philadel Terra Lestari (PTL) sold 0.82% of its portion in PT Bank Ina Perdana Tbk (BINA) for IDR 198.04 billion in three separate transactions taking place from March 21 to 29, 2023.

title: The April net foreign volume started at minus 21 million shares
body: The fourth month of this year began with a negative 21,362,000 share net foreign volume. Foreign trade transactions looked relatively stable on Monday, April 3, with a total of 1.89 billion shares purchased and 1.91 billion shares sold.

title: Bussan Auto Finance seeks IDR 1.24 trillion in bonds issuance
body: PT Bussan Auto Finance (BAF), a financing venture under Mitsui & Co Ltd and Yamaha Motor, will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds II of BAF Phase III Year 2023 with a total principal of IDR 1.24 trillion.

title: GOTO's net volume is minus 739 million, and net foreign is also crashing
body: Foreign buyers increased their sales of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares by more than 1.84 billion shares on Friday, March 31.

title: Debuting, Menn Teknologi Indonesia offers 430.2 million shares in IPO
body: PT Menn Teknologi Indonesia Tbk (MENN), an IoT-based (Internet of Things) digital solution provider, will hold an initial public offering (IPO) and issue 430.2 million shares or 30% of its total issued and paid-up capital.

title: Taking on new project, TRIN to secure IDR 15 billion shareholder loan
body: PT Perintis Triniti Properti Tbk (TRIN) has acquired a loan facility from its shareholders worth a total of IDR 15 billion.

title: CITA to grant corporate guarantee worth USD 208.55 million
body: PT Cita Mineral Investindo Tbk (CITA) grants a corporate guarantee worth USD 208.55 million for facilities of two of its affiliated companies worth USD 1.8 million.

title: Planning buyback, Saratoga Investama sets up IDR 150 billion
body: PT Saratoga Investama Sedaya Tbk (SRTG), an investment company of Edwin Soeryadjaya and Sandiaga Uno, will conduct a shares buyback.

title: IAP to acquire LKPR’s shares for IDR 75.59 billion
body: PT Inti Anugerah Pratama (IAP) raises its stock portion worth IDR 79.59 billion in PT Lippo Karawaci Tbk (LPKR) in a transaction taking place last week (29/3).

title: Utama Gondokusumo to gain 1.48% in Intiland
body: Utama Gondokusumo spent IDR 26.14 billion on 1.48% of PT Intiland Development Tbk’s (DILD) share in a transaction taking place last week (28/3).

title: WOM Finance readies dividend of IDR 59.28 billion
body: PT Wahana Ottomitra Multiartha Tbk (WOMF) will distribute cash dividend of IDR 59.28 billion on May 3, 2023.

title: Wika Realty secures cash loan of IDR 4.82 trillion
body: PT Wika Realty has obtained a cash loan facility worth IDR 4.82 trillion from its parent company, PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk (WIKA).

title: Pandemic subsides, tiket.com to go all-out for Ramadhan promos
body: Tiket.com, a subsidiary of PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI) or Blibli, gears up towards mass homecoming period by setting up a discount program for transportation and accommodation tickets titled Tiket Hari Raya (THR) Pol-polan with the theme of Tiket Hadirkan Rasa.

title: Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia to distribute dividend of IDR 192.79 billion
body: PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA) announces the plan to distribute cash dividend of IDR 192.79 billion or IDR 22.5 per share.

title: Telkom's transformation expected to drive market cap to IDR 500 trillion
body: The transformation of PT Telkom Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (TLKM) into a digital infrastructure company is expected to push the market capitalization value to IDR 500 trillion in 2025.

title: KB Bukopin sells IDR 2 trillion in non-performing loans to reach NPL level below 5%
body: At the end of 2023, PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (BBKP) targets a non-performing loan (NPL) ratio of below 5% and a loan at risk (LAR) ratio of below 20%. To reach that target level, BBKP will sell non-performing loans worth IDR 2 trillion.

title: Kookmin committed to carrying out all rights in IDR 12 trillion rights issue
body: Kookmin Bank, the controlling shareholder of PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk (BBKP) is committed to taking all of its rights in the corporate rights issue with a target of IDR 12 trillion and also preparing a number of funds to take part of the rights issue shares which are not absorbed by public shareholders.

title: Food and beverages drive up inflation in March
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) noted that the food and beverage group had driven inflation up in March 2023 by 0.18% compared to February which was 0.16%

title: Entering April, JCI closed weakly
body: Jakarta Composite Index arrived at 6,819.79 during the closing bell of the second trading session today (3/4) at 3 PM WIB. It was weaker than the position recorded during the opening bell of today’s transaction, at 6,837.81.

title: Indomobil gained profit of IDR 562.55 billion
body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS) booked 320.31% year-on-year (yoy) profit surge in 2022 to IDR 562.55 billion, turning the table around from the loss of IDR 255.34 billion in 2021.

title: Soaring 94.59%, SMAR scored IDR 5.5 trillion of profit
body: The continuous crude palm oil (CPO) price surge in the international market managed to boost the revenue of PT Sinar Mas Agro Resources and Technology Tbk (SMAR), resulting in 94.59% increment in its net profit to IDR 5.50 trillion in 2022 from IDR 2.83 trillion in 2021.

title: Tourism activities slowly recover, not hitting rebound yet
body: The foreign tourist visits were seen soaring 567.27% year-on-year (yoy) in February 2023.

title: Multi Makmur Lemindo sets IPO price at IDR 105 per share
body: PT Multi Makmur Lemindo Tbk (PIPA), a manufacturer of PVC building materials, has set an Initial Public Offering (IPO) price of IDR 105 per share.

title: BPS recorded inflation of 4.97% in March 2023
body: Statistics Indonesia (BPS) reported an inflation rate of 4.97% in March 2023, higher than 2.64% seen in March 2022.

title: Forklift rental company to debut, offering 1.75 billion in IPO
body: PT Sarana Mitra Luas Tbk (SMIL), a forklift and material handling equipment rental company, will issue 1.75 billion units of shares in its Initial Public Offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Govt eyes IDR 9 trillion in sovereign sukuk auction
body: The Indonesian government will hold an auction of State Sharia Securities (SBSN) or state sukuk on Tuesday (4/4) tomorrow, with an indicative target of IDR 9 trillion.

title: MNC Asia Holding’s profit hit IDR 2.68 trillion, up by 5.71%
body: The revenue of PT MNC Asia Holding Tbk (BHIT) clocked up to IDR 18.08 trillion in 2022, 64.38% of which came from the media segment. The profit was then seen increasing 5.71% in 2022 from the same period in 2021.

title: Supporting data centre segment, Indosat to enter new business
body: PT Indosat Tbk (ISAT), or Indosat Ooredoo Hutchison (IOH), plans to add new business activities to support its data centre business. Based on the analysis of its net present value (NPV), this additional business calls for extra IDR 313.8 billion of fresh funds.

title: GIAA scored USD 3.7 billion profit post debt restructuring
body: PT Garuda Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (GIAA) secured net profit of USD 3.7 billion in 2022, experiencing 189.50% year-on-year (yoy) surge from USD 4.17 billion seen in 2021.

title: Modis Cipta Kreasi to divest 2.48% of NASI
body: PT Modis Cipta Kreasi divested 2.48% of its portion in PT Wahana Inti Makmur Tbk (NASI) in a transaction last week (27/3).

title: Spindo to raise IDR 405 billion in bonds and sukuk issuance
body: PT Steel Pipe Industry Of Indonesia Tbk (ISSP), a steel pipe manufacturer widely known as Spindo, plans to issue two sets of securities with a total principal of IDR 405 billion.

title: Revenue down 60.56%, Indofarma's loss worsened
body: The revenue of PT Indofarma Tbk (INAF), a pharmaceutical company, was seen declining 60.56% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Era Digital Media eyes IDR 82.5 billion fresh funds via IPO
body: PT Era Digital Media Tbk (AWAN), a mobile content service provider for telecommunications companies, will carry out an initial public offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: New SEOJK, Allianz Indonesia and Bank QNB Indonesia to continue offer product solution
body: After the implementation of Financial Services Authority Circulatory Letter (SEOJK) No.5/2022 regarding unit-linked insurance products, PT Asuransi Allianz Life Indonesia (Allianz Indonesia), along with PT Bank QNB Indonesia Tbk (BKSW), gain confidence about their existing insurance products, Allianz Wealthlink Protection Life and Allianz Wealthlink Prestige Life 2.

title: TBIG posted IDR 1.68 trillion of profit
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG) collected IDR 6.52 trillion of revenue in 2022, shifting from IDR 6.17 trillion seen in 2021. Similarly, its net profit shyly increased from IDR 1.60 trillion to IDR 1.68 trillion.

title: JCI stayed red until second session
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was closed at the red zone, as seen during the after-hours at 3.15 PM WIB today (31/3). Almost all indexes were seen weakened until the closing bell of today’s second trading session.

title: Mercedes Benz AG to assign Indomobil and partner manufacturer and distributor in Indonesia
body: Mercedes-Benz AG decides to redirect its operational activities of PT Mercedes-Benz Indonesia and PT Mercedes-Benz Distribution Indonesia to PT Indomobil Sukses International Tbk and its partner, Inchape Motors Limited (Inchape), a globally renowned multi-brand automotive distributor.

title: Indomobil appointed as manufacturer and distributor of Mercedes-Benz in Indonesia
body: PT Indomobil Sukses Internasional Tbk (IMAS) together with Inchape Motors Private Limited, have been appointed by Mercedez-Benz to handle the Mercedes-Benz business in Indonesia.

title: Alfamart posts 48% profit jump to IDR 2.88 trillion
body: Alfamart retail network manager, PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk. (AMRT) managed to achieve a significant growth in net profit performance of 48% to IDR 2.88 trillion by the end of 2022.

title: OBM Drilchem ​​optimistic to achieve sales target IDR 124 billion
body: PT OBM Drilchem ​​Tbk (OBMD) is optimistic that it will reap sales according to this year's target of IDR 124 billion.

title: IMC Pelita Logistik posted 69% profit surge to USD 42.33 million
body: PT IMC Pelita Logistik Tbk (PSSI), previously known as PT Pelita Samudera Shipping, managed to gain net profit of USD 42.33 million in 2022.

title: ITMG plans dividend distribution of USD 774.15 million
body: PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) will allocate cash dividend of USD 774.15 million of its total net profit attributable to the parent company for the fiscal year 2022 of USD 1.2 billion

title: Blibli’s losses swelled 65.16% yoy to IDR 5.50 trillion in 2022
body: The net loss of PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI) or Blibli in 2022 worsened 65.16% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 5.50 trillion from IDR 3.33 trillion seen in 2021.

title: DPR to promote unit-linked insurance marketing evaluation
body: House of Representatives (lit. Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat/DPR) calls for the evaluation of the regulation that oversees marketing of investment-linked insurance products (unit-linked insurance plan).

title: Sido Muncul to distribute final dividend of IDR 690 billion
body: PT Industri Jamu Dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) has gained approval from its shareholders to channel out final dividend of IDR 690 billion or IDR 23 per share.

title: Champ Resto’s net sales shifted 60.3% to the highest level
body: PT Champ Resto Indonesia Tbk (ENAK), the owner of 6 restaurant chains in Indonesia, managed to score net sales of IDR 1.27 trillion in 2022.

title: Hanwha Insurance acquires 62% of Lippo General Insurance (LPGI)
body: Hanwha General Insurance Co. Ltd., a South Korean insurance company, acquired 14.9% of PT Lippo General Insurance Tbk (LPGI) after purchasing 44.7 million LPGI shares.

title: GOTO transactions totaled billions of shares, resulting in a net foreign surplus of 230 million
body: On Thursday, March 30, the trading volume of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia shares by foreign investors exceeded 2 billion shares.

title: The controller sold 8.52 billion Alfamart shares
body: On Tuesday, March 28, PT Sigmantara Alfindo, the controlling shareholder of minimarket retail issuer PT Sumber Alfaria Trijaya Tbk (AMRT), sold 8.52 billion shares.

title: Astra International to allocate IDR 40 trillion of capex, 60% for UNTR
body: PT Astra International Tbk (ASII) sets its capital expenditure (capex) for year 2023 to IDR 40 trillion. Out of said amount, PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) will receive the highest portion, amounting to 60%.

title: Jaya Ancol finally profited after 146.02% revenue surge
body: The performance of PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk (PJAA) reportedly improved after the COVID-19 pandemic subsided in 2022.

title: JCI slipped to red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was seen freefalling at today’s (31/3) opening bell in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX). Thankfully, some indexes managed to stay afloat in the green zone.

title: Foreign investors sold many WMPP shares; its net volume dropped to -454 million shares
body: On Wednesday, March 29, foreign investors' trade ended with a tiny margin. Foreigners purchased a total of 2.60 billion shares, while they sold 2.61 billion.

title: GPF keeps on selling GOTO shares; 20 million shares were distributed this time
body: On Monday, March 27, the GOTO Peopleverse Fund sold a total of 20.36 million shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). Because GPF hasn't stopped distributing GOTO shares, the proportion of ownership has now dropped to 6.78%.

title: Putra Mandiri Jembar saw 72.41% increment in 2022 profit
body: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar Tbk (PMJS), a four-wheeler distributor, scored IDR 72.41% year-on-year (yoy) growth in its net profit in 2022. The profit surge coincided with 17.70% revenue growth.

title: Shares of GOTO and BUKA generated a net foreign surplus of roughly 240 million shares
body: Foreign investors purchased 751.04 million shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) on Tuesday, March 28. Despite its large foreign sales volume, GOTO was able to generate a net volume of 142.70 million shares.

title: Matahari Department Store to distribute cash dividend IDR 525 per share
body: PT Matahari Department Store Tbk (LPPF) will distribute cash dividends from net profit for the 2022 fiscal year of IDR 525 per share.

title: OJK to act on fintech with NPL rate over 5%
body: The Financial Services Authority (OJK) will take action on some financial technology companies (fintech) that has a non-performing loan (NPL) or TWP90 rate of over 5%.

title: The Singapore government purchased 2.26 billion more GOTO shares
body: On Friday, March 24, the stock trading of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) appeared to be fairly significant. The Singapore government boosted its ownership of GOTO from 5.36% to 5.55% by purchasing 2,269,339,842 shares through Citibank Singapore.

title: IPCC profit skyrockets 169.28%
body: The profit of PT Indonesia Vehicle Terminal Tbk (IPCC) skyrocketed 169.28% to IDR 161.72 billion in 2022 from 2021 profit of IDR 60.05 billion.

title: Bank Woori Saudara channels IDR 40.10 trillion in 2022
body: PT Bank Woori Saudara Indonesia 1906 Tbk (SDRA) channeled IDR 40.10 trillion in credit throughout 2022, up from the same period in 2021 of IDR 33.43 trillion.

title: Blibli's loss increased to IDR 5.5 trillion after IPO last year
body: PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI), an issuer owned by the Djarum Group which oversees the Blibli e-commerce platform to the Ranch Market supermarket, posted a loss of IDR 5.50 trillion in the 2022 fiscal year.

title: PEHA net profit soars 143%, supported by aggressive market penetration
body: PT Phapros Tbk (PEHA) has posted a net profit of IDR 27.4 billion in the 2022 financial year, growing 143% year-on-year (yoy) or from the previous year which reached IDR 11.3 billion.

title: MBMA prepares IPO funds for downstream nickel
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA) is preparing IPO funds for the construction of a nickel processing facility in order to realize expansion into the downstream industry.

title: Kalbe Farma scored IDR 3.45 trllion profit
body: PT Kalbe Farma Tbk (KBLF), a pharmaceutical company, gains IDR 3.45 trillion in 2022, shifting 6.7% from IDR 3.23 trillion in 2021. The small jump resulted from annual increase in its revenue.

title: JCI stumbled to the red zone
body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) entered the red zone right after its solid beginning during the opening bell at 9 AM WIB today (30/3).

title: Asep Sabanda invests more in ZATA
body: PT Lembur Sadaya Investama (LSI) raises its stock portion worth IDR 5.92 billion in PT Bersama Zatta Jaya Tbk (ZATA), a modest fashion manufacturer.

title: Ranch Market lost IDR 83.66 billion

title: Foreign purchases of GOTO shares resulted in a net foreign surplus of 582 million shares
body: Beginning in the last week of March, foreign investors purchased 2.37 billion shares of Indonesian issuers and sold 1.79 billion shares. On Monday, March 27, foreign net volume was likewise in surplus of 582.19 million shares.

title: Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya to sell 364.48 million treasury shares
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) will sell 364.48 million treasury shares.

title: Bank Mandiri to split stock with 1:2 ratio

title: Casting Inalum aside, MIND ID now controls 65% of TINS

title: Today, TBLA to issue IDR 500 billion bonds

title: Hero Supermarket to sell off ex-Giant Extra BSD for IDR 355 billion

title: Securing USD 270 million funding, Kredivo readies ecosystem expansion

body: Jakarta Composite Index (JCI) was reported increasing in the start of today’s (29/3) trading session at 9 AM WIB, reaching 6,783.43.

body: PT Eastparc Hotel Tbk (EAST) plans a final dividend distribution worth a total of IDR 9.72 billion that will be taken out of its 2022 net profit.

title: Petrosea obtains term loan facility of IDR 2.84 trillion

body: A number of stock indices strengthened in the closing bell on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Tuesday (21/3).

body: On March 15, two foreign investors who own more than 5% of the company were seen selling nearly 65 million shares of PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO).

body: PT Indah Prakasa Sentosa Tbk (INPS) targets sales of up to Rp 100 billion this year.

body: On Tuesday, March 14, many investors who owned more than 5% of the company reduced their stakes.

body: On Wednesday, March 15, the difference in foreign trade volume was slight. Foreign investors bought 2.71 billion shares while selling 2.67 billion, for a net foreign volume surplus of 44,716,000 shares.

body: PT Agung Menjangan Mas Tbk (AMMS) is targeting to secure additional IDR 15 billion through reinforcing its collaboration with the Indonesian Market Traders Association.

title: Two investors released WMUU shares, and Maybank Sekuritas was quick to accommodate
body: On Friday, March 10, shares of poultry farm issuer PT Widodo Makmur Unggas Tbk (WMUU) were heavily traded.

title: Trade surplus hit USD 5.48 billion, highest since May 2020

body: On Friday, March 3, net foreign volume remained positive, with a surplus of 721,938,900 shares. Foreign investor purchases totaled 2.46 billion shares, while shares sold totaled 1.74 billion.

title: Tax revenues and foreign debt withdrawals increase forex reserves in February to US$ 140.3 billion
body: Bank Indonesia noted that at least two factors had influenced the increase in the position of Indonesia's foreign exchange reserves (cadev) in February 2023 which reached US$140.3 billion, up from US$139.4 billion in the previous month.

title: TOBA listed its first bond worth IDR 500 billion
body: For the first time since the IPO, PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk. (TOBA) listed Bond I TBS Energi Utama Year 2023 (Bonds) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) worth IDR 500 billion. The proceeds from the bond offering will be used to fund green projects.

title: Realising its digitalisation agenda, Prodia launches U by Prodia
body: PT Prodia Digital Indonesia (PRDI), the recently formed subsidiary of PT Prodia Widyahusada Tbk (PRDA), announces its latest product development called U by Prodia, a digitalised one-stop health and wellness solution.

title: IPO cancelled, Bank Sumut to give out IDR 560.57 billion dividend
body: PT Bank Sumut, a regional bank owned by the Government of North Sumatra, plans to distribute cash dividend of IDR 560.57 billion from its net profit gained in 2022.

title: Surya Esa Perkasa to inject IDR 1.78 trillion in Sepchem
body: PT Surya Esa Perkasa Tbk (ESSA) has granted extra capital worth IDR 1.78 trillion to one of its subsidiaries, PT Sepchem.

title: Not too shabby; nearly 850 million shares were in the net foreign surplus
body: With a surplus of nearly 850 million shares on Thursday, March 2, net foreign can return to the green zone. Foreign investors purchased a total of 2.69 billion shares while selling 1.84 billion shares, for a net volume of 849,059,900 shares.

title: Star Pacific acquired 621,621,621 Bank Nobu shares
body: On February 28, PT Star Pacific Tbk became a new investor in Nobu Bank. A total of 621,621,621 shares of PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk (NOBU) were purchased, transferring 11.77% ownership to this issuer involved in business development and media management.

title: Indika Energy to sign syndicate credit agreement worth USD 250 million
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) has signed the credit facility agreement worth USD 250 million, whose facility will be utilised to develop its gold mining project.

title: Temas to conduct stock split with 1:10 ratio
body: PT Temas Tbk (TMAS), a container shipping and transportation company, schedules a stock split with a ratio of 1:10.

title: Running out of tailing storage, UNTR to lower gold production by 50%
body: PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR) will lower its gold production by up to 50% this year as the capacity of its tailing storage facility is reduced.

title: Volta to secure incentives from gov’t
body: Volta, a subsidiary of PT NFC Indonesia Tbk (NFCX), has officially secured electronic vehicle (EV) incentives from the Indonesian government.

title: Protelindo to issue bonds of IDR 2.91 trillion
body: PT Profesional Telekomunikasi Indonesia (Protelindo) will issue Shelf-Registration Bonds III of Protelindo Phase II Year 2023, consisting of two series worth IDR 2.91 trillion in total.

title: Lautan Luas’s subsidiary to gain extra capital
body: PT Lautan Mitra Kreasi (LMK), one of many subsidiaries of PT Lautan Luas Tbk (LTLS), has received extra capital worth IDR 300 million.

title: March foreign trading started in the red
body: The stock trading of foreign investors appears to be quite active at the start of the new month, Wednesday, March 1. While it's true that net foreign volume closed in the red zone, the volume was not excessive at around minus 176,282,000 shares.

title: Archipelago Investment bought up 3.78 billion shares of Primaya Hospital
body: On Monday, February 27, the Primaya hospital service provider issuer, PT Famon Awal Bros Sedaya Tbk (PRAY), was successful in bringing in a new investor. The Northern Trust Company S/A Archipelago Investment Pte Ltd, recently purchased 3.78 billion shares

title: The volume of foreign trade soared at the end of February
body: The volume of foreign trade increased dramatically to double the usual rate on Tuesday, February 28. Foreign purchase volume totaled 4.28 billion shares, while foreign sales totaled 4.79 billion.

title: KRYA to secure new contracts of IDR 25.77 billion
body: PT Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk (KRYA) collected new contracts worth IDR 25.77 billion until February 2023.

title: Just officially listed, 6% of Lini Imaji (FUTR) was acquired by Solusi Teknologi Tepat
body: At the end of February, the technology firm PT Lini Imaji Kreasi Ekosistem Tbk (FUTR) was officially listed on the stock exchange. PT Solusi Teknologi Tepat immediately purchased 389,900,000 FUTR shares

title: BI and Bank of Korea to extend BCSA worth IDR 115 trillion
body: Bank Indonesia (BI) and Bank of Korea have agreed to extend the bilateral currency swap agreement (BCSA) of up to IDR 115 trillion.

title: NOBU and Bank MNC officially merge
body: PT Bank Nationalnobu Tbk and PT Bank MNC Internasional Tbk (BABP) officially announce their merger after the document was rightfully received by Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Even though GOTO shares remain positive, net foreign is -179 million
body: After two days of being positive, net foreign volume turned negative on Monday, February 27. This time, the difference in the volume of shares bought 1.95 billion and sold by foreigners 2.13 billion was 179,514,300 shares.

title: Four coal mining companies dominated top 10 transaction volume
body: The highest volume of shares transaction in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) throughout 2022 was dominated by shares of coal mining issuers.

title: Bakrie & Brothers secured over 50% revenue increase
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk. (BNBR) recorded revenue increase of 52.16% year-on-year (yoy), arriving at IDR 3.62 trillion in 2022.

title: Mitratel to secure IDR 1.78 trillion of profit
body: PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk (MTEL) or Mitratel managed to collect IDR 1.78 trillion in 2022, growing 29.25% from IDR 1.38 trillion in 2021.

title: APEX to issue MCB of 33.2 million shares
body: PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX) will issue mandatory convertible bonds (MCB) of 33.2 million shares of IDR 500 each.

title: Multipolar scored IDR 559 billion of revenue in 2022
body: PT Multipolar Technology Tbk. (MLPT), an issuer under Lippo Group, posted the current year’s net profit attributable to the parent entity of IDR 559 billion in 2022.

title: All business lines thrive, Trimegah Sekuritas posted 241.9% profit growth
body: PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk (TRIM) recorded net profit of IDR 177.5 billion in 2022, proliferating 241.9% year-on-year (yoy) or compared to the previous year.

title: One year debuting, BAUT’s net profit soared 35% in 2022
body: PT Mitra Angkasa Sejahtera Tbk (BAUT), the supplier of PATTA nuts and bolts in Indonesia, booked net profit IDR 6.4 billion in 2022.

title: BSBK gains popularity in trading session
body: The shares of PT Wulandari Bangun Laksana Tbk (BSBK) arrived at the top 10 of the total trading frequency on March 3, 2023.

title: Matahari was still at loss of IDR 429.63 billion in 2022
body: PT Matahari Putra Prima Tbk (MPPA), a modern retail chain owner, still suffered from the current year’s loss in 2022 despite its 5.43% growth in revenue.

title: PTBA booked 59% profit growth to IDR 12.77 trillion
body: The profit of PT Bukit Asam Tbk (PTBA) reportedly grew 59.02% to IDR 12.77 trillion in 2022 from IDR 8.03 trillion seen in the same period in 2021.

title: BBCA bagged IDR 16.33 billion from Grand Indonesia
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), the bank with the largest market capitalisation in Indonesia, has scored IDR 16.33 billion of revenue from PT Grand Indonesia.

title: LinkAja to target over 80% revenue growth this year
body: LinkAja, an e-wallet service provider owned by several state-owned enterprises, is targeting to attain over 80% revenue growth in 2023.

title: Awal Bros's investors divesting shares for IDR 868.09 billion
body: Two shareholders of PT Famon Awal Bros Sedaya Tbk (PRAY), the managing company of Awal Bros Hospital, have divested their portions for a total of IDR 868.09 billion.

title: TRON eyes IDR 135 billion via IPO
body: PT Teknologi Karya Digital Nusantara Tbk (TRON) is eyeing IDR 135 billion from the initial public offering (IPO) which took place from yesterday (2/3) to (6/3).

title: Grahaprima Suksesmandiri targets IDR 56.83 billion fresh fund in stock market debut
body: PT Grahaprima Suksesmandiri Tbk (GTRA), a motorized transportation company for general goods, will carry out an Initial Public Offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Adhi Commuter Properti’s revenue climbed 5.1% in 2022
body: PT Adhi Commuter Properti Tbk (ADCP) posted IDR 592.7 billion of revenue in 2022, increasing 5.1% year-on-year (yoy) or compared to the numbers seen in 2021.

title: Protelindo seeks IDR 2.91 trillion through bonds issuance
body: PT Profesional Telekomunikasi Indonesia, a subsidiary of PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR), will issue bonds with a principal of IDR 2.91 trillion.

title: Promoting sharia investment, Bank Permata introduces Permata RDN Sharia
body: PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI) has officially launched its most recent product, Permata RDN Sharia, a sharia-based customer fund account.

title: SAGE to work on Cibinong New City
body: PT Saptausaha Gemilangindah Tbk (SAGE) projects the completion of Phase 2 and 3 of Cibinong New City housing construction in 2025.

title: GOTO’s shares slipped off in yesterday’s transaction
body: PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) recorded net foreign of 799.65 million shares, the highest in yesterday’s (3/3) transaction.

title: ELSA to allocate IDR 500 billion for capex
body: PT Elnusa Tbk (ELSA) has set the capital expenditure (capex) budget of IDR 500 billion in 2023.

title: Proliferating 102.55%, ADHI posted IDR 175.2 billion of profit
body: The profit of PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) was seen increasing massively by 102.55% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 175.20 billion in 2022.

title: Segar Kumala Indonesia branches out to Bangka Belitung
body: PT Segar Kumala Indonesia Tbk (BUAH) has opened up a new branch office and cold storage in Pangkalpinang, Bangka Belitung. This is the 13th branch office that BUAH has established.

title: Selling off treasury shares, TBIG collects IDR 894.2 billion revenue
body: PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk (TBIG) managed to secure extra money after divesting its treasury shares.

title: Facilitating easier remittance, Wise pairs up with Bank Mandiri
body: After its initial launch in Indonesia in 2020, Wise works fast in securing its first partnership with PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (BMRI) to provide easier cross-border money transfer service.

title: PTSN secures USD 11.5 million loan, to be spent on SMT machine
body: PT Sat Nusapersada Tbk (PTSN) obtains a banking facility worth USD 11.5 million for business expansion.

title: AVIAN’s performance weakened in 2022
body: The performance of PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA) was corrected in 2022, recording profit and revenue decline of 2.37% yoy and 1.25% yoy, respectively.

title: Tourism regains strength in January 2023
body: The number of international tourist visits in January 2023 was seen decreasing from December 2022, but still showed improvement from January 2022.

title: BPS announces inflation at 5.47%, increasing from last year
body: The Central Statistics Agency (BPS) recorded an increase in inflation at 5.47% in February 2023 compared to February 2022 at 2.06% (year on year).

title: ADMR posts US$ 342 million profit last year
body: The core profit of PT Adaro Minerals Indonesia Tbk (ADMR) skyrocketed 112.42% in 2022 along with a 97% increase in revenue

title: Buana Finance pockets IDR 150 billion credit facility from Bank Victoria International
body: PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD), a finance company listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) since 1990, has obtained a credit facility from PT Bank Victoria International Tbk (BVIC).

title: Bank Mega to distribute IDR 2.8 trillion cash dividend
body: PT Bank Mega Tbk (MEGA) will distribute cash dividends worth IDR 241.618 per share or a total of IDR 2.8 trillion.

title: BRI shares shows improvement, no rebound yet
body: The shares of PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) strengthened at the closing bell on the stock exchange, yesterday (1/3).

title: Tunas Ridean net profit soars 57% driven by strong motor vehicle business
body: PT Tunas Ridean Tbk (TURI) booked a net profit of IDR 897.99 billion in the 2022 fiscal year, growing 57% from the previous year which reached IDR 571.29 billion.

title: MIDI booked 48% profit surge
body: PT Midi Utama Indonesia Tbk (MIDI) recorded net profit of IDR 399.12 billion in 2022, soaring 47.99% from IDR 269.69 billion seen in the same period in 2021.

title: Soteria Wicaksana to increase portion in DIVA
body: PT Soteria Wicaksana Investama (SWI) is raising its stock portion in PT Distribusi Voucher Nusantara Tbk (DIVA) by IDR 16.59 billion.

title: Foreign purchases of GOTO rose; net foreign volume remained positive at 387 million shares
body: Following the previous day's positive net foreign, good news from foreign investor trading returned on Friday, February 24. The total amount of shares purchased by foreigners increased to 2.54 billion, with 1.32 billion shares purchased from PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO). GOTO also had the highest net volume, with over 422 million shares.

title: All products showed growth, ROTI’s profit soared 52.4% in 2022
body: PT Nippon Indosari Corpindo Tbk (ROTI) booked net profit of IDR 432.22 billion in 2022, proliferating 52.4% year-on-year (yoy) or compared to the previous fiscal year.

title: Mitra Pack to work with Singaporean suppliers
body: PT Mitra Pack Tbk (PTMP) has agreed to become the distributor of several packaging products from two foreign suppliers, Markem Imaje Singapore Pte Ltd and Thermo Ramsey LLC, from Singapore.

title: Bank Victoria to issue bonds, eyeing IDR 500 billion
body: PT Bank Victoria International Tbk (BVIC) is in the middle of the issuance of its Shelf-Registration Bonds III Phase I Year 2023, targeting to raise IDR 500 billion.

title: HILL allocates IDR 248.79 billion in capex
body: PT Hillcon Tbk (HILL) has allocated capital expenditure (capex) of IDR 248.79 billion, which will be used to support the operations of its subsidiary, PT Hillconjaya Sakti (HS).

title: ABDA controller changes name to Oona Insurance
body: Aseana Insurance Pte Ltd is known to have changed its brand to Oona Insurance Pte Ltd since last week (15/2).

title: BJBR credit distribution grows 12.89%
body: PT BPD Jawa Barat dan Banten Tbk (BJBR)'s conventional credit distribution grew 12.89% in 2022 compared to 2021. On the other hand, third party funds (DPK) rose 7.3%.

title: Garudafood’s sales grew 19.44% in 2022
body: PT Garudafood Putra Putri Jaya Tbk (GOOD) posted 19.44% year-on-year (yoy increase in its sales. However, its profit only hit below 10% of its revenue.

title: Pertamina Geothermal (PGEO) went public, and Masdar purchased 6.2 billion shares
body: PT Pertamina Geothermal Energy (PGEO), Pertamina's subsidiary engaged in geothermal energy utilization, has finally been listed on the stock exchange. Not waiting too long, Masdar Indonesia Solar Holdings RSC Limited, a member of the Masdar Group based in the United Arab Emirates, purchased 6,209,421 shares of PGEO on Thursday, February 23, immediately claiming a 15% stake.

title: Declining 19.79% yoy, POWR’s profit down to USD 72.52 million
body: PT Cikarang Listrindo Tbk (POWR) saw a 19.79% downturn in its profit to USD 72.53 million in 2022 from USD 90.43 million in 2021, following an increase in its income tax expense.

title: Mega Asta Raya has amassed 25 million shares of Batulicin Nusantara Maritim (BESS)
body: PT Mega Asta Raya pocketed up to 25 million shares of water transportation issuer PT Batulicin Nusantara Maritim Tbk (BESS) on Wednesday, February 22. The company's ownership percentage increased slightly as well, from 10.26% to 10.98%. Furthermore, several individual investors increased their shareholdings.

title: Foreign sales fell, resulting in a 352 million net foreign gain
body: On Thursday, February 23, foreign sales volume fell to 1.90 billion shares. The consistent volume of purchases in the 2.26 billion range finally resulted in a positive net foreign volume of 352,832,200 shares. PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) shares were once again the most purchased, with 1.06 billion, and a net volume of 509,593,500 shares.

title: Forming new subsidiary, Murni Sadar to spend IDR 1 billion
body: PT Murni Sadar Tbk (MTMH), the owner of Murni Teguh Hospital network, has established a new subsidiary called PT Anugerah Cakrawala Farmaka (CAF).

title: Price closed strong, BUMI’s net foreign climbs to the top
body: PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) arrived at the top of the net foreign record in yesterday’s (28/2) trading session. BUMI’s stock price was seen increasing at the closing bell.

title: Catur Sentosa Adiprana to hold rights issue of 1.5 billion shares
body: PT Catur Sentosa Adiprana Tbk (CSAP) will schedule a capital raise with pre-emptive rights issuance by offering 1.5 billion units of new shares.
